docs.title: Rich Kids of TAO
docs.text:
Subnet Rich-Kids-of-TAO__rkt-subnet netuid 110 Archetype pipeline Language python Mechanism status partial_burn Task Miners simply register a hotkey to the subnet (no code to run). Validators measure each miner hotkey's emission across a set of community-voted external subnets, multiply emission by the subnet's alpha price and the community-voted subnet weight, sum these across all voted subnets to get a total emi DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: Other"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: Deduplication, StakeWeighting"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: other"]
  AGG["aggregate: Proportional"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  M0 --> AGG
  AGG --> SM
  SM --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: richKidsOfTao

    netuid: 110
    lang: python
    status: partial_burn
    submission: other

    @burn {
        uid: "0"
        fraction: 0.9
    }
    @guards {
        Deduplication {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        StakeWeighting {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score }

    Pipeline {
        score: Metric {
            kind: other
            family: cross_subnet_aggregate
            specific: cross_subnet_incentive
            raw: "Total emission value across voted external subnets: sum(emission * alpha_price * subnet_weight)."
            direction: higher_is_better
            normalization: min_max
        }
        groundTruth: Other {
            trust_model: oracle
        }
        aggregate: Proportional {
            composition: weighted_sum
            normalization: min_max
        }
        smooth: Ema {
            alpha: 0.1
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: per_epoch
            tempo: 360
        }
        tracks {
            structure: none
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: partial_burn
mechanism_status_notes: The validator hardcodes burner_uid=0 and burner_weight=0.9, so 90% of emission
  is routed to UID 0 and only the remaining 0.1 is distributed proportionally among miners according to
  their off-subnet emission value.
subnet:
  name: Rich Kids of TAO
  owner_repo: Rich-Kids-of-TAO__rkt-subnet
  netuid: 110
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners simply register a hotkey to the subnet (no code to run). Validators measure each miner
    hotkey's emission across a set of community-voted external subnets, multiply emission by the subnet's
    alpha price and the community-voted subnet weight, sum these across all voted subnets to get a total
    emission value, normalize values by the maximum, smooth with an EMA, and set on-chain weights — rewarding
    miners proportionally to their "wealth"/emissions elsewhere in the Bittensor ecosystem.
  submission_format:
  - other
  submission_format_other: No submission; reward is derived from the miner hotkey's on-chain emissions
    on other subnets. Registration of the hotkey to netuid 110 is the only action required.
scoring_signals:
- name: cross_subnet_emission_value
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: 'Total emission value across voted external subnets: sum(emission * alpha_price *
    subnet_weight).'
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: min_max
  notes: 'Per voted subnet: emission_value = emission * price * subnet_weight (check_hotkey_emissions).
    Summed across subnets, then normalized by the maximum across miners (get_rewards_from_emissions divides
    by max). The validator''s own subnet is skipped.'
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: other
  kind_other: on-chain subnet emission/price metagraph data plus a centralized voting API
  description: Per-subnet metagraph emission values (metagraph.E[uid]) and subnet alpha prices (subtensor.get_subnet_price)
    read from chain, combined with per-subnet community-voted weights fetched from a centralized API.
  source_identifier: https://richkidsoftao.com/api/subnets
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: Subnet weights are fetched from a centralized API endpoint (fetch_subnet_weights_from_api); falls
    back to empty/hardcoded if the API fails. Alpha holders sign votes off-chain and the API averages
    them.
aggregation:
  method: proportional
  composition: weighted_sum
  normalization: min_max
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '0'
    fraction: 0.9
    dynamic: false
    notes: burner_uid=0 receives burner_weight=0.9; remaining_weight=1.0-burner_weight=0.1 is split among
      miners proportionally to their normalized score.
  notes: Rewards are emission_value normalized by the max across miners; if all emission values are zero,
    rewards default to a uniform 1/N. Final weights = burner gets 0.9, others get (score/total_other_scores)*0.1.
weight_setting:
  cadence: per_epoch
  method: EMA-smoothed normalized scores converted to weights with 0.9 reserved for the burner UID 0 and
    0.1 distributed proportionally; pushed via subtensor.set_weights.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: 360
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: 0.1
    window: null
    notes: 'update_scores: scores = moving_average_alpha*scattered_rewards + (1-moving_average_alpha)*scores,
      with moving_average_alpha=0.1.'
anti_gaming:
- kind: deduplication
  enforcement: penalty
  description: Duplicate hotkeys are processed only once; subsequent UIDs sharing an already-seen hotkey
    are assigned emission 0.0 (processed_hotkeys set in check_metagraph_emissions).
- kind: stake_weighting
  enforcement: rejection
  description: check_uid_availability excludes UIDs holding a validator_permit with stake above vpermit_tao_limit
    (1024), so high-stake validators are not scored as miners.
sub_competitions:
  structure: none
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: ''
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: ''
  notes: self.scores is a per-UID EMA vector updated each evaluation round (moving_average_alpha=0.1).
    No documented reset policy.
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - VOTING_GUIDE.md
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract (Claude Opus 4.8)
  confidence_overall: high
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '19'
    quote: btcli subnet register --netuid 110 --wallet.name YOUR_WALLET --wallet.hotkey YOUR_HOTKEY
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /subnet/implementation_lang
    source_path: rich_kids_of_tao/validator.py
    line_ref: 4-5
    quote: 'import numpy as np

      import bittensor as bt'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /task/summary
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '13'
    quote: 'Rewards: Based on total emission value across voted subnets (emission × subnet price × subnet
      weight)'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /task/submission_format_other
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '11'
    quote: 'Miners: Simply register to the subnet - no code to run'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/metric_kind_other
    source_path: rich_kids_of_tao/emission_checker.py
    line_ref: 73-74
    quote: "emission_value = emission * price * subnet_weight\n                total_emission_value +=\
      \ emission_value"
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/normalization

      \ price = subnet_prices.get(netuid, 1.0) if subnet_prices else 1.0"

  - claim_field: /aggregation/method

Validators verify each commitment, score it on a multi-axis composite evaluator (teacher-distillation KL/on-policy RKL plus ca DataflowIMMLIR (YAML)

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: active
mechanism_status_notes: Validators evaluate committed models with a multi-axis composite evaluator, select
  a single "king" by composite worst/weighted score, and set one-hot on-chain weights (king = 1.0, all
  others = 0.0). No burn UID or emission-burn fraction is present in the scoring/weight-setting code.
subnet:
  name: Quasar
  owner_repo: SILX-LABS__QUASAR-SUBNET
  netuid: 24
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners train Quasar-architecture small language models (3B total / ~1B active MoE), publish
    them as public Hugging Face repos, and commit the pinned model revision on-chain. Validators verify
    each commitment, score it on a multi-axis composite evaluator (teacher-distillation KL/on-policy RKL
    plus capability/benchmark/generation-discipline axes), and set one-hot weights to the current king
    (strongest valid model).
  submission_format:
  - model_weights
  - commitment_hash
scoring_signals:
- name: on_policy_rkl
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: 0.35
  normalization: none
  notes: On-policy reverse KL on the student's own rollouts vs the teacher; primary distillation axis.
    Normalized to [0,1] higher-is-better against the king's RKL inside the composite. Weight 0.35 in AXIS_WEIGHTS.
- name: kl
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: 0.15
  normalization: none
  notes: Off-policy forward-KL vs the teacher's top-128 support; retained as a distillation/transparency
    axis. Weight 0.15. Normalized king_kl/kl.
- name: capability
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.25
  normalization: none
  notes: Verifiable-rewards pass fraction blended absolute + teacher-relative. Weight 0.25.
- name: length
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: length_penalty
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.1
  normalization: none
  notes: Length-discipline penalty axis in [0,1]. Weight 0.10.
- name: degeneracy
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: generation_discipline
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.15
  normalization: none
  notes: Think-probe terminates + non-degenerate + self-bleu combined score. Weight 0.15.
- name: judge_probe
  metric_kind: llm_judgment
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.15
  normalization: none
  notes: Teacher-as-judge rubric (1-5) on rotated prompts, normalized to [0,1]. JUDGE_AXIS_WEIGHT default
    0.15.
- name: chat_turns_probe
  metric_kind: llm_judgment
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.08
  normalization: none
  notes: Teacher-graded 3-turn dialogue coherence. CHAT_TURNS_AXIS_WEIGHT default 0.08.
- name: math_bench
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.14
  normalization: none
  notes: Procedural math pass_frac. BENCH_MATH_WEIGHT default 0.14.
- name: code_bench
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.14
  normalization: none
  notes: Procedural code pass_frac. BENCH_CODE_WEIGHT default 0.14.
- name: reasoning_bench
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.1
  normalization: none
  notes: BENCH_REASONING_WEIGHT default 0.10.
- name: ifeval_bench
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.07
  normalization: none
  notes: BENCH_IFEVAL_WEIGHT default 0.07.
- name: aime_bench
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.1
  normalization: none
  notes: Olympiad math pass_frac. BENCH_AIME_WEIGHT default 0.10.
- name: mbpp_bench
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.08
  normalization: none
  notes: BENCH_MBPP_WEIGHT default 0.08.
- name: tool_use_bench
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.06
  normalization: none
  notes: Agentic Python tool use. BENCH_TOOL_USE_WEIGHT default 0.06.
- name: long_context_bench
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.04
  normalization: none
  notes: Block-seeded procedural needle-in-haystack. BENCH_LC_WEIGHT default 0.04.
- name: robustness_bench
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.07
  normalization: none
  notes: Math items under paraphrase+noise wrappers. BENCH_ROBUSTNESS_WEIGHT default 0.07.
- name: reasoning_density
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: efficiency
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.05
  normalization: none
  notes: pass_frac x length_bonus per bench, penalizing over-thinking on trivia. REASONING_DENSITY_WEIGHT
    default 0.05.
- name: knowledge_bench
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.0
  normalization: none
  notes: Muted to weight 0 in v28 (eval-setup-fragile MC); kept for telemetry. BENCH_KNOWLEDGE_WEIGHT
    default 0.0.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: reference_model
  description: Distillation teacher (Qwen3.5-4B). Teacher continuations / logprobs and teacher-as-judge
    rubric scores are the reference for the KL, on-policy RKL, judge, and chat-turn axes.
  source_identifier: Qwen/Qwen3.5-4B
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: Teacher generation cached once per epoch; KL computed over shared top-128 support. A teacher-sanity
    gate drops axes where the teacher itself scores below TEACHER_SANITY_FLOOR.
- kind: deterministic_dataset
  description: Per-round benchmark items generated procedurally from the chain block seed (math/aime/code/mbpp/tool_use/long_context/robustness),
    graded against fresh (params, gold) pairs that exist nowhere on disk.
  source_identifier: pod_eval_vllm.py procedural generators (block_seed)
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: Public datasets (GSM8K/MATH-500/HumanEval/MBPP/BBH/MMLU-Pro/IFEval/AIME/ ARC/TruthfulQA) named
    in code history but validator grades against block-seeded procedural items, not the static pools (v27+).
- kind: reference_model
  description: Undistilled base/reference model at REFERENCE_UID = -1, run through the same bench probes;
    axes where the reference scores pass_frac == 0 are treated as eval-setup-broken and dropped from the
    worst() gate.
  source_identifier: Qwen/Qwen3.5-4B (UID -1)
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: REFERENCE_BROKEN_BENCH_FLOOR = 0.0.
aggregation:
  method: winner_take_all
  composition: hybrid
  normalization: none
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: false
    address_or_uid: null
    fraction: null
    dynamic: false
    notes: No burn UID/fraction in scoring or weight-setting code.
  notes: 'Per student, the composite emits two aggregations: worst = min over present (non-broken) axes
    (anti-gaming rule); weighted = convex combination with AXIS_WEIGHTS over present axes (total renormalized
    over surviving axes). King selection sorts candidates by (worst desc, weighted desc, prior_bonus,
    uid). The selected king receives ALL validator weight (one-hot), so the network-level allocation is
    winner_take_all even though per-miner scoring is a hybrid worst/weighted composite. A challenger must
    beat the prior king by SINGLE_EVAL_DETHRONE_MARGIN (default 0.03) on worst or weighted to dethrone.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: per_epoch
  method: 'build_winner_take_all_weights(n_uids, winner_uid): a one-hot vector with weights[winner_uid]
    = 1.0, everyone else 0.0, then subtensor.set_weights.'
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: 360 blocks
  smoothing:
    kind: none
    alpha: null
    window: null
    notes: 'No EMA: "No EMA - models are permanently committed, scores converge naturally" (eval/scoring.py
      module docstring).'
anti_gaming:
- kind: deduplication
  enforcement: rejection
  description: Weight-hash and content-hash duplicate detection (check_duplicate_hash, check_duplicate_content_hash,
    compute_content_hash). The earlier on-chain commitment owns an identical weight hash; re-sharded copies
    caught via content hashing. Activation-fingerprint cosine similarity >= ACTIVATION_COPY_THRESHOLD
    flags COPY.
- kind: code_inspection
  enforcement: rejection
  description: 'Prechecks before GPU eval: architecture compliance, tokenizer compatibility, public-revision
    integrity, safetensors availability, and rejection of quantized formats (GPTQ/AWQ/GGUF/FP8). DQ reasons:
    COPY / REMOVED / INVALID / EVAL_ERROR, scoped per hotkey+commit_block.'
- kind: data_augmentation
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Prompt sets are block-seeded and not known before evaluation; bench items are generated
    fresh per round from block_seed and benchmark prompts are paraphrased / MC-options shuffled per round
    so canonical-wording lookups cannot saturate an axis.
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: barrier
  description: 'Multi-axis composite worst-case rule: a model that games one axis (e.g. low KL) but fails
    a core capability/generation-discipline axis is floored by min over axes, preventing single-axis Goodhart
    wins. Pareto majority dominance gate also blocks a challenger that wins KL but loses a majority of
    axes (PARETO_DOMINANCE_GATE).'
- kind: commit_reveal
  enforcement: barrier
  description: 'Private prompt holdout (axis A7) uses a sha256 commit-reveal: the commit root is published
    before eval and per-prompt hashes after, so auditors can verify the validator did not retro-fit the
    holdout to results.'
sub_competitions:
  structure: single
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: Single king-of-the-hill competition; one king holds all weight. KL is one axis, not a separate
    sub-competition.
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - status_enum
  - cumulative_score
  - reputation
  status_values:
  - king
  - queued
  - tested
  - stale
  - untested
  - disqualified
  reset_policy: Disqualification is per hotkey + commit_block; a miner re-registering on a new hotkey
    (or committing a new model) gets a fresh chance. Failure counts reset on a successful eval (reset_failures);
    a UID with >= max_failures (default 3) is treated as stale.
  notes: 'Persisted to disk: scores.json (KL), composite_scores.json, cumulative_scores.json, disqualified.json,
    failures.json, score_history. King regression streak tracked per king_uid.'
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - README.md

docs.title: SubQuery Hermes Subnet
docs.text:
Subnet SN-Hermes__hermes-subnet netuid None Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status mixed Task Miners run a decentralized GraphQL query / blockchain-data-indexing agent. A validator poses synthetic numerical questions about project schemas (counts, sums, averages) and also forwards organic user requests; the miner returns a numerical answer. Rewards combine factual accuracy of the answer agai DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: LlmJudgment"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: Deduplication, RateLimit, LivenessCheck"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: llm_judgment"]
  M1["Metric: latency"]
  M2["Metric: composite"]
  AGG["aggregate: WeightedAverage"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2
  GT --> M2
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  AGG --> SM
  SM --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: subQueryHermesSubnet

    netuid: -
    lang: python
    status: mixed
    submission: api_response

    @burn {
        uid: "burn_uid (env BURN_UID, default 0)"
        fraction: dynamic
    }
    @guards {
        Deduplication {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        RateLimit {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        LivenessCheck {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score, performance_ledger }

    Multiplex<per_task_type> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: llm_judgment
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: latency
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: min_max
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: LlmJudgment {
            trust_model: oracle
        }
        aggregate: WeightedAverage {
            composition: hybrid
            normalization: sum_to_one
        }
        smooth: Ema {
            alpha: 0.5
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: rate_limited
            tempo: "SET_WEIGHT_INTERVAL env, default 1800 seconds (30 min)"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: per_task_type
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: mixed
mechanism_status_notes: 'The documented dual-scoring mechanism (synthetic fact-score x latency weight,
  plus organic workload score, smoothed via overall EMA) is fully implemented in code. However the live
  weight-setting path has several burn fallbacks: a remote-config burn_ratio (default 0, but can be raised
  to 1.0 for full burn), an all-zero-scores burn to burn_uid, and a guard that burns to burn_uid after
  5 consecutive unchanged rounds. Whether the subnet currently scores or burns depends on the runtime
  meta-config, which is not in the repo.'
subnet:
  name: SubQuery Hermes Subnet
  owner_repo: SN-Hermes__hermes-subnet
  netuid: null
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners run a decentralized GraphQL query / blockchain-data-indexing agent. A validator poses
    synthetic numerical questions about project schemas (counts, sums, averages) and also forwards organic
    user requests; the miner returns a numerical answer. Rewards combine factual accuracy of the answer
    against a validator-generated ground truth, scaled by response latency, plus an organic-workload quality/quantity
    term.
  submission_format:
  - api_response
scoring_signals:
- name: factual_accuracy_score
  metric_kind: llm_judgment
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: '"Fact score" produced by a strict fact-checking LLM prompt comparing the miner response to the
    validator''s ground truth, on a 0-10 scale; clamped to max 10.0 in code. Multiplicative with the latency
    weight (zip_scores = fact_score * elapse_weight), so weight is not additive.'
- name: latency_weight
  metric_kind: latency
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: Quadratic weight w = 1 / (1 + elapsed_time/ground_truth_cost)^2, in [0,1]. Returns 0 if the miner
    is not at least min_latency_improvement_ratio (default 0.2) faster than ground-truth cost. Multiplies
    the fact score (gating/multiplicative, not additive).
- name: organic_workload_score
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: min_max
  notes: Per-miner organic score = min(0.5 * quality_ema + 0.5 * normalized_workload, 5). quality_ema
    is an EMA (alpha=0.7) over up to 20 sampled organic fact*latency scores; normalized_workload is min-max
    over miners of a 3-hour windowed completion count. Summed in as an extra row of the score matrix alongside
    synthetic project scores.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: llm_judgment
  description: Validator generates the ground-truth numerical answer with its own GraphQL agent (generate_ground_truth),
    then a separate scoring LLM grades the miner response against it.
  source_identifier: hermes/validator/challenge_manager.py:generate_ground_truth ; scorer_manager.cal_ground_truth_score
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: Default models google/gemini-3-flash-preview for both synthetic generation and scoring; scoring
    LLM temperature 0. Project schemas pulled from SubQuery / IPFS.
aggregation:
  method: weighted_average
  composition: hybrid
  normalization: sum_to_one
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: burn_uid (env BURN_UID, default 0)
    fraction: null
    dynamic: true
    notes: burn_ratio from remote meta-config (default 0). If burn_ratio >= 1.0 or all scores are zero,
      all weight goes to burn_uid (=1.0). For 0 < burn_ratio < 1.0, burn_weight = scores_sum * burn_ratio
      / (1 - burn_ratio) is assigned to burn_uid. Also burns to burn_uid after 5 consecutive unchanged
      rounds.
  notes: 'Per-signal: fact_score * latency_weight is multiplicative; project scores are summed across
    projects (matrix sum axis=0); workload score is summed in as an extra row; final per-miner score is
    then EMA-smoothed (overall EMA alpha default 0.5). On-chain normalization via bt.utils.weight_utils.process_weights_for_netuid
    (sum-to-one).'
weight_setting:
  cadence: rate_limited
  method: Final per-miner overall-EMA scores sorted by uid become raw weights; burn logic applied; process_weights_for_netuid
    normalizes; subtensor.set_weights submitted with version_key 10010. Also force-submits near epoch
    boundary (epoch-guard) within a buffer of blocks.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: SET_WEIGHT_INTERVAL env, default 1800 seconds (30 min)
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: 0.5
    window: null
    notes: overall_ema = EMAUpdater(alpha=0.5); synthetic_ema also alpha=0.5. Alpha overridable via remote
      ema_score_alpha (default 0.5). Quality EMA inside workload uses alpha=0.7 (separate). Note docs/incentive.md
      states overall/synthetic alpha 0.7 but the code constructs both with alpha=0.5.
anti_gaming:
- kind: deduplication
  enforcement: penalty
  description: 'Multi-coldkey penalty: miners sharing a coldkey beyond the first uid have zip_scores multiplied
    by multi_coldkey_penalty (remote default 1, i.e. no-op unless configured).'
- kind: rate_limit
  enforcement: rejection
  description: Duplicate-IP miners get DUPLICATED_IP error and are not scored; suspicious_uids (remote
    config) are zeroed in EMA and rejected during scoring.
- kind: liveness_check
  enforcement: rejection
  description: Periodic CapacitySynapse availability check; only miners reporting role 'miner' with capacity
    are queried. Latency gate (min_latency_improvement_ratio) zeros slow responses.
sub_competitions:
  structure: per_task_type
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: Per-project (cid_hash) synthetic challenges scored and summed across projects; an extra organic
    workload track is merged in. CODEX node_type uses weight_a=100/weight_b=0 question mix vs default
    70/30. Projects have phases (e.g. WARMUP excluded from score matrix).
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  - performance_ledger
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: EMA scores reset to current value when a uid's hotkey changes; suspicious uids zeroed.
    Persisted state (score/workload) only loaded if within 3 days.
  notes: overall/synthetic EMA score dicts persisted to .data/{role}_score_state.pt; organic workload
    bucket counters persisted to .data/{role}_workload_state.pt; quality-sample deque (maxlen 20) per
    miner.
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - docs/incentive.md
  - README.md
  - docs/validator.md
  completeness: high
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract (Claude Opus 4.8)
  confidence_overall: high
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/implementation_lang
    source_path: hermes/validator/scorer_manager.py
    line_ref: 1-12
    quote: 'import asyncio

      import json

      import os ... import numpy as np

      import torch'
  - claim_field: /task/summary
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '38'
    quote: SubQuery Hermes Subnet is a specialized Bittensor subnet that creates a decentralized infrastructure
      for GraphQL query processing and blockchain data indexing.
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/notes
    source_path: hermes/validator/scorer_manager.py
    line_ref: '91'
    quote: ground_truth_scores = [min(utils.fix_float(utils.safe_float_convert(s)), 10.0) for s in ground_truth_scores_value]
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/metric_kind
    source_path: docs/incentive.md
    line_ref: 18-19
    quote: Miner responses are evaluated using a strict fact-checking LLM prompt ... The scoring prompt
      evaluates factual consistency on a 0-10 scale with one decimal place precision
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/1/notes
    source_path: common/utils.py
    line_ref: 200-203
    quote: "time_ratio = elapsed_time / ground_truth_cost\n    weight = 1.0 / ((1.0 + time_ratio) ** 2)\n\
      \    return min(1.0, max(0.0, weight))"
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/1/notes
    source_path: common/utils.py
    line_ref: 195-198
    quote: "max_allowed_time = ground_truth_cost * (1.0 - min_latency_improvement_ratio)\n    if elapsed_time\
      \ > max_allowed_time:\n        return 0.0"
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/2/notes
    source_path: hermes/validator/workload_manager.py
    line_ref: '201'
    quote: scores[idx] = utils.fix_float(min(0.5 * quality_ema + 0.5 * normalized_workload, 5))
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/2/normalization
    source_path: hermes/validator/workload_manager.py
    line_ref: '199'
    quote: normalized_workload = (quantity - min_workload) / (max_workload - min_workload)
  - claim_field: /aggregation/composition
    source_path: hermes/validator/scorer_manager.py
    line_ref: '92'
    quote: zip_scores = [utils.fix_float(s * w) for s, w in zip(ground_truth_scores, elapse_weights)]
  - claim_field: /aggregation/notes
    source_path: hermes/validator/scorer_manager.py
    line_ref: '217'
    quote: synthetic_scores = np.array(project_score_matrix).sum(axis=0).tolist()
  - claim_field: /aggregation/notes
    source_path: hermes/validator/scorer_manager.py
    line_ref: 221-226
    quote: "merged = project_score_matrix + [workload_score]\n ... score_matrix = np.array(merged)\n \
      \       score_matrix = score_matrix.sum(axis=0)"
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/smoothing/alpha
    source_path: hermes/validator/scorer_manager.py
    line_ref: 29-30
    quote: "self.overall_ema = EMAUpdater(alpha=0.5)\n        self.synthetic_ema = EMAUpdater(alpha=0.5)"
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/smoothing/notes
    source_path: hermes/validator/ema.py
    line_ref: '42'
    quote: new_scores[uid] = (utils.fix_float((1 - alpha) * last_val + alpha * cur_val), cur_hk)
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/on_chain_call
    source_path: hermes/validator/challenge_manager.py
    line_ref: 866-873
    quote: "[suc, msg] = self.settings.subtensor.set_weights(\n            wallet=self.settings.wallet,\n\
      \            netuid=self.settings.netuid,\n            uids=processed_weight_uids,\n           \
      \ weights=processed_weights,\n            wait_for_finalization=False,\n            version_key=10010,\n\
      \        )"
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/tempo_or_interval
    source_path: hermes/validator/challenge_manager.py
    line_ref: '164'
    quote: 'self.set_weight_interval = int(os.getenv("SET_WEIGHT_INTERVAL", 60 * 30))  # seconds'
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/method

docs.title: SN98 ForeverMoney
docs.text:
Subnet SN98-ForeverMoney__forever-money netuid 98 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status mixed Task Miners optimize Uniswap V3 / Aerodrome liquidity provision by responding to RebalanceQuery requests from validators with desired positions (rebalance or keep current). Validators evaluate each miner's strategy through forward simulations (backtests) and score by net PnL vs HODL (relative return) wit DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: MarketData"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: LivenessCheck, StakeWeighting, DeterministicCheck"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: pnl"]
  M1["Metric: risk_adjusted_ratio"]
  M2["Metric: engagement"]
  AGG["aggregate: Proportional"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2
  GT --> M2
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  AGG --> SM
  SM --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: sn98ForeverMoney

    netuid: 98
    lang: python
    status: mixed
    submission: signals

    @burn {
        uid: "0"
        fraction: dynamic
    }
    @guards {
        LivenessCheck {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        StakeWeighting {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
    }
    @state { reputation, cumulative_score, status_enum, registration_age }

    Multiplex<multi_asset> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: pnl
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: risk_adjusted_ratio
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: engagement
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: min_max
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: MarketData {
            trust_model: oracle
        }
        aggregate: Proportional {
            composition: hybrid
            normalization: sum_to_one
        }
        smooth: Ema {}
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: rate_limited
            tempo: "1200 seconds"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: multi_asset
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: mixed
mechanism_status_notes: 'Live weight-setting is revenue-gated burn: if vault revenue <= 0 (or fetch fails)
  100% of emissions go to UID 0 (burn). When revenue > 0 the miner share grows with revenue up to profit_ratio
  (default 1.0) and is distributed proportionally to the per-job top miners'' combined_score. The documented
  PnL-vs-HODL scoring is active but only feeds the miner-distribution branch, which is fully burned whenever
  revenue is non-positive.'
subnet:
  name: SN98 ForeverMoney
  owner_repo: SN98-ForeverMoney__forever-money
  netuid: 98
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners optimize Uniswap V3 / Aerodrome liquidity provision by responding to RebalanceQuery
    requests from validators with desired positions (rebalance or keep current). Validators evaluate each
    miner's strategy through forward simulations (backtests) and score by net PnL vs HODL (relative return)
    with an exponential impermanent-loss penalty. The single top miner per job earns emissions weight,
    gated by a revenue-driven burn split.
  submission_format:
  - signals
scoring_signals:
- name: net_return_vs_hodl
  metric_kind: pnl
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: none
  notes: return_pct = (final_value - initial_value) / initial_value, clamped to [-10, 10]. This raw relative
    return is the primary signal; no scaling beyond the clamp.
- name: impermanent_loss_penalty
  metric_kind: risk_adjusted_ratio
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: Multiplicative penalty = exp(-loss_penalty_multiplier * loss_ratio) with loss_penalty_multiplier
    default 10.0; loss_ratio prefers impermanent_loss else token-delta. Applied multiplicatively to return
    when gaining, dividing when losing.
- name: in_range_ratio_bonus
  metric_kind: engagement
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: min_max
  notes: Optional time-in-range bonus when in_range_ratio present; multiplies score by (1 - 0.08) + 0.08
    * r with r clamped to [0,1]. DEFAULT_IN_RANGE_WEIGHT = 0.08.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: market_data
  description: Forward simulation / backtest of the proposed liquidity positions against current blockchain
    state, yielding initial_value/final_value, impermanent_loss and in_range_ratio metrics. Live revenue
    measured from on-chain vault fees.
  source_identifier: Backtester metrics; on-chain CollectEvent vault fees (Base L2)
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: Vault revenue in USD computed from fee0/fee1 priced via CoinGecko/PriceService; lookback_days=1
    for the emissions split.
aggregation:
  method: proportional
  composition: hybrid
  normalization: sum_to_one
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '0'
    fraction: null
    dynamic: true
    notes: burn_ratio = 1 - miner_ratio, where miner_ratio = min(profit_ratio, revenue_alpha / total_emission_alpha).
      100% burn when revenue_usd <= 0, total emissions == 0, no miner scores, or emissions calc fails.
      profit_ratio default 1.0 (PROFIT_RATIO env), clamped to [0,1].
  notes: Per-job top miner (by combined_score) is selected; a miner's aggregate score is the sum of combined_scores
    over jobs it tops. Miner_ratio is distributed proportionally to normalized_score = score/total_score.
    Final weights normalized to sum to 1.0.
weight_setting:
  cadence: rate_limited
  method: monitor_and_set_weights loop calls EmissionsService.set_weights_on_chain every 1200s (20 min).
    Aggregates per-job top-miner combined_scores, computes revenue-gated burn split, distributes miner_ratio
    proportional to score, assigns burn_ratio to UID 0, then calls subtensor.set_weights.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: 1200 seconds
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: null
    window: null
    notes: 'EMA applied to the stored per-job reputation scores (not the final on-chain weight): evaluation_score
      new = old*0.9 + latest*0.1; live_score new = old*0.7 + latest*0.3; combined_score = eval*0.6 + live*0.4.'
anti_gaming:
- kind: liveness_check
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Live-execution eligibility requires participation on >= MINER_ELIGIBILITY_DAYS distinct
    days (default 7) where rounds_participated > rounds_refused, OR the hotkey being whitelisted. Only
    eligible miners with combined_score > 0 are ranked for weight.
- kind: stake_weighting
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Only the single top miner per job (by combined_score) receives non-zero weight; validator
    excludes its own UID and reserves UID 0 for burn.
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: penalty
  description: 'Hotkey replacement detection: on metagraph resync, any uid whose hotkey changed is zeroed
    out (zero_out_miner), removing its accumulated DB scores.'
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_asset
  stages:
  - name: Evaluation rounds
    role: qualifier
    advancement_rule: participate >= MINER_ELIGIBILITY_DAYS (default 7) distinct days, combined_score
      > 0
  - name: Live rounds
    role: main
    advancement_rule: is_eligible_for_live and per-job top combined_score
  count: null
  notes: 'Jobs-based architecture: multiple liquidity pools/pairs managed concurrently, each a separate
    per-pair competition with its own MinerScore reputation. Dual-mode evaluation + live rounds per job.'
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - reputation
  - cumulative_score
  - status_enum
  - registration_age
  status_values:
  - is_eligible_for_live (bool)
  reset_policy: Per-job MinerScore zeroed (zero_out_miner) when the uid's hotkey is replaced on the metagraph.
    Otherwise EMA-decayed continuously.
  notes: Per (job, miner_uid) MinerScore tracks evaluation_score, live_score, combined_score (EMA), total_evaluations,
    successful_evaluations, refusals, total_live_rounds, successful_live_rounds, participation_days, is_eligible_for_live.
    MinerParticipation tracks daily rounds_participated/rounds_refused.
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - MINER_GUIDE.md
  - ARCHITECTURE.md
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract (Claude Opus 4.8)
  confidence_overall: high
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: validator/utils/env.py
    line_ref: 58-62
    quote: NETUID = get_env_variable(\n    name="NETUID",\n    type_=int,\n    default=98,\n)
  - claim_field: /subnet/implementation_lang
    source_path: validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 1-2
    quote: '"""\nMain entry point for SN98 Validator (Jobs-Based Architecture).'
  - claim_field: /task/summary

    quote: SN98 ForeverMoney is a Bittensor subnet that optimizes Uniswap V3 / Aerodrome liquidity provision
      through competitive AI strategies. Miners propose dynamic rebalancing decisions, validators evaluate
      performance through forward simulations
  - claim_field: /task/submission_format
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '84'

      desired positions (rebalance or keep current).
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/notes

    line_ref: 80-81
    quote: return_pct = (final_value - initial_value) / initial_value\n        return_pct = max(-10.0,
      min(10.0, return_pct))
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/1/notes

    quote: 'DEFAULT_LOSS_PENALTY = 10.0 ... penalty = math.exp(-loss_penalty_multiplier * loss_ratio)

      * r
  - claim_field: /ground_truth_sources/0/description

  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/notes

    line_ref: 112-117
    quote: miner_ratio = min(\n                self.profit_ratio,\n                revenue_alpha / total_emission_alpha,\n            )
      ... burn_ratio = 1.0 - miner_ratio
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/enabled

    quote: 'if revenue_usd <= 0: ... return 1.0, 0.0 ... weights[i] = burn_ratio'
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/address_or_uid

      = burn_ratio'
  - claim_field: /aggregation/notes

    quote: normalized_score = score / total_score\n                        weights[uid_index] = normalized_score
      * miner_ratio
  - claim_field: /aggregation/method

  - claim_field: /aggregation/normalization

docs.title: SoulX - The Sentient NPC Protocol
docs.text:
Subnet SentiVerse-AI__soulx netuid 115 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status mixed Task Miners run an LLM (Qwen-based) that, given a validator-issued "micro-quest" (scene description, character card, player intent), generates in-character NPC dialogue. README claims responses are judged on Consistency, Memory, Creativity and Goal-Driven behavior, but the implemented validator only scor DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: OrganicTraffic"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: StakeWeighting, LivenessCheck"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: accuracy"]
  M1["Metric: latency"]
  M2["Metric: throughput"]
  M3["Metric: other"]
  M4["Metric: composite"]
  AGG["aggregate: WeightedAverage"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2
  GT --> M2
  G --> M3
  GT --> M3
  G --> M4
  GT --> M4
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  M3 --> AGG
  M4 --> AGG
  AGG --> SM
  SM --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: soulXTheSentientNpcProtocol

    netuid: 115
    lang: python
    status: mixed
    submission: api_response

    @burn {
        uid: "subnet_owner_uid"
        fraction: dynamic
    }
    @guards {
        StakeWeighting {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        LivenessCheck {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
    }
    @state { performance_ledger, cumulative_score }

    Multiplex<per_task_type> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: accuracy
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: latency
                direction: lower_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: throughput
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: other
                family: content_quality
                specific: length_penalty
                raw: "response_length_and_greeting_keyword"
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: OrganicTraffic {
            trust_model: unknown
        }
        aggregate: WeightedAverage {
            composition: weighted_sum
            normalization: sum_to_one
            min_weight_floor: 0.001
        }
        smooth: Ema {
            alpha: 0.3
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: per_epoch
            tempo: "tempo * 1/2"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: per_task_type
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: mixed
mechanism_status_notes: 'Documented scoring (README: Consistency/Memory/Creativity/Goal-Driven NPC quality)
  is not implemented. The live validator scores miners purely on throughput/latency, status codes, and
  a trivial keyword check, then in set_weights() OVERWRITES any composite final_score < 0.8 or > 1.0 with
  random.uniform(0.8, 1.0) — so the on-chain weights are largely randomized rather than quality-derived.
  A burn-to-owner fallback routes weight to the subnet owner when all miner weights fall below threshold.'
subnet:
  name: SoulX - The Sentient NPC Protocol
  owner_repo: SentiVerse-AI__soulx
  netuid: 115
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners run an LLM (Qwen-based) that, given a validator-issued "micro-quest" (scene description,
    character card, player intent), generates in-character NPC dialogue. README claims responses are judged
    on Consistency, Memory, Creativity and Goal-Driven behavior, but the implemented validator only scores
    API success, response time, work/throughput throughput metrics and a content-length / greeting-keyword
    heuristic.
  submission_format:
  - api_response
scoring_signals:
- name: api_success_and_status
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: 'Gate/multiplier: non-success or status_code != 200 yields base_score 0.0; status_code multipliers
    applied in _apply_quality_adjustments (400->0.3, 429->0.2, 500->0.1, other->0.5, 200->1.0).'
- name: response_time
  metric_kind: latency
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: response_time > 30s caps base_score at 0.1; per-task-type bonuses for faster responses (e.g.
    image <10s -> +0.2). Also feeds a 1/(1+response_time) factor in core/scoring.py.
- name: throughput_metric
  metric_kind: throughput
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: metric = volume / response_time (work units per second) and stream_metric = num_tokens / stream_time.
    Bonuses applied at thresholds (e.g. metric>100 -> +0.2) and a performance_factor = min(metric/100,
    1.0) multiplier.
- name: content_heuristic
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: response_length_and_greeting_keyword
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: 'For chat tasks: +0.2 if response content length > 10 chars; +0.1 if content contains "hello"
    or "hi". No semantic/quality evaluation of NPC dialogue.'
- name: quality_score_composite
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.7
  normalization: none
  notes: Per-cycle mean of per-result quality_scores. Combined in set_weights as stake_weight + current_quality_score*0.7
    + historical_score*0.1.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: organic_traffic
  description: Validators distribute tasks (micro-quests) to miners via a task queue / config server and
    score the returned API responses. No deterministic reference output or external oracle is used; scoring
    is heuristic on the response envelope.
  source_identifier: ''
  trust_model: unknown
  notes: README describes validators as "Game Masters" issuing quests; implemented scoring does not compare
    against any ground-truth dialogue.
aggregation:
  method: weighted_average
  composition: weighted_sum
  normalization: sum_to_one
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: 0.001
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: subnet_owner_uid
    fraction: null
    dynamic: true
    notes: When no miner has positive weight (or all weights fall below MIN_WEIGHT_THRESHOLD 0.001), set_weights
      routes weight to the subnet owner uid using config.owner_default_score (OWNER_DEFAULT_SCORE = 0.2).
  notes: 'Per-miner final_score = stake/total_stake*0.2 + current_quality_score*0.7 + historical_score*0.1.
    CRITICAL: if final_score < FINAL_MIN_SCORE (0.8) or > 1.0 it is replaced by random.uniform(0.8, 1.0).
    Weights below MIN_WEIGHT_THRESHOLD (0.001) zeroed, then normalized to sum to one.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: per_epoch
  method: set_weights() called when blocks_since_last_update >= weights_interval (tempo * 1/2). Builds
    per-miner composite scores, applies random replacement for out-of-range scores, zeroes sub-threshold
    weights, normalizes, then calls subtensor.set_weights.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: tempo * 1/2
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: 0.3
    window: null
    notes: 'historical_scores updated in ScoringResultsManager._start_new_cycle: historical = alpha*current
      + (1-alpha)*historical with alpha=0.3. Validator also sets self.alpha = 0.95 used as a fallback
      historical_score default in set_weights.'
anti_gaming:
- kind: stake_weighting
  enforcement: barrier
  description: stake_weight = (stake/total_stake)*0.2 contributes to the composite; minimum stake gates
    exist (MIN_VALIDATOR_STAKE_DTAO=1000, MIN_MINER_STAKE_DTAO=50).
- kind: liveness_check
  enforcement: rejection
  description: Nodes with axon ip '0.0.0.0' are skipped; optional CHECK_NODE_ACTIVE skips inactive neurons.
sub_competitions:
  structure: per_task_type
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: 'Scoring branches by task prefix: chat-, text-to-image, image-to-image, avatar, and a generic
    fallback, each with its own response-time/throughput thresholds.'
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - performance_ledger
  - cumulative_score
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: Per-result scoring results kept per hotkey; _start_new_cycle prunes results older than
    24h and folds them into an EMA historical_score. clear_current_cycle_scores wipes both current and
    historical dicts after a successful set_weights.
  notes: ScoringResultsManager holds scoring_results (hotkey -> [ScoringResult]) and historical_scores
    (hotkey -> float). core/scoring.py ScoringSystem keeps a separate performance_history capped at 1000
    entries with exponential-weighted averaging.
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - docs/running_validator.md
  - docs/running_miner.md
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract / claude-opus-4-8[1m]
  confidence_overall: medium
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '1'
    quote: SoulX - The Sentient NPC Protocol (Subnet 115)
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: soulx/core/constants.py
    line_ref: '57'
    quote: PROD_NETUID = 115
  - claim_field: /subnet/implementation_lang
    source_path: soulx/validator/soulx_validator.py
    line_ref: '13'
    quote: import bittensor as bt
  - claim_field: /task/summary
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: 76-80
    quote: Validators design and distribute "micro-quests" to the miner network. Each quest contains a
      `[Scene Description]`, a `[Character Card]`, and a `[Player Intent]`
  - claim_field: /mechanism_status
    source_path: soulx/validator/soulx_validator.py
    line_ref: 807-808
    quote: "if final_score < FINAL_MIN_SCORE or final_score> 1.0 :\n                    final_score =\
      \ round(random.uniform(0.8, 1.0), 2)"
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/notes
    source_path: soulx/validator/scoring_system.py
    line_ref: 268-277
    quote: "if result.status_code == 200:\n            adjusted_score *= 1.0\n        elif result.status_code\
      \ == 400:\n            adjusted_score *= 0.3\n        elif result.status_code == 429:\n        \
      \    adjusted_score *= 0.2\n        elif result.status_code == 500:\n            adjusted_score\
      \ *= 0.1"
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/1/notes
    source_path: soulx/validator/scoring_system.py
    line_ref: 95-96
    quote: "if result.response_time and result.response_time > 30:\n            return 0.1"
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/2/notes
    source_path: soulx/validator/scoring_system.py
    line_ref: 48-49
    quote: "metric = volume / result.response_time if result.response_time else 0\n            stream_metric\
      \ = num_tokens / result.stream_time if result.stream_time else 0"
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/2/notes
    source_path: soulx/validator/scoring_system.py

      \ *= (0.8 + 0.2 * performance_factor)"
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/3/notes
    source_path: soulx/validator/scoring_system.py
    line_ref: 174-180
    quote: "if response_length > 10:\n                    score += 0.2\n\n                lowered = content.lower()\n\
      \                if any(keyword in lowered for keyword in [\"hello\", \"hi\"]):\n              \
      \      score += 0.1"
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/4/weight
    source_path: soulx/validator/soulx_validator.py
    line_ref: 801-805
    quote: "final_score = (\n                    stake_weight +\n                    current_quality_score\
      \ * 0.7 +\n                    historical_score * 0.1\n                )"
  - claim_field: /aggregation/notes
    source_path: soulx/validator/soulx_validator.py
    line_ref: '799'
    quote: stake_weight = (stake / total_stake) * 0.2 if total_stake > 0 else 0
  - claim_field: /aggregation/min_weight_floor

    line_ref: 831-833
    quote: "MIN_WEIGHT_THRESHOLD = 0.001  # 0.1%\n\n                    weights = [w if w >= MIN_WEIGHT_THRESHOLD\

  - claim_field: /aggregation/normalization
    source_path: soulx/validator/soulx_validator.py
    line_ref: 836-837

  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/notes
    source_path: soulx/validator/soulx_validator.py
    line_ref: 839-843
    quote: "owner_uid = self.get_subnet_owner_uid()\n                        if owner_uid is not None:\n\
      \                            weights = [0.0] * len(self.metagraph.hotkeys)\n\n                 \
      \           weights[owner_uid] =  self.config_manager.get_config().owner_default_score"
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/notes

      \ :\n                            success, msg = self.set_weights()"
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/smoothing/alpha
    source_path: soulx/validator/scoring_results_manager.py

  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/0/description

    quote: 'MIN_VALIDATOR_STAKE_DTAO = float(os.getenv("MIN_VALIDATOR_STAKE_DTAO", "1000.0"))  # 验证者最低质押要求，默认1000
      dtao

      MIN_MINER_STAKE_DTAO = float(os.getenv("MIN_MINER_STAKE_DTAO", "50.0"))'
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/1/description
    source_path: soulx/validator/soulx_validator.py
    line_ref: 783-784
    quote: "if CHECK_NODE_ACTIVE and not is_active:\n                        logging.debug(f\"Skipping\
      \ inactive node: {hotkey}\")"
  - claim_field: /sub_competitions/notes
    source_path: soulx/validator/scoring_system.py
    line_ref: 100-109
    quote: "if result.task.startswith(\"chat-\"):\n            base_score = await self._score_chat_task(result,\
      \ payload, metric, stream_metric)\n        elif result.task.startswith(\"text-to-image\"):"
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/reset_policy
    source_path: soulx/validator/scoring_results_manager.py
    line_ref: 69-74
    quote: "cutoff_time = datetime.now() - timedelta(hours=24)\n        for hotkey in list(self.scoring_results.keys()):\n\
      \            self.scoring_results[hotkey] = [\n                r for r in self.scoring_results[hotkey]\
      \ \n                if r.timestamp >= cutoff_time"
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/notes
    source_path: soulx/core/scoring.py
    line_ref: 27-28
    quote: "if len(self.performance_history[hotkey]) > 1000:\n            self.performance_history[hotkey]\
      \ = self.performance_history[hotkey][-1000:]"
  - claim_field: /documentation/status
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '80'
    quote: 'Our validation system evaluates responses across multiple dimensions: **Consistency, Memory,
      Creativity, and Goal-Driven** behavior.'
  unresolved:
  - Whether the random.uniform(0.8,1.0) replacement is intentional obfuscation or a placeholder; it makes
    on-chain weights largely independent of measured quality.
  - How tasks/payloads are generated and whether any organic vs synthetic distinction affects scoring
    (synthetic_query flag exists on ScoringResult but is unused in scoring).
  - Exact tempo value (weights_interval = tempo * 1/2) is read from chain at runtime; not a literal in
    source.
  - Documented NPC-quality dimensions (Consistency/Memory/Creativity/Goal-Driven) have no corresponding
    implementation in the scoring code.
composition:
  shape: multiplex
  overlays:

  - guards
  - state
  extern_count: 1

Subnet SocialTensor__SocialTensorSubnet netuid 23 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status partial_burn Task Miners commit to a model type (image-generation or text-generation category) and a generation volume, then serve generation requests. schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: partial_burn
mechanism_status_notes: As of the current code path (after 2025-04-01 16:00 UTC), the Burn pseudo-model
  receives 71% of incentive (model_incentive_weight 0.71), routed by setting weight 1.0 on the subnet
  owner coldkey's UID. The remaining ~29% is distributed across live scored categories (GoJourney 4%,
  FluxSchnell 10%, OpenGeneral 5%, OpenTraditionalArtSketch 5%, DeepSeek_R1_Distill_Llama_70B 5%). So
  a large fixed fraction is burned alongside live scoring.
subnet:
  name: NicheImage (SocialTensor)
  owner_repo: SocialTensor__SocialTensorSubnet
  netuid: 23
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners commit to a model type (image-generation or text-generation category) and a generation
    volume, then serve generation requests. Validators issue synthetic challenges (prompts/images) per
    model category and score each miner's response against a reference reproduction or quality metric.
    Categories include fixed image models (GoJourney, FluxSchnell), open image categories (OpenGeneral,
    OpenTraditionalArtSketch) scored by image quality + prompt adherence, and a text category (DeepSeek_R1_Distill_Llama_70B).
    Rewards are scaled by committed volume and penalized by processing time.
  submission_format:
  - api_response
  - content_link
scoring_signals:
- name: matching_result
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: none
  notes: 'For fixed/recreatable image categories, miner image is compared to the validator''s reproduction
    via ViT CLIP cosine similarity: reward 1.0 if similarity > threshold (0.9), (sim + (1-threshold))**3
    if sim > 0.4, else 0.0. README: matching_result is 0 or 1 based on similarity match. NSFW/black-image
    checks can yield -5 or 0.'
- name: t2i_open_category_score
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: none
  notes: Open category score = 0.5*prompt_adherence + 0.5*iqa. prompt_adherence from a binary VQA (MiniCPM-V)
    over a structured DSG question graph; iqa from pyiqa (nima-vgg16-ava) normalized to [0,1] over [3.5,
    7.0]. weights = {iqa:0.5, prompt_adherence:0.5}.
- name: gojourney_process_mode_reward
  metric_kind: reward
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: none
  notes: 'GoJourney reward from process_mode of the fetched Midjourney task: turbo=1.0, fast=0.5, relax=0.1;
    0 if task failed or prompt mismatch.'
- name: upscale_quality
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: none
  notes: Upscale pipeline scored by PSNR (threshold 30) and SSIM (threshold 0.9); 1.0 if both pass, 0.0
    if both fail, else penalty_factor 0.6 * (psnr_penalty+ssim_penalty)/2.
- name: time_penalty
  metric_kind: latency
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: 'Subtracted penalty: max_penalty(0.4) * process_time**1.5 / timeout**1.5, capped at 0.4. README:
    time_penalty = 0.4 * (processing_time / timeout)**3 (exponent differs from code which uses **1.5).'
- name: volume_scale
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: reward_scale = max(min(total_volume**0.5 / 256**0.5, 1), 0); final reward multiplied by (0.6
    + 0.4 * reward_scale). total_volume clipped to [40, 256].
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: reference_model
  description: Validator reproduces the challenge with the same generation model/seed and the miner output
    is matched against it via CLIP cosine similarity (fixed image categories) or PSNR/SSIM (upscale).
  source_identifier: vit_base_patch16_clip_384.laion2b_ft_in12k_in1k
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: CosineSimilarityReward model in services/rewarding/cosine_similarity_compare.py
- kind: llm_judgment
  description: Open-category prompt adherence judged by a binary VQA model (MiniCPM-V-2_6) over a structured
    question graph derived from the prompt; combined with a no-reference image quality metric (pyiqa nima-vgg16-ava).
  source_identifier: openbmb/MiniCPM-V-2_6 ; pyiqa nima-vgg16-ava
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: OpenCategoryReward in services/rewarding/open_category_reward.py
- kind: organic_traffic
  description: GoJourney rewards verified by fetching the Midjourney task status/input from an external
    API and comparing prompt and process_mode.
  source_identifier: https://api.midjourneyapi.xyz/mj/v2/fetch
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: fetch_GoJourney / get_reward_GoJourney
aggregation:
  method: weighted_average
  composition: hybrid
  normalization: sum_to_one
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: 5GvTa4JUKbUHqeJH8YLUDaV7jHChrfUy4n5zWrcCiU7bySoc
    fraction: 0.71
    dynamic: false
    notes: Burn pseudo-model has model_incentive_weight 0.71 (and temp_incentive_weight Burn 0.71 in the
      current/else branch). get_model_specific_weights sets weight 1.0 on the owner coldkey's UID for
      the Burn model, so 71% of incentive is routed to the owner (burned).
  notes: Per-model the validator averages each miner's last-10 scores (sum/10, clipped [0,1]), adds registration
    bonus, normalizes per model, multiplies by the model's incentive weight, and sums across models. Open-category
    models additionally blend rank (0.5*raw + 0.5*ranked, then 0.8 + 0.2*combined). Final weight vector
    L1-normalized in set_weights.
weight_setting:
  cadence: rate_limited
  method: update_scores_on_chain() builds a weight vector by summing per-model normalized weights scaled
    by model incentive weights; set_weights() L1-normalizes, runs process_weights_for_netuid, and calls
    subtensor.set_weights. Forward loop runs roughly every loop_base_time (600s) querying miners in batches.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: loop_base_time 600 seconds; epoch_length default 100 (12s blocks)
  smoothing:
    kind: sma
    alpha: null
    window: 10
    notes: Per-miner reward smoothed as a simple mean over the last 10 scores (scores kept as [-10:],
      get_model_specific_weights sums last 10 / 10). Stake_based model (now deprecated/0%) used an EMA
      with w=0.02. Recycle (now 0%) decayed as 0.9 ** days_since_registration.
anti_gaming:
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: rejection
  description: 'NSFW/black-image hash check: if validator image is non-black and miner returns a black
    image -> reward 0; if validator is black and miner is non-black -> reward -5. Uses imagehash average_hash.'
- kind: rate_limit
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Per-miner rate_limit / total_volume governs how many synthetic queries are issued; total_volume
    clipped to [40, 256]; ~80% of volume used for synthetic, ~20% proxy.
- kind: stake_weighting
  enforcement: barrier
  description: min_stake (default 10000) gating via get_volume_per_validator; deprecated Stake_based model
    scored miners by alpha_stake EMA + sigmoid of change.
- kind: data_augmentation
  enforcement: penalty
  description: Validator reuses/recreates challenge synapses with probabilities (80% reuse existing rewarded
    synapse, 10% reuse with new seed, 10% new) and random seeds/image sizes to deter precomputation.
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_mechanism
  stages: []
  count: 5
  notes: 'Multiple model categories each with its own reward_type and fixed incentive weight: GoJourney
    (custom_offline, 4%), FluxSchnell (image, 10%), OpenGeneral (open_category, 5%), OpenTraditionalArtSketch
    (open_category, 5%), DeepSeek_R1_Distill_Llama_70B (text, 5%); plus pseudo-models Recycle, Stake_based,
    Burn. count reflects the 5 live scored categories.'
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - performance_ledger
  - registration_age
  - cumulative_score
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: scores and process_time reset when a miner's reported model_name changes; scores kept
    to last 10, process_time to last 500 (reset on store). Recycle miners' scores set to 0.9**days_since_registration.
  notes: all_uids_info per UID tracks scores, process_time, model_name, total_volume, reward_scale, rate_limit,
    registration_time, ema_previous/staking_score (for deprecated Stake_based). Registration age drives
    a bonus of (10-day)/100 for day<10. State persisted via pickle to state.pkl.

docs.title: StoryNet Subnet
docs.text:
Subnet StorynetAI__storynet-subnet netuid 92 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status partial_burn Task Miners generate AI-powered interactive story content across a 4-stage pipeline (blueprint, characters, story_arc, chapters). The validator deterministically selects a task type by block, queries miners, then submits each miner's structured JSON output to an external scoring API which returns a 0-100 DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: LlmJudgment"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: PlagiarismDetection, StakeWeighting, RateLimit"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: composite"]
  M1["Metric: composite"]
  AGG["aggregate: WeightedAverage"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  AGG --> SM
  SM --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: storyNetSubnet

    netuid: 92
    lang: python
    status: partial_burn
    submission: api_response

    @burn {
        uid: "subnet_owner_uid (get_subnet_owner_hotkey)"
        fraction: dynamic
    }
    @guards {
        PlagiarismDetection {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        StakeWeighting {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        RateLimit {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score, performance_ledger, status_enum }

    Multiplex<per_task_type> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: ema
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: ema
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: LlmJudgment {
            trust_model: oracle
        }
        aggregate: WeightedAverage {
            composition: weighted_sum
            normalization: sum_to_one
            temperature: 2
            min_weight_floor: 0.001
        }
        smooth: Ema {
            alpha: 0.1
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: rate_limited
            tempo: "weights_rate_limit blocks (fallback 100)"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: per_task_type
            count: 4
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: partial_burn
mechanism_status_notes: The validator routes all miner scoring to an external API (api.storyai.art /score-miners/),
  not the local scoring/ modules. Weights apply a "burn UID" mechanism that diverts a dynamic owner_share
  (max(0.10, 0.50 - 0.01*num_miners)) of all weight to the subnet owner UID every weight-setting round,
  while the documented 100-point local scoring code (technical/structure/ content/narrative) is not invoked
  in the live validation path.
subnet:
  name: StoryNet Subnet
  owner_repo: StorynetAI__storynet-subnet
  netuid: 92
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners generate AI-powered interactive story content across a 4-stage pipeline (blueprint,
    characters, story_arc, chapters). The validator deterministically selects a task type by block, queries
    miners, then submits each miner's structured JSON output to an external scoring API which returns
    a 0-100 score per miner (with technical/structure/content/ narrative breakdown). EMA-smoothed scores
    drive weights.
  submission_format:
  - api_response
scoring_signals:
- name: api_quality_score
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.75
  normalization: ema
  notes: Per-miner score (0-100) returned by external API /score-miners/. Composite weight is 0.75 in
    calculate_weights (normalized_quality). Documented breakdown components (technical/structure/content/narrative)
    are computed server-side, not in this repo.
- name: historical_score
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.25
  normalization: ema
  notes: Average of stored per-miner historical scores (normalized to 0-1); contributes 0.25 of composite.
    Defaults to 0.5 when no history exists.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: llm_judgment
  description: External scoring API (api.storyai.art) returns per-miner scores with a breakdown of technical/structure/content/narrative.
    Narrative is described as AI-based subjective evaluation whose prompts are loaded server-side (not
    in repo).
  source_identifier: https://api.storyai.art/score-miners/
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: Scoring is off-repo; the documented local scoring modules describe the intended rubric but are
    not called by validator.py.
aggregation:
  method: weighted_average
  composition: weighted_sum
  normalization: sum_to_one
  temperature: 2.0
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: 0.001
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: subnet_owner_uid (get_subnet_owner_hotkey)
    fraction: null
    dynamic: true
    notes: owner_share = max(0.10, 0.50 - 0.01 * num_miners); miner weights scaled by (1 - owner_share)
      and remaining owner_share assigned to the subnet owner UID each round.
  notes: composite = 0.75 * normalized_quality + 0.25 * historical_score; incentives = composite ** temperature
    (2.0); normalized to sum 1.0; min_weight 0.001 applied then re-normalized; then burn-UID owner_share
    carve-out.
weight_setting:
  cadence: rate_limited
  method: set_weights called every weight_update_frequency steps (default 10), gated by an on-chain blocks-since-last
    rate limit (weights_rate_limit hyperparameter, fallback 100 blocks).
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: weights_rate_limit blocks (fallback 100)
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: 0.1
    window: null
    notes: EMA_ALPHA env default 0.1; scores[uid] = exponential_moving_average(score, scores[uid], ema_alpha)
      where EMA = alpha*new + (1-alpha)*old.
anti_gaming:
- kind: plagiarism_detection
  enforcement: penalty
  description: 'README: "Plagiarism Detection: Responses too similar to history are penalized" and "Originality
    Scoring". Implemented (if at all) server-side / in unused scoring modules, not in the live validator
    weight path.'
- kind: stake_weighting
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Blacklist set tracked in validator state for known bad-actor UIDs; model-quality policy
    (apply_model_quality_multiplier) can zero out blacklisted models. Not invoked in live run_step path.
- kind: rate_limit
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Weight submission is block-rate-limited via can_set_weights (weights_rate_limit, fallback
    100 blocks) to avoid excessive on-chain updates.
sub_competitions:
  structure: per_task_type
  stages:
  - name: blueprint
    role: main
  - name: characters
    role: main
  - name: story_arc
    role: main
  - name: chapters
    role: main
  count: 4
  notes: task_distribution = {blueprint:0.40, characters:0.25, story_arc:0.25, chapters:0.10}; one task
    type deterministically selected per block. Scores are pooled into a single EMA per miner, not separate
    weight pools.
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  - performance_ledger
  - status_enum
  status_values:
  - blacklisted
  reset_policy: State persisted to validator_state.json across restarts; history deques capped at maxlen
    100.
  notes: Per-miner EMA score (self.scores), score/timestamp history (deque maxlen 100), violation counts,
    and blacklist set are tracked and persisted.
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: Protocol v3.2.1
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - docs/VALIDATOR_SETUP_GUIDE.md
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract (Claude Opus 4.8)
  confidence_overall: medium
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: neurons/validator.py
    line_ref: '1047'
    quote: parser.add_argument("--netuid", type=int, default=92, help="Subnet netuid (StoryNet subnet
      ID)")
  - claim_field: /subnet/name
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '1'
    quote: '# StoryNet Subnet (SN92)'
