docs.title: Swap (formerly Sturdy Subnet)
docs.text:
Subnet Sturdy-Subnet__sturdy-subnet netuid 10 Archetype pipeline Language python Mechanism status partial_burn Task Miners provide liquidity to the TAO<>USDC Uniswap V3 pool on TaoFi by holding NFT LP positions. Each miner associates an EVM address on chain; the validator queries the TaoFi subgraph for the miner's positions and scores them by the Uniswap V3 liquidity value L of in-range positions (tighter ranges DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: MarketData"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: Deduplication, LivenessCheck, RateLimit"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: other"]
  AGG["aggregate: WeightedAverage"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  M0 --> AGG
  AGG --> SM
  SM --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: swapFormerlySturdySubnet

    netuid: 10
    lang: python
    status: partial_burn
    submission: signals

    @burn {
        uid: "201"
        fraction: 0.5
    }
    @guards {
        Deduplication {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        LivenessCheck {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        RateLimit {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score, status_enum }

    Pipeline {
        score: Metric {
            kind: other
            family: financial_pnl
            specific: liquidity_position
            raw: "liquidity_value_L_in_range"
            direction: higher_is_better
            normalization: min_max
        }
        groundTruth: MarketData {
            trust_model: oracle
        }
        aggregate: WeightedAverage {
            composition: weighted_sum
            normalization: min_max
        }
        smooth: Ema {
            alpha: 1
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: rate_limited
            tempo: "25"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: single
            count: 1
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: partial_burn
mechanism_status_notes: Scoring is live (Uniswap V3 LP concentration scoring against the TaoFi subgraph),
  but set_weights reserves a fixed 50% of total weight for the owner UID (MINER_EMISSIONS_BURN_PCT = 0.5),
  so half of emissions are effectively burned/redirected to the owner while the remaining half is distributed
  by liquidity score.
subnet:
  name: Swap (formerly Sturdy Subnet)
  owner_repo: Sturdy-Subnet__sturdy-subnet
  netuid: 10
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners provide liquidity to the TAO<>USDC Uniswap V3 pool on TaoFi by holding NFT LP positions.
    Each miner associates an EVM address on chain; the validator queries the TaoFi subgraph for the miner's
    positions and scores them by the Uniswap V3 liquidity value L of in-range positions (tighter ranges
    yield higher L for the same capital, rewarding concentration). Scores are summed per owner, normalized
    by the max, and EMA-folded into on-chain weights.
  submission_format:
  - signals
scoring_signals:
- name: lp_concentration_score
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: liquidity_value_L_in_range
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: min_max
  notes: 'For each in-range position the reward_score equals the Uniswap V3 liquidity value L (0 if the
    current pool tick is outside [tick_lower, tick_upper]). Per-miner scores are summed across their unclaimed
    positions, then all rewards are divided by the max score so the top miner is 1.0 (normalize: score
    / max_score). calculate_reward_score returns the liquidity value if in range, 0 otherwise.'
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: market_data
  description: 'TaoFi Uniswap V3 subgraph (GraphQL) providing on-chain LP positions at a given block:
    owner, liquidity L, tick range, and current pool tick. Positions are read from the chain via positionsAtBlock
    and matched to miners by their associated EVM address.'
  source_identifier: https://subgraph.taofi.com/graphql
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: Positions are queried at current_block - BLOCK_BUFFER (10 blocks) to tolerate subgraph lag. Owner
    addresses are checksummed and deduplicated so each owner's positions are claimed once.
aggregation:
  method: weighted_average
  composition: weighted_sum
  normalization: min_max
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '201'
    fraction: 0.5
    dynamic: false
    notes: MINER_EMISSIONS_BURN_PCT = 0.5; set_weights reserves 50% of total weight for OWNER_UID (201)
      and rescales the remaining miner weights by (1 - burn_pct) / other_weight_sum.
  notes: Per-miner reward = sum of in-range liquidity scores of its positions, normalized by the max miner
    score. rewards are scaled by MINER_GROUP_EMISSIONS["UNISWAP_V3_LP"] = 1 (LP miners get 100% of the
    miner share). Final raw weights for set_weights are L1-normalized from the EMA scores (normalize_numpy,
    p=1) before the owner-burn reservation is applied.
weight_setting:
  cadence: rate_limited
  method: Every UNISWAP_V3_LP_QUERY_FREQUENCY (300s) the LP loop scores miners and EMA-updates self.scores;
    the main loop (MAIN_LOOP_FREQUENCY 300s) syncs and the base neuron calls set_weights. raw_weights
    = L1-normalized scores, processed via process_weights_for_netuid, then 50% reserved for the owner
    UID, converted to uint16 and emitted via subtensor.set_weights.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: '25'
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: 1.0
    window: null
    notes: update_scores does scores = clip(alpha*rewards + (1-alpha)*scores, 0, 1) with alpha = config.neuron.lp_moving_average_alpha,
      defaulting to LP_MINER_ALPHA = 1.0 (so by default the new observation fully replaces the prior score,
      i.e. no effective smoothing).
anti_gaming:
- kind: deduplication
  enforcement: rejection
  description: Each owner EVM address may only be claimed by one miner (claimed_owner_addresses) and each
    position token id counted once (claimed_token_ids); duplicate claims score 0.
- kind: liveness_check
  enforcement: penalty
  description: Only positions whose range contains the current pool tick (is_in_range) score the liquidity
    value; out-of-range positions score 0, so miners must keep liquidity active around the price.
- kind: rate_limit
  enforcement: penalty
  description: If more than MINER_GROUP_THRESHOLDS["UNISWAP_V3_LP"] (200) LP miners are present, rewards
    are sorted descending and miners ranked below the top 200 are zeroed.
sub_competitions:
  structure: single
  stages: []
  count: 1
  notes: 'Only one miner group exists: UNISWAP_V3_LP (MINER_GROUP_EMISSIONS UNISWAP_V3_LP = 1, 100% of
    emissions). MINER_TYPE is read from on-chain commitments; unknown types default to UNISWAP_V3_LP.'
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  - status_enum
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: self.scores are EMA-accumulated and persisted to state.npz. A miner's score is reset to
    0 when its hotkey is replaced or when it changes miner_type.
  notes: State persisted via save_state/load_state (step, scores, hotkeys, miner_types). miner_types is
    a per-uid enum (status). Scores are clipped to [0, 1].
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - docs/validator.md
  - docs/taofi_lp.md
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract (Claude Opus 4.8)
  confidence_overall: high
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/name
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '23'
    quote: Swap (SN10 on Bittensor) incentivizes miners to provide liquidity to the TAO<>USDC pool on
      TaoFi.
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '23'
    quote: Swap (SN10 on Bittensor)
  - claim_field: /task/summary
    source_path: swap/utils/taofi_subgraph.py
    line_ref: 81-83
    quote: 'This rewards positions that: - Are in range (current tick between tick_lower and tick_upper)
      - Have higher liquidity L (which means either more capital OR tighter range)'
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/notes
    source_path: swap/utils/taofi_subgraph.py
    line_ref: 101-107
    quote: "is_in_range = current_tick >= tick_lower and current_tick <= tick_upper\n    if not is_in_range:\n\
      \        return 0.0\n    # Return the liquidity value directly\n    return liquidity"
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/normalization
    source_path: swap/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: 114-116
    quote: "max_score = max(rewards.values()) if rewards.values() else 0\n    if max_score > 0:\n    \
      \    rewards = {uid: score / max_score for uid, score in rewards.items()}"
  - claim_field: /ground_truth_sources/0/source_identifier
    source_path: swap/constants.py
    line_ref: '30'
    quote: TAOFI_GQL_URL = "https://subgraph.taofi.com/graphql"
  - claim_field: /ground_truth_sources/0/notes
    source_path: swap/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: '60'
    quote: current_block = await subtensor.get_current_block() - BLOCK_BUFFER
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/fraction
    source_path: swap/constants.py
    line_ref: '22'
    quote: 'MINER_EMISSIONS_BURN_PCT = 0.5  # 50% of miner emissions will be burned'
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/address_or_uid
    source_path: swap/constants.py
    line_ref: '19'
    quote: OWNER_UID = 201
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/notes
    source_path: swap/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 269-275
    quote: "if other_weight_sum > 0:\n                scale = (1 - burn_pct) / other_weight_sum\n    \
      \            for idx, uid in enumerate(uid_list):\n                    if idx == owner_index:\n\
      \                        continue\n                    weight_list[idx] *= scale\n             \
      \   weight_list[owner_index] = burn_pct"
  - claim_field: /aggregation/notes
    source_path: swap/validator/forward.py
    line_ref: '82'
    quote: rewards = MINER_GROUP_EMISSIONS["UNISWAP_V3_LP"] * np.array([rewards_dict[uid] for uid in miner_uids],
      dtype=np.float64)
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/method
    source_path: swap/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 237-251
    quote: "raw_weights = normalize_numpy(self.scores)\n...\n        (\n            processed_weight_uids,\n\
      \            processed_weights,\n        ) = await process_weights_for_netuid("
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/on_chain_call
    source_path: swap/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 301-302
    quote: result, msg = await self.subtensor.set_weights(
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/tempo_or_interval
    source_path: swap/utils/config.py
    line_ref: 70-74
    quote: "\"--neuron.epoch_length\",\n        type=int,\n        help=\"The default epoch length (how\
      \ often we set weights, measured in 12 second blocks).\",\n        default=25,"
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/smoothing/alpha
    source_path: swap/constants.py
    line_ref: '13'
    quote: LP_MINER_ALPHA = 1.0
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/smoothing/notes
    source_path: swap/base/validator.py
    line_ref: '427'
    quote: self.scores[mask] = np.clip(alpha * scattered_rewards[mask] + (1 - alpha) * self.scores[mask],
      a_min=0, a_max=1)
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/0/description
    source_path: swap/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: 136-141
    quote: "if evm_address in claimed_owner_addresses:\n        bt.logging.debug(f\"Owner address {evm_address}\
      \ already claimed by another miner, skipping...\")\n        return 0.0\n    # Mark this owner address\
      \ as claimed\n    claimed_owner_addresses.add(evm_address)"
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/1/description
    source_path: swap/utils/taofi_subgraph.py
    line_ref: 100-104
    quote: "is_in_range = current_tick >= tick_lower and current_tick <= tick_upper\n    if not is_in_range:\n\
      \        return 0.0"
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/2/description
    source_path: swap/validator/forward.py
    line_ref: 76-79
    quote: "if len(rewards_dict) > MINER_GROUP_THRESHOLDS[\"UNISWAP_V3_LP\"]:\n        # Apply penalties\
      \ to the lowest performing miners\n        for uid, _ in sorted_rewards[MINER_GROUP_THRESHOLDS[\"\
      UNISWAP_V3_LP\"] :]:\n            rewards_dict[uid] = 0"
  - claim_field: /sub_competitions/notes
    source_path: swap/constants.py
    line_ref: 25-27
    quote: "MINER_GROUP_EMISSIONS = {\n    \"UNISWAP_V3_LP\": 1,  # uniswap lp miners will receive 100%\
      \ of the emissions\n}"
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/reset_policy
    source_path: swap/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 361-365
    quote: "if uid in old_miner_types and old_miner_types[uid] != self.miner_types[uid]:\n           \
      \     ...\n                self.scores[uid] = 0"
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/notes
    source_path: swap/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 437-443
    quote: "np.savez(\n                self.config.neuron.full_path + \"/state\",\n                step=self.step,\n\
      \                scores=self.scores,\n                hotkeys=self.hotkeys,\n                miner_types=self.miner_types,\n\
      \            )"
  unresolved:
  - Whether the live subnet currently registers >200 LP miners (so the rank-200 cutoff actually fires)
    is not determinable from source.
  - The README states scoring is by 'fees received in the past 24 hours' but the code scores by in-range
    liquidity value L, not realized fees; the realized-fees variant is not present in the read code (BLOCK_ONE_DAY_AGO
    is defined but unused).
  - Exact set_weights cadence in wall-clock blocks vs the 300s loops is governed by epoch_length default
    25 (12s blocks) but the loop also gates on MAIN_LOOP_FREQUENCY; the effective on-chain tempo is not
    pinned to a single constant.
composition:
  shape: pipeline
  overlays:
  - burn
  - guards
  - state
  extern_count: 1

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: partial_burn
mechanism_status_notes: Documented LP-scoring mechanism is live, but set_weights reserves a fixed 50%
  of total weight for the owner UID 201 (MINER_EMISSIONS_BURN_PCT = 0.5), with the remaining 50% distributed
  across LP miners by their concentration scores.
subnet:
  name: Swap
  owner_repo: Swap-Subnet__swap-subnet
  netuid: 10
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners provide liquidity to the TaoFi TAO<>USDC Uniswap V3 pool from an EVM wallet associated
    to their hotkey. The validator queries the TaoFi subgraph for each miner's on-chain LP positions and
    scores them by the position's Uniswap V3 liquidity value L (which inherently rewards concentration)
    when the position is in range. Higher liquidity of in-range positions yields higher reward.
  submission_format:
  - signals
scoring_signals:
- name: position_liquidity_in_range
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: min_max
  notes: Per-position reward_score equals the Uniswap V3 liquidity value L if the pool's current tick
    is within [tick_lower, tick_upper], else 0. Per-miner score is the sum of their in-range position
    liquidity. Rewards are then divided by the max score across miners (max-normalization to [0,1]).
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: market_data
  description: 'TaoFi subgraph (GraphQL) reporting Uniswap V3 positions at a given block: owner, tickLower,
    tickUpper, pool tick, and liquidity.'
  source_identifier: https://subgraph.taofi.com/graphql
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: Positions queried via positionsAtBlock at current_block - BLOCK_BUFFER; on-chain LP state is
    the source of truth, fetched through the TaoFi subgraph oracle.
aggregation:
  method: weighted_average
  composition: weighted_sum
  normalization: min_max
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '201'
    fraction: 0.5
    dynamic: false
    notes: In set_weights, MINER_EMISSIONS_BURN_PCT (0.5) of total weight is reserved for OWNER_UID (201);
      remaining (1 - burn_pct) is scaled across other miners' processed weights.
  notes: Per-miner reward is the sum of in-range position liquidity, max-normalized to [0,1] in get_rewards_uniswap_v3_lp.
    At weight time, scores are L1-normalized via normalize_numpy (p=1), then the owner-burn reservation
    is applied.
weight_setting:
  cadence: continuous
  method: raw_weights = normalize_numpy(self.scores) (L1 norm); process_weights_for_netuid applies subtensor
    limits; then 50% of total weight is reserved for OWNER_UID 201 and the rest is scaled across remaining
    miners; converted to uint16 and emitted via subtensor.set_weights.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: MAIN_LOOP_FREQUENCY = 300 seconds
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: 1.0
    window: null
    notes: 'update_scores does EMA: scores = clip(alpha*rewards + (1-alpha)*scores, 0, 1) with alpha =
      config.neuron.lp_moving_average_alpha, default LP_MINER_ALPHA = 1.0, i.e. the new observation fully
      replaces the previous score.'
anti_gaming:
- kind: deduplication
  enforcement: rejection
  description: calculate_miner_score skips an owner EVM address already claimed by another miner (claimed_owner_addresses)
    and skips token_ids already claimed (claimed_token_ids), preventing double-counting of the same on-chain
    position across miners.
- kind: rate_limit
  enforcement: penalty
  description: If the number of scored LP miners exceeds MINER_GROUP_THRESHOLDS["UNISWAP_V3_LP"] = 200,
    the lowest-performing miners beyond the top 200 have their reward set to 0.
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: penalty
  description: In resync_metagraph, if a miner changes their committed miner_type since last sync, their
    score is reset to 0.
sub_competitions:
  structure: single
  stages: []
  count: 1
  notes: 'Only one miner group exists: UNISWAP_V3_LP, which receives 100% of emissions (MINER_GROUP_EMISSIONS["UNISWAP_V3_LP"]
    = 1).'
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  - status_enum
  status_values:
  - UNISWAP_V3_LP
  reset_policy: Score reset to 0 when a miner's hotkey is replaced or when the miner changes its committed
    miner_type; scores persisted to state.npz (save_state/load_state).
  notes: self.scores is an EMA-updated per-UID score array; self.miner_types maps UID to committed MINER_TYPE;
    both saved/loaded from disk.
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: 7.1.2
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - docs/taofi_lp.md
  - docs/validator.md
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract (Claude Opus 4.8)
  confidence_overall: high
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '23'
    quote: Swap (SN10 on Bittensor) incentivizes miners to provide liquidity to the TAO<>USDC pool on
      TaoFi.
  - claim_field: /subnet/implementation_lang
    source_path: swap/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: '18'
    quote: import bittensor as bt
  - claim_field: /task/summary
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '23'
    quote: Miners are scored based on how much fees their positions received in the past 24 hours.
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/notes
    source_path: swap/utils/taofi_subgraph.py
    line_ref: 100-107
    quote: "is_in_range = current_tick >= tick_lower and current_tick <= tick_upper\n    if not is_in_range:\n\
      \        return 0.0\n    # Return the liquidity value directly\n    return liquidity"
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/metric_kind
    source_path: swap/utils/taofi_subgraph.py
    line_ref: 69-72
    quote: Calculate reward score for a position based on its liquidity value. In Uniswap V3, the liquidity
      value L already accounts for concentration.
  - claim_field: /aggregation/normalization
    source_path: swap/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: 114-116
    quote: "max_score = max(rewards.values()) if rewards.values() else 0\n    if max_score > 0:\n    \
      \    rewards = {uid: score / max_score for uid, score in rewards.items()}"
  - claim_field: /aggregation/composition
    source_path: swap/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: '148'
    quote: miner_score += score
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/fraction
    source_path: swap/constants.py
    line_ref: '22'
    quote: 'MINER_EMISSIONS_BURN_PCT = 0.5  # 50% of miner emissions will be burned'
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/address_or_uid
    source_path: swap/constants.py
    line_ref: '19'
    quote: OWNER_UID = 201
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/notes
    source_path: swap/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 253-275
    quote: "burn_pct = MINER_EMISSIONS_BURN_PCT\n        if 0 < burn_pct < 1:\n            ... scale =\
      \ (1 - burn_pct) / other_weight_sum ... weight_list[owner_index] = burn_pct"
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/method
    source_path: swap/base/validator.py
    line_ref: '237'
    quote: raw_weights = normalize_numpy(self.scores)
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/on_chain_call
    source_path: swap/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 301-309
    quote: "result, msg = await self.subtensor.set_weights(\n            wallet=self.wallet,\n       \
      \     netuid=self.config.netuid,\n            uids=uint_uids,\n            weights=uint_weights,"
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/tempo_or_interval
    source_path: swap/constants.py
    line_ref: '3'
    quote: 'MAIN_LOOP_FREQUENCY = 300  # time in seconds between main loop iterations'
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/smoothing/alpha
    source_path: swap/constants.py
    line_ref: '13'
    quote: LP_MINER_ALPHA = 1.0
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/smoothing/notes
    source_path: swap/base/validator.py
    line_ref: '427'
    quote: self.scores[mask] = np.clip(alpha * scattered_rewards[mask] + (1 - alpha) * self.scores[mask],
      a_min=0, a_max=1)
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/0/description
    source_path: swap/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: 136-149
    quote: "if evm_address in claimed_owner_addresses:\n        ... return 0.0\n    claimed_owner_addresses.add(evm_address)\n\
      \    for token_id, score in owner_positions:\n        if token_id in claimed_token_ids:\n      \
      \      ... continue\n        miner_score += score\n        claimed_token_ids.add(token_id)"
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/1/description
    source_path: swap/validator/forward.py
    line_ref: 76-79
    quote: "if len(rewards_dict) > MINER_GROUP_THRESHOLDS[\"UNISWAP_V3_LP\"]:\n        for uid, _ in sorted_rewards[MINER_GROUP_THRESHOLDS[\"\
      UNISWAP_V3_LP\"] :]:\n            rewards_dict[uid] = 0"
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/2/description
    source_path: swap/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 360-365
    quote: "if uid in old_miner_types and old_miner_types[uid] != self.miner_types[uid]:\n           \
      \     ... resetting score!!!\n                self.scores[uid] = 0"
  - claim_field: /sub_competitions/notes
    source_path: swap/constants.py
    line_ref: 25-27
    quote: "MINER_GROUP_EMISSIONS = {\n    \"UNISWAP_V3_LP\": 1,  # uniswap lp miners will receive 100%\
      \ of the emissions\n}"
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/1/description
    source_path: swap/constants.py
    line_ref: 8-10
    quote: "MINER_GROUP_THRESHOLDS = {\n    \"UNISWAP_V3_LP\": 200,  # 200 of the miners will be UniswapV3\
      \ liquidity providing miners for TaoFi\n}"
  - claim_field: /ground_truth_sources/0/source_identifier
    source_path: swap/constants.py
    line_ref: '30'
    quote: TAOFI_GQL_URL = "https://subgraph.taofi.com/graphql"
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/reset_policy
    source_path: swap/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 430-444
    quote: "np.savez(\n                self.config.neuron.full_path + \"/state\",\n                step=self.step,\n\
      \                scores=self.scores,\n                hotkeys=self.hotkeys,\n                miner_types=self.miner_types,"
  - claim_field: /documentation/source_version
    source_path: swap/__init__.py
    line_ref: '20'
    quote: __version__ = "7.1.2"
  unresolved:
  - README claims scoring is based on fees received in the past 24 hours, but the code (taofi_subgraph.calculate_reward_score)
    scores by current in-range liquidity L at a single block, not 24h accumulated fees; the documented
    and implemented metrics diverge.
  - Whitelisted LP miner (WHITELISTED_LP_MINER hotkey) is awarded the sum of all unclaimed position scores;
    the rationale/governance of this special-casing is not documented.
composition:
  shape: pipeline
  overlays:
  - burn
  - guards
  - state
  extern_count: 0

docs.title: TAO Colosseum
docs.text:
Subnet TAO-Colosseum__tao-colosseum-subnet netuid 79 Archetype pipeline Language python Mechanism status mixed Task Miners place bets in native TAO on the TAO Colosseum P2P betting smart contract deployed on Bittensor EVM, after linking their Bittensor coldkey to an EVM address. Validators query the contract for each miner's betting volume over the last 7 days, apply recency time-decay weights, and reward miners DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: MarketData"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: DeterministicCheck, StakeWeighting"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: volume"]
  AGG["aggregate: Proportional"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  M0 --> AGG
  AGG --> SM
  SM --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: taoColosseum

    netuid: 79
    lang: python
    status: mixed
    submission: other

    @burn {
        uid: "UID 0 (forward.py fallback); subnet owner hotkey UID (burn_code.py)"
        fraction: 1
    }
    @guards {
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        StakeWeighting {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score, performance_ledger }

    Pipeline {
        score: Metric {
            kind: volume
            direction: higher_is_better
            normalization: none
        }
        groundTruth: MarketData {
            trust_model: oracle
        }
        aggregate: Proportional {
            composition: weighted_sum
            normalization: sum_to_one
        }
        smooth: Ema {
            alpha: 0.1
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: per_epoch
            tempo: "360 blocks"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: none
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: mixed
mechanism_status_notes: The wired validator (validator/validator.py -> forward.py) scores miners by time-decayed
  betting volume and sets weights from those scores. However a separate standalone burn validator (burn_code.py
  / TempValidator) is shipped that sets 100% weight to the subnet owner burn UID, and the wired forward()
  itself routes 100% of reward to UID 0 whenever no miner has betting volume. Both burn paths coexist
  with the documented volume-share scoring, so status is mixed.
subnet:
  name: TAO Colosseum
  owner_repo: TAO-Colosseum__tao-colosseum-subnet
  netuid: 79
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners place bets in native TAO on the TAO Colosseum P2P betting smart contract deployed on
    Bittensor EVM, after linking their Bittensor coldkey to an EVM address. Validators query the contract
    for each miner's betting volume over the last 7 days, apply recency time-decay weights, and reward
    miners proportionally to their share of total weighted betting volume.
  submission_format:
  - other
  submission_format_other: on-chain EVM betting transactions (betting volume) on the TAO Colosseum smart
    contract
scoring_signals:
- name: time_decayed_betting_volume
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: none
  notes: weighted_volume = sum(daily_volume[d] * TIME_DECAY_WEIGHTS[d]) over 7 days (today=1.0, yesterday=0.85,
    ..., 6 days ago=0.10). Reward per miner = raw_volume / total_volume.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: market_data
  description: Per-miner betting volume read from the TAO Colosseum EVM smart contract (bet events over
    the last 7 days), keyed by the miner's coldkey-to-EVM address mapping.
  source_identifier: TAO_COLOSSEUM_CONTRACT_ADDRESS default 0x2866c1f38629E3391614E54d1b63A7D0d3Ec2cDB
    on Bittensor EVM
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: Volume fetched via client.get_bets_last_7_days(evm_address); EVM mapping registered via POST
    /api/wallet-mapping with coldkey signature verification.
aggregation:
  method: proportional
  composition: weighted_sum
  normalization: sum_to_one
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: UID 0 (forward.py fallback); subnet owner hotkey UID (burn_code.py)
    fraction: 1.0
    dynamic: false
    notes: 'forward.py: when active_count==0, reward_array[0]=1.0 routes all weight to UID 0. burn_code.py
      TempValidator: always sets uids=[burn_uid], weights=[1.0] to the subnet owner hotkey UID.'
  notes: 'Reward proportional to volume share: rewards = raw_volumes / total_volume (calculate_volume_rewards).
    The single time-decayed-volume signal is the only additive component.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: per_epoch
  method: raw_weights = scores / L1-norm(scores), processed via process_weights_for_netuid, emitted as
    uint16 weights+uids through subtensor.set_weights.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: 360 blocks
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: 0.1
    window: null
    notes: update_scores applies scores = alpha*scattered_rewards + (1-alpha)*scores with neuron.moving_average_alpha
      default 0.1.
anti_gaming:
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: rejection
  description: Wallet mappings require cryptographic proof of coldkey ownership (signature verification
    on POST /api/wallet-mapping); on EVM mapping change a UID's stored volume is reset to 0.
- kind: stake_weighting
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Validator permit / vpermit_tao_limit gating in base config (neuron.vpermit_tao_limit default
    4096); validators require a validator permit to set weights (see burn_code.py ValidatorPermit check).
sub_competitions:
  structure: none
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: ''
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  - performance_ledger
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: EMA scores persisted to state.npz and SQLite snapshots; scores and volume data zeroed
    when a hotkey is replaced (resync_metagraph) or when a miner's EVM mapping changes (forward.py).
  notes: Per-UID weighted_volume, 7-day daily_volumes, EVM address, and EMA score tracked in memory and
    SQLite (update_miner_data / save_snapshot).
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: 2.0.0
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - docs/validator.md
  - docs/miner.md
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract
  confidence_overall: medium
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: burn_code.py
    line_ref: '7'
    quote: MAINNET_NETUID = 79
  - claim_field: /subnet/implementation_lang
    source_path: taocolosseum/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: 24-26
    quote: 'import numpy as np

      from typing import Dict, List

      import bittensor as bt'
  - claim_field: /task/summary
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '20'
    quote: Miners earn rewards by placing bets on the TAO Colosseum smart contract, with rewards distributed
      based on time-decayed betting volume over a 7-day window.
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/metric_kind
    source_path: taocolosseum/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: 61-62
    quote: "# Reward proportional to volume share\n    rewards = raw_volumes / total_volume"
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/notes
    source_path: taocolosseum/core/const.py
    line_ref: 44-46
    quote: '# Time decay weights for 7 days (index 0 = today, index 6 = 6 days ago)

      # Most recent activity gets highest weight

      TIME_DECAY_WEIGHTS = [1.0, 0.85, 0.70, 0.55, 0.40, 0.25, 0.10]'
  - claim_field: /ground_truth_sources/0/description
    source_path: taocolosseum/validator/forward.py
    line_ref: 156-159
    quote: "# Query betting volume from contract\n            weighted_vol, daily_vols = get_miner_volume(client,\
      \ evm_address)\n            \n            volumes[uid] = weighted_vol"
  - claim_field: /ground_truth_sources/0/source_identifier
    source_path: taocolosseum/core/const.py
    line_ref: '21'
    quote: _DEFAULT_CONTRACT = "0x2866c1f38629E3391614E54d1b63A7D0d3Ec2cDB"
  - claim_field: /aggregation/method
    source_path: taocolosseum/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: '62'
    quote: rewards = raw_volumes / total_volume
  - claim_field: /aggregation/normalization
    source_path: taocolosseum/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 283-290
    quote: "norm = np.linalg.norm(self.scores, ord=1, axis=0, keepdims=True)\n...\n        raw_weights\
      \ = self.scores / norm"
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/notes
    source_path: taocolosseum/validator/forward.py
    line_ref: 226-229
    quote: "reward_array = np.zeros(self.metagraph.n, dtype=np.float32)\n        reward_array[0] = 1.0\n\
      \        uids = list(range(self.metagraph.n))\n        self.update_scores(reward_array.tolist(),\
      \ uids)"
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/address_or_uid
    source_path: burn_code.py
    line_ref: 141-143
    quote: "# Set weights to burn UID.\n            uids = [burn_uid]\n            weights = [1.0]"
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/on_chain_call
    source_path: taocolosseum/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 319-327
    quote: "result, msg = self.subtensor.set_weights(\n            wallet=self.wallet,\n            netuid=self.config.netuid,\n\
      \            uids=uint_uids,\n            weights=uint_weights,"
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/tempo_or_interval
    source_path: taocolosseum/core/const.py
    line_ref: 51-52
    quote: '# Weight commit interval in blocks (360 blocks = ~72 minutes)

      WEIGHT_COMMIT_INTERVAL = 360'
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/smoothing/alpha
    source_path: taocolosseum/utils/config.py
    line_ref: 204-209
    quote: "\"--neuron.moving_average_alpha\",\n        type=float,\n        help=\"Moving average alpha\
      \ parameter, how much to add of the new observation.\",\n        default=0.1,"
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/smoothing/kind
    source_path: taocolosseum/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 431-434
    quote: "alpha: float = self.config.neuron.moving_average_alpha\n        self.scores: np.ndarray =\
      \ (\n            alpha * scattered_rewards + (1 - alpha) * self.scores\n        )"
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/0/description
    source_path: taocolosseum/validator/forward.py
    line_ref: 134-141
    quote: "if cached_evm and cached_evm != evm_address:\n...\n            # Clear stale cache entry —\
      \ this coldkey no longer owns the old EVM"
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/1/description
    source_path: burn_code.py
    line_ref: 97-107
    quote: "validator_permits = self.subtensor.query_subtensor(\n                \"ValidatorPermit\",\n\
      ...\n            if not validator_permits[this_uid]:\n                print(\"No Validator Permit,\
      \ wait until next epoch...\")"
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/notes
    source_path: taocolosseum/validator/forward.py
    line_ref: 176-184
    quote: "update_miner_data(\n                uid=uid,\n...\n                daily_volumes=daily_vols,\n\
      \                weighted_volume=weighted_vol,\n                score=float(self.scores[uid]) if\
      \ uid < len(self.scores) else 0.0\n            )"
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/reset_policy
    source_path: taocolosseum/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 370-376
    quote: "if hotkey != self.metagraph.hotkeys[uid]:\n                self.scores[uid] = 0  # hotkey\
      \ has been replaced"
  - claim_field: /documentation/source_version
    source_path: taocolosseum/core/const.py
    line_ref: '17'
    quote: VERSION = "2.0.0"
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/cadence
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '62'
    quote: '- **Automatic Weight Setting**: Every 360 blocks (~72 minutes)'
  unresolved:
  - Live on-chain emission split (what fraction of emissions actually flow to burn vs miners) is not determinable
    from source; burn paths exist but real-time activation depends on whether the volume or temp/burn
    validator is deployed.
  - No explicit min_weight_floor, temperature, or aggregation-internal decay_rate constant present in
    source.
composition:
  shape: pipeline
  overlays:
  - burn
  - guards
  - state
  extern_count: 0

docs.title: ChipForge
docs.text:
Subnet TatsuProject__ChipForge_SN84 netuid 84 Archetype gated Language python Mechanism status mixed Task Miners download an on-chain hardware-design challenge spec and submit complete Verilog/SystemVerilog implementations (packaged as a ZIP). Validators download submissions in batches, evaluate them with an external EDA server (Verilator functionality, Openlane synthesis/place-and-route), and reward th DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: DeterministicDataset"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: DeterministicCheck, StakeWeighting, RateLimit"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: composite"]
  M1["Metric: accuracy"]
  M2["Metric: accuracy"]
  AGG["aggregate: WinnerTakeAll"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2
  GT --> M2
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  AGG --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: chipForge

    netuid: 84
    lang: python
    status: mixed
    submission: source_code

    @burn {
        uid: "0"
        fraction: dynamic
    }
    @guards {
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        StakeWeighting {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        RateLimit {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score, status_enum }

    Gated {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: accuracy
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: accuracy
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: DeterministicDataset {
            trust_model: trusted
        }
        aggregate: WinnerTakeAll {
            composition: gated
            normalization: none
        }
        smooth: None {}
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: continuous
            tempo: "10s loop"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: single
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: mixed
mechanism_status_notes: 'Documented mechanism is winner-takes-all over EDA-evaluated Verilog submissions,
  but the live validator defaults to burning the bulk of emissions: only --miner_emission_percentage (CLI
  default 10%) goes to the current winner and the remainder is sent to UID 0, and emissions are fully
  burned whenever there is no active challenge, no qualifying submission beating the baseline, an emissions
  ban from the challenge server, or any error/timeout.'
subnet:
  name: ChipForge
  owner_repo: TatsuProject__ChipForge_SN84
  netuid: 84
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners download an on-chain hardware-design challenge spec and submit complete Verilog/SystemVerilog
    implementations (packaged as a ZIP). Validators download submissions in batches, evaluate them with
    an external EDA server (Verilator functionality, Openlane synthesis/place-and-route), and reward the
    single highest-scoring submission that passes functional and overall gates and beats the challenge
    baseline. Winner-takes-all.
  submission_format:
  - source_code
scoring_signals:
- name: overall_score
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: The EDA server's final_score.overall is used as the per-submission score for ranking and winner
    selection. README states Functionality is the only currently active component (100% weight); area/delay/power
    are documented as TBD/future.
- name: functional_gate
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: Boolean gate from final_score.functional_gate. Must be True or the submission is dropped from
    weight calculation and winner comparison.
- name: overall_gate
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: Boolean gate from final_score.overall_gate. Must be True or the submission is dropped.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: deterministic_dataset
  description: Challenge test cases / testbenches downloaded from the ChipForge Challenge Server, plus
    a server-provided winner_baseline_score that a submission must beat to qualify for reward.
  source_identifier: ChipForge Challenge Server API (/api/v1/challenges)
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: Functionality verified via Verilator testbench pass/fail; synthesis metrics via Openlane. Baseline
    score and ban_emissions flag are controlled by the challenge server.
aggregation:
  method: winner_take_all
  composition: gated
  normalization: none
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '0'
    fraction: null
    dynamic: true
    notes: When a winner is rewarded via set_winner_weights, miner gets miner_emission_percentage/100
      and burn UID 0 gets the remainder (1 - miner_fraction). In all burn paths set_burn_weights gives
      UID 0 weight 1.0 and every other UID 0.0.
  notes: Per batch, gated submissions are sorted by overall_score and the top one gets weight 1.0, others
    0.0 (calculate_weights_from_hotkeys). At the validator level rewards are routed through the EmissionManager
    phase machine and the miner/burn split.
weight_setting:
  cadence: continuous
  method: Validator loop runs every 10s. set_weights_with_ban_check chooses between set_burn_weights (burn
    to UID 0) and set_winner_weights (split between winner UID and UID 0 by miner_emission_percentage).
    A new champion that beats the baseline snapshot is set to weight 1.0 directly. Burn occurs on ban,
    no challenge, no qualifying winner, or errors.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: 10s loop
  smoothing:
    kind: none
    alpha: null
    window: null
    notes: No EMA/SMA smoothing of final weights; weights are set directly each cycle. A winner retains
      reward for TOTAL_HOURS_FOR_WINNER_REWARD (env/server, local default 0.5h) after challenge end via
      the EmissionManager reward timer.
anti_gaming:
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: rejection
  description: functional_gate and overall_gate (both must be True) gate submissions out of weight calculation
    and winner comparison; submissions are also re-checked against the winner_baseline_score snapshot
    before being crowned champion.
- kind: stake_weighting
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Banned coldkeys list synced from the challenge server; a banned winner's coldkey causes
    all emissions to be burned (set_burn_weights) instead of rewarding that UID.
- kind: rate_limit
  enforcement: rejection
  description: 'README: challenge server accepts 5 requests per IP per hour; one hotkey may submit a maximum
    of 5 solutions per challenge; max ZIP size 10MB.'
sub_competitions:
  structure: single
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: One active challenge at a time (rotated periodically); challenge categories include RISC-V processors
    and AI accelerators, but only one challenge is scored per period.
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  - status_enum
  status_values:
  - initial_burn
  - normal
  - winner_reward
  - burn_until_submission
  reset_policy: current_challenge_best and emission_manager.current_winner_score reset to 0.0 on a new
    challenge; winner reward timer resets when a new/improved winner is crowned.
  notes: EmissionManager tracks current_winner, current_winner_score, winner_qualified_baseline and a
    phase enum; the highest challenge-wide score is retained for comparison across batches.
documentation:

  source_version: v1.0.0

docs.title: Docs-Insights (Document Understanding Subnet)
docs.text:
Subnet TatsuProject__Document_Understanding_Subnet netuid 84 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status mixed Task The validator synthetically generates a document image and its ground-truth label for one of five rotating sub-task types (checkbox, doc-class, doc-parse, encircle, highlight) and sends the image to miners. Miners run vision models, OCR engines and LLMs/VLMs to detect checkboxes+associated text, cla DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: DeterministicDataset"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: RateLimit, DeterministicCheck, RateLimit"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: similarity"]
  M1["Metric: similarity"]
  M2["Metric: latency"]
  M3["Metric: composite"]
  AGG["aggregate: WinnerTakeAll"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2
  GT --> M2
  G --> M3
  GT --> M3
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  M3 --> AGG
  AGG --> SM
  SM --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: docsInsightsDocumentUnderstandingSubnet

    netuid: 84
    lang: python
    status: mixed
    submission: api_response

    @burn {
        uid: "0"
        fraction: 1
    }
    @guards {
        RateLimit {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        RateLimit {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score, status_enum }

    Multiplex<per_task_type> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: similarity
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: similarity
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: latency
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: DeterministicDataset {
            trust_model: trusted
        }
        aggregate: WinnerTakeAll {
            composition: hybrid
            normalization: none
        }
        smooth: Ema {
            alpha: 0.1
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: per_epoch
            tempo: "100"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: per_task_type
            count: 5
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: mixed
mechanism_status_notes: set_weights() always allocates a fixed 1.0 weight to UID 0 (subnet/burn) plus
  a remaining_weight = 1.0 - subnet_weight which evaluates to 0.0 (subnet_weight is hard-coded 1.0). With
  remaining_weight == 0.0, the documented proportional / winner-take-all miner reward distribution produces
  zero effective miner weight, so in practice all emission is routed to UID 0. The scoring pipeline (reward.py)
  is fully implemented and runs, but its output cannot reach miners given the constants.
subnet:
  name: Docs-Insights (Document Understanding Subnet)
  owner_repo: TatsuProject__Document_Understanding_Subnet
  netuid: 84
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: The validator synthetically generates a document image and its ground-truth label for one of
    five rotating sub-task types (checkbox, doc-class, doc-parse, encircle, highlight) and sends the image
    to miners. Miners run vision models, OCR engines and LLMs/VLMs to detect checkboxes+associated text,
    classify the document, parse it into NER sections, or detect highlighted/encircled text, returning
    structured output. The validator rewards each miner by comparing its output to ground truth via bounding-box
    overlap and text-similarity scoring.
  submission_format:
  - api_response
  submission_format_other: ''
scoring_signals:
- name: bounding_box_overlap
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.5
  normalization: none
  notes: 'calculate_overlap() computes intersection / max(area1,area2) polygon overlap, returns 0 if detected
    box >= 2x ground-truth area. Thresholded into a box score (CBS/HBS/EBS): >0.95 -> 1.0, >0.7 -> graded,
    else 0. For checkbox/highlight/encircle the box score is averaged 50/50 with text similarity.'
- name: text_similarity
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.5
  normalization: none
  notes: hard_match_strings / hard_match_strings_2 do strict per-character match percentage with a 75.0
    minimum-match floor; result graded ts>=100 -> 1.0, ts>=30 -> (ts-30)/70, else 0. Averaged 50/50 with
    box score for checkbox/highlight/encircle; used directly (/100) for doc-class.
- name: time_score
  metric_kind: latency
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: time_score_calculation() is computed (1 - linear ramp between 0.01*Tn and 10*Tn, Tn=2.0) but
    final_score_calculation (0.3*time + 0.7*accuracy) is commented out in every reward function; the returned
    score is accuracy only, so time has zero effect.
- name: doc_parse_composite
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: For the doc-parse sub-task only, the final per-miner reward is 0.3*classification_score + 0.7*parsing_score,
    where parsing_score is a recursive per-section average (doc_parse_reward / compute_section_score)
    of basic-unit rewards (50/50 text match + bbox overlap).
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: deterministic_dataset
  description: Synthetic document images with paired ground-truth JSON generated on the fly by the validator
    (checkbox, document, encircled-text, highlighted-text generators). A task type is chosen by cycling
    through available_tasks; an image+label is produced and the label is withheld from the miner.
  source_identifier: template/validator/data_generation/*
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: available_tasks = ["checkbox","doc-class","doc-parse","encircle","highlight"] cycled via itertools.cycle
    in forward.py.
aggregation:
  method: winner_take_all
  composition: hybrid
  normalization: none
  normalization_other: ''
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '0'
    fraction: 1.0
    dynamic: false
    notes: subnet_weight is hard-coded to 1.0 and always assigned to UID 0; remaining_weight = 1.0 - subnet_weight
      = 0.0 is what the miner-distribution branches divide up. In the winner-take-all fallback, if no
      miner's score gap exceeds the threshold (or the top miner has been top for max_consecutive_rewards
      tempos) the remaining_weight is also added back to UID 0.
  notes: 'Per-miner scores feed two branches: (1) if >=2 miners have score >= 0.8, distribute remaining_weight
    proportionally to their scores; (2) otherwise winner-take-all to the top miner only if its score gap
    over second >= top_reward_threshold (0.05). UID 0 always receives the fixed subnet_weight first.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: per_epoch
  method: 'set_weights(): allocate fixed subnet_weight=1.0 to UID 0, then distribute remaining_weight
    (=0.0) either proportionally among miners scoring >=0.8 (if 2+) or winner-take-all to the top miner
    when its score gap over the second-best exceeds top_reward_threshold=0.05; a top miner that stays
    top for max_consecutive_rewards=18 tempos has the remaining weight redirected to UID 0. Weights then
    pass through process_weights_for_netuid and convert_weights_and_uids_for_emit before emit.'
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: '100'
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: 0.1
    window: null
    notes: update_scores() applies self.scores = alpha*scattered_rewards + (1-alpha)*self.scores with
      alpha = config.neuron.moving_average_alpha (default 0.1).
anti_gaming:
- kind: rate_limit
  enforcement: barrier
  description: vpermit_tao_limit default 12000 limits TAO allowed to query a validator with a vpermit;
    sample_size default 50 miners queried per step.
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: penalty
  description: 'Strictness rules in scoring: calculate_overlap returns 0 if detected box >= 2x ground-truth
    area; accuracy functions return 0 if abs(len(detected)-len(gt)) > 1; doc-parse returns 0 if NER section
    keys differ from ground truth.'
- kind: rate_limit
  enforcement: barrier
  description: 'top_miner_history caps consecutive rewards: a miner that is top for max_consecutive_rewards=18
    consecutive tempos has its remaining emission redirected to the subnet (UID 0) and its history reset,
    preventing indefinite single-miner capture.'
sub_competitions:
  structure: per_task_type
  stages: []
  count: 5
  notes: 'Five sub-task types rotate via itertools.cycle: checkbox, doc-class, doc-parse, encircle, highlight.
    Each has its own reward function but all feed the same single moving-average score array and one set_weights
    pipeline.'
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  - status_enum
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: Moving-average scores reset to 0 for a UID whose hotkey is replaced (resync_metagraph).
    top_miner_history is truncated to the last max_consecutive_rewards+1 entries and cleared when a miner
    hits the 18-tempo cap.
  notes: self.scores holds the EMA score per UID; self.top_miner_history is a list tracking which UID
    was top in recent tempos to enforce the consecutive-reward cap.
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - docs/Technical_Guide.md
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract
  confidence_overall: medium
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: 98-100
    quote: python3 neurons/validator.py --netuid 84 --subtensor.network finney
  - claim_field: /subnet/implementation_lang
    source_path: template/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: 19-23
    quote: 'import numpy as np

      from typing import List

      import bittensor as bt

      from template.protocol import ProfileSynapse'
  - claim_field: /task/summary
    source_path: template/validator/forward.py
    line_ref: 47-95
    quote: available_tasks = ["checkbox", "doc-class", "doc-parse", "encircle", "highlight"]
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/notes
    source_path: template/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: 151-168
    quote: "if box1_area >= 2 * box2_area:\n            return 0.0\n        ... denominator = max(box1_area,\
      \ box2_area) ... overlap_ratio = intersection_area / denominator"
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/notes
    source_path: template/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: 206-211
    quote: "if overlap > 0.95:\n                    cbs = 1.0\n                elif overlap > 0.7:\n \

docs.title: Talisman AI (SN45) — Perception Subnet for On-Chain Trading Insights
docs.text:
Subnet Team-Rizzo__talisman-ai netuid 45 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status partial_burn Task Miners receive batches of X (Twitter) posts and Telegram messages from validators over Bittensor (TweetBatch / TelegramBatch synapses) and return an LLM classification for each item: subnet_id (which Bittensor subnet it is about), sentiment, content_type, technical_quality, market_analysis, and impa DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: LlmJudgment"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: DeterministicCheck, DeterministicCheck, StakeWeighting"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: accuracy"]
  M1["Metric: other"]
  AGG["aggregate: Proportional"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  AGG --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: talismanAiSn45PerceptionSubnetForOnChainTradingInsights

    netuid: 45
    lang: python
    status: partial_burn
    submission: [api_response, signals]

    @burn {
        uid: "189"
        fraction: dynamic
    }
    @guards {
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        StakeWeighting {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        RateLimit {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score, performance_ledger }

    Multiplex<multi_mechanism> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: accuracy
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: other
                family: classification_quality
                specific: batch_integrity
                raw: "returned_batch_size_equals_sent"
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: LlmJudgment {
            trust_model: oracle
        }
        aggregate: Proportional {
            composition: gated
            normalization: l1
            min_weight_floor: 0.003
        }
        smooth: None {}
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: per_epoch
            tempo: "100 blocks (neuron.epoch_length default)"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: multi_mechanism
            count: 2
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: partial_burn
mechanism_status_notes: Earned weight per miner is derived from points converted to a USD-pegged fraction
  of miner alpha emission (get_percent_needed_to_equal_points). The residual fraction (1 - min(total_percent_needed,100)/100)
  is assigned to BURN_UID=189 in calculate_weights(). The legacy BaseValidatorNeuron.set_weights() burn_modifier
  (burn_modifier=0.9 -> burn_uid 189) is commented out and not used; burn instead happens dynamically
  inside calculate_weights via the residual.
subnet:
  name: Talisman AI (SN45) — Perception Subnet for On-Chain Trading Insights
  owner_repo: Team-Rizzo__talisman-ai
  netuid: 45
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: 'Miners receive batches of X (Twitter) posts and Telegram messages from validators over Bittensor
    (TweetBatch / TelegramBatch synapses) and return an LLM classification for each item: subnet_id (which
    Bittensor subnet it is about), sentiment, content_type, technical_quality, market_analysis, and impact_potential.
    Validators re-run their own analyzer on a sampled item and require an EXACT match on those categorical
    fields; a fully matching batch earns +1 point per item, a mismatch penalizes the miner for the epoch.'
  submission_format:
  - api_response
  - signals
scoring_signals:
- name: classification_exact_match
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: none
  notes: Binary per-batch acceptance. validate_miner_batch samples sample_size=1 item and requires m_subnet/sentiment/content_type/technical_quality/market_analysis/impact_potential
    to match the validator's re-classification (case-insensitive for strings). is_valid only when matches
    == sample_size and zero discrepancies. Accepted batches reward +1 per item.
- name: batch_completeness
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: returned_batch_size_equals_sent
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: 'Gate: miner must return exactly what was sent (len(tweet_batch) == len(sent_batch)); a size
    mismatch adds a penalty and resets the items, bypassing the classification check.'
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: llm_judgment
  description: The validator's own SubnetRelevanceAnalyzer / TelegramRelevanceAnalyzer re-classifies a
    sampled post/message with the configured LLM (e.g. Qwen/Qwen3-32B via LLM_BASE) and treats its output
    as ground truth for the exact-match comparison.
  source_identifier: talisman_ai/analyzer/scoring.py (validate_miner_batch / validate_miner_telegram_batch)
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: X API validation (post existence, author/timestamp/metric checks) is stated to be performed API-side
    before items reach validators; validators only do LLM analysis re-checking.
aggregation:
  method: proportional
  composition: gated
  normalization: l1
  normalization_other: ''
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: 0.003
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '189'
    fraction: null
    dynamic: true
    notes: weights[config.BURN_UID] = (1 - (min(total_percent_needed, 100) / 100)) in calculate_weights();
      BURN_UID defaults to 189. The burned fraction is the residual of the total USD-pegged percent earned
      by all miners, so it is computed, not fixed.
  notes: 'Per-miner weight = percent_needed_to_equal_points(points) (USD-pegged via TAO/alpha price and
    USD_PRICE_PER_POINT=0.040), floored at MIN_PERCENT_PER_POINT=0.003 per point, scaled to <=100% total,
    then converted to fraction. update_scores() then OVERWRITES self.scores with these weights (no EMA:
    self.scores = scattered_rewards). BaseValidatorNeuron.set_weights() L1-normalizes self.scores (norm
    = ||scores||_1) before process_weights_for_netuid.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: per_epoch
  method: ValidationClient.run() aggregates local + validator-broadcast points for target_epoch = current_epoch
    - 2 (delayed E-2 window), zeroes a UID's reward when penalized by >=2 validators or when penalties
    >= rewards, calls calculate_weights() (which assigns the residual to BURN_UID), then update_scores(weights,
    uids). BaseNeuron.sync() calls set_weights() when block - last_update > neuron.epoch_length (default
    100 blocks). set_weights() L1-normalizes scores and emits via subtensor.set_weights().
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: 100 blocks (neuron.epoch_length default)
  smoothing:
    kind: none
    alpha: null
    window: null
    notes: update_scores() sets self.scores = scattered_rewards directly (the EMA comment is vestigial;
      no moving average is applied). MinerReward keeps points bucketed per epoch (last 10 epochs).
anti_gaming:
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: rejection
  description: 'Anti-cherry-picking: the validator rebuilds the original sent batch from its local store
    and requires the returned batch size to equal it; mismatch -> penalty + reset (forward_tweets / _handle_miner_batch_response
    in neurons/validator.py).'
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: penalty
  description: 'Re-classification exact-match: validator re-runs its analyzer on a sampled item and penalizes
    (+1 penalty, items reset to unprocessed) if any of the 6 categorical fields disagree.'
- kind: stake_weighting
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Penalties only zero a miner's reward when >=2 validators (local + broadcast) penalized
    that UID in the target epoch (uid_validator_counts[uid] >= 2 in validation_client.py).
- kind: rate_limit
  enforcement: penalty
  description: 'Idempotent reward: each tweet_id / message_id is rewarded at most once (is_rewarded /
    mark_rewarded guards in neurons/validator.py).'
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_mechanism
  stages:
  - name: x_tweets
    role: main
    advancement_rule: exact-match accept -> +1 point per tweet (validate_miner_batch, SubnetRelevanceAnalyzer)
  - name: telegram_messages
    role: main
    advancement_rule: exact-match accept -> +1 point per message (validate_miner_telegram_batch, TelegramRelevanceAnalyzer)
  count: 2
  notes: Two parallel data-source pipelines (X posts and Telegram messages) share the same +1-per-item
    points scheme and the same calculate_weights burn allocation.
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  - performance_ledger
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: 'MinerReward / MinerPenalty store epoch -> {hotkey: points}; only the last 10 epochs are
    kept (max_epochs = 10, delete_oldest_epoch). Rewards/penalties are applied for the delayed epoch E-2;
    per-item rewards are one-shot (idempotent via tweet/message store flags).'
  notes: Tracked as epoch-bucketed integer points (MinerReward.add_reward adds +1) and epoch-bucketed
    penalties (MinerPenalty.add_penalty). Validators also broadcast compact epoch snapshots to other validators
    (RewardBroadcastStore / PenaltyBroadcastStore).
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: V3
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - talisman_ai/validator/README.md
  completeness: medium

  extracted_by: im-extract / claude-opus-4-8
  extracted_at: '2026-06-06'
  confidence_overall: medium
  evidence:
