docs.title: Subnet77 Liquidity Auction & Voting
docs.text:
Subnet creativebuilds__sn77 netuid 77 Archetype multiplex Language typescript Mechanism status active Task Miners provide liquidity to Uniswap V3 pools and register (link) their Bittensor hotkey to an Ethereum/EVM address. Token holders vote weighted allocations across liquidity pools (weights summing to 10000). A central server tallies votes weighted by token holdings and miners' liquidity positions to DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: OrganicTraffic"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: RateLimit, CommitReveal"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: other"]
  AGG["aggregate: WeightedAverage"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  M0 --> AGG
  AGG --> SM
  SM --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: subnet77LiquidityAuctionVoting

    netuid: 77
    lang: typescript
    status: active
    submission: [content_link, signals]

    @guards {
        RateLimit {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        CommitReveal {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
    }

    Multiplex<multi_asset> {
        score: Metric {
            kind: other
            family: financial_pnl
            specific: voter_weighted_liquidity
            raw: "voter-weighted liquidity contribution (server-side; formula not in repo)"
            direction: higher_is_better
            normalization: other
        }
        groundTruth: OrganicTraffic {
            trust_model: crowd
        }
        aggregate: WeightedAverage {
            composition: weighted_sum
            normalization: sum_to_one
        }
        smooth: Ema {
            alpha: 0.2
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: rate_limited
            tempo: "101 blocks (SET_INTERVAL_MS default 101*12*1000 ms)"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: multi_asset
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: active
mechanism_status_notes: Validator actively sets on-chain weights every ~101 blocks. However the actual
  reward formula (how votes + Uniswap V3 liquidity positions map to per-miner weight) is computed by an
  off-repo central server and is not in this repository; only the fetch/EMA/normalize/ set pipeline is
  present.
subnet:
  name: Subnet77 Liquidity Auction & Voting
  owner_repo: creativebuilds__sn77
  netuid: 77
  implementation_lang: typescript
task:
  summary: Miners provide liquidity to Uniswap V3 pools and register (link) their Bittensor hotkey to
    an Ethereum/EVM address. Token holders vote weighted allocations across liquidity pools (weights summing
    to 10000). A central server tallies votes weighted by token holdings and miners' liquidity positions
    to compute final per-miner weights; validators fetch those weights and set them on subnet 77. Miners
    are rewarded for providing liquidity to pools that voters favor.
  submission_format:
  - content_link
  - signals
scoring_signals:
- name: liquidity_provision
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: voter-weighted liquidity contribution (server-side; formula not in repo)
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: other
  normalization_other: computed off-repo by central server
  notes: Final per-miner weight is computed server-side from holder votes (token-weighted) and miners'
    Uniswap V3 liquidity positions. The repository contains no scoring code for this; the validator only
    consumes the server's /weights output.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: organic_traffic
  description: Holder votes (token-weighted allocations across liquidity pools) collected by the central
    server, combined with on-chain Uniswap V3 liquidity positions for registered miners.
  source_identifier: https://77.creativebuilds.io
  trust_model: crowd
  notes: Votes are token-holder driven (crowd). Position data sourced from Uniswap V3 via The Graph (THEGRAPH_API_KEY).
    The tallying/valuation happens off-repo; trust model is the central server.
aggregation:
  method: weighted_average
  composition: weighted_sum
  normalization: sum_to_one
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: false
    address_or_uid: null
    fraction: null
    dynamic: false
    notes: ''
  notes: 'In-repo aggregation is limited to: normalize the server-provided per-miner weights so they sum
    to 1 (normalizeFinalMinerWeights), then scale to u16 (0..65535). If total weight is zero/invalid the
    validator falls back to a uniform distribution across miners/UIDs. The underlying vote-to-weight aggregation
    is server-side and not in the source tree.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: rate_limited
  method: Periodic loop (default 5 min). Every SET_INTERVAL_MS (default 101*12*1000 ms = "101 Blocks")
    the EMA-smoothed weights are normalized and pushed via subtensorModule.setWeights.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: 101 blocks (SET_INTERVAL_MS default 101*12*1000 ms)
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: 0.2
    window: null
    notes: 'EMA over successive server weight fetches: next = EMA_ALPHA*curr + (1-EMA_ALPHA)*prev, EMA_ALPHA
      default 0.2 (env-overridable). NaN/non-finite values are coerced to 0.'
anti_gaming:
- kind: rate_limit
  enforcement: barrier
  description: 'Vote cooldown management (server-side, documented in README): base 72-minute cooldown
    after vote changes, progressive doubling (72m -> 144m -> 288m -> 576m) capped at 8 hours, reset to
    base after 24h inactivity; no cooldown for first-time voters. Prevents rapid vote-gaming.'
- kind: commit_reveal
  enforcement: rejection
  description: Votes and validator pings are Ed25519/sr25519-signed and signature-verified; validators
    must be registered on the subnet (keyToUid check) and pass a server version-compatibility ping check
    (12h incompatibility timeout shuts the validator down).
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_asset
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: Competition is across liquidity pools (up to MAX_POOLS = 10 per voter), each an asset/pool that
    accrues vote weight. Voters allocate weights across pools summing to 10000.
per_miner_state:
  tracked: false
  state_kinds: []
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: ''
  notes: No per-miner persistent state in the repo's validator beyond the in-memory EMA of weights, which
    is not keyed to durable miner identity/ledger state. Vote-cooldown state is per-voter and lives on
    the off-repo server.
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract (Claude Opus 4.8)
  confidence_overall: medium
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: validator/index.ts
    line_ref: '320'
    quote: const NETUID = 77
  - claim_field: /subnet/implementation_lang
    source_path: validator/index.ts
    line_ref: 1-5
    quote: This is the main validator code for sn77 ... Determines the weight of each miner and sets weight
      every interval.
  - claim_field: /task/summary
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: 1-3
    quote: Subnet77 Liquidity Auction & Voting ... token holders vote on liquidity pools and validators
      process these votes to set miner weights on subnet 77.
  - claim_field: /task/submission_format
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: 102-122
    quote: 'Register your address: Link your Bittensor public key to an EVM address ... Provide liquidity:
      Add liquidity to pools to earn rewards'
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/notes

docs.title: Desearch (SN22)
docs.text:
Subnet datura-ai__desearch netuid 22 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status partial_burn Task Miners run Bittensor axons that serve live AI, X/Twitter, and web search synapses. Validators send synthetic and organic search queries, then independently re-scrape/verify the miner's returned links and tweets against independent providers and LLM judgment. Miners are rewarded for returning relevan DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: RealEngagement, LlmJudgment, OrganicTraffic"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: Deduplication, LivenessCheck, DeterministicCheck"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: similarity"]
  M1["Metric: similarity"]
  M2["Metric: llm_judgment"]
  M3["Metric: composite"]
  M4["Metric: volume"]
  AGG["aggregate: WeightedAverage"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2
  GT --> M2
  G --> M3
  GT --> M3
  G --> M4
  GT --> M4
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  M3 --> AGG
  M4 --> AGG
  AGG --> SM
  SM --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: desearchSn22

    netuid: 22
    lang: python
    status: partial_burn
    submission: [content_link, api_response]

    @burn {
        uid: "5CUu1QhvrfyMDBELUPJLt4c7uJFbi7TKqDHkS1Zz41oD4dyP"
        fraction: 0.8
    }
    @guards {
        Deduplication {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        LivenessCheck {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        StakeWeighting {
            enforcement: other
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score, performance_ledger }

    Multiplex<per_task_type> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: similarity
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: similarity
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: llm_judgment
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: volume
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: [
            RealEngagement {
                trust_model: adversarial
            },
            LlmJudgment {
                trust_model: oracle
            },
            OrganicTraffic {
                trust_model: adversarial
            }
        ]
        aggregate: WeightedAverage {
            composition: hybrid
            normalization: l1
        }
        smooth: Ema {
            alpha: 0.5
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: per_epoch
            tempo: "1 hour (UTC hour boundary scoring epoch)"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: per_task_type
            count: 3
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: partial_burn
mechanism_status_notes: Documented scoring (relevance verification + superlinear quality*volume) is active,
  but a hardcoded ENABLE_EMISSION_CONTROL=True redirects 80% (EMISSION_CONTROL_PERC=0.8) of total weight
  to a fixed emission-control hotkey before normalization, so most emission is burned/ controlled and
  only the residual 20% is distributed across miners by score.
subnet:
  name: Desearch (SN22)
  owner_repo: datura-ai__desearch
  netuid: 22
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners run Bittensor axons that serve live AI, X/Twitter, and web search synapses. Validators
    send synthetic and organic search queries, then independently re-scrape/verify the miner's returned
    links and tweets against independent providers and LLM judgment. Miners are rewarded for returning
    relevant, verifiable search results (and summaries) across the three search types, weighted by both
    quality and the volume of correctly served responses.
  submission_format:
  - content_link
  - api_response
scoring_signals:
- name: twitter_content_relevance
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: Per-tweet binary/partial score (validator independently re-fetches tweets via the Apify Twitter
    scraper actor and compares; LLM relevance check on summaries). Averaged per response.
- name: web_basic_search_content_relevance
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: 'Validator independently fetches web links and scores each returned link 0/1, averaging: "sum(scores)
    / len(scores) if scores else 0.0".'
- name: summary_relevance
  metric_kind: llm_judgment
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: SummaryRelevanceRewardModel uses an LLM (RewardLLM, reward_model_name "VMware/open-llama-7b-open-instruct")
    to judge summary relevance.
- name: quality
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: Per-(uid,search_type) mean of per-response rewards (0-1), with organic responses weighted ORGANIC_DEEP_SCORE_WEIGHT=5
    in the mean.
- name: volume
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: Raw count of responses scored for a UID in a search type; enters superlinear formula.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: real_engagement
  description: Validators independently re-scrape the actual tweets/web pages the miner returned (Apify
    Twitter scraper actor for X; web fetch for web search) and compare to the miner's claimed results.
  source_identifier: neurons/validators/apify/twitter_scraper_actor.py; web fetch in web_basic_search_content_relevance.py
  trust_model: adversarial
  notes: Miner output is verified against an independent provider re-fetch, not trusted as-is.
- kind: llm_judgment
  description: LLM (RewardLLM) judges summary/content relevance.
  source_identifier: neurons/validators/reward/reward_llm.py; VMware/open-llama-7b-open-instruct
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: ''
- kind: organic_traffic
  description: Organic responses collected during the epoch are sampled (capped at ORGANIC_SCORE_CAP_PER_TYPE=100)
    and deep-scored, carrying 5x weight in the per-UID mean.
  source_identifier: neurons/validators/scoring/query_scheduler.py
  trust_model: adversarial
  notes: ''
aggregation:
  method: weighted_average
  composition: hybrid
  normalization: l1
  normalization_other: ''
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: 5CUu1QhvrfyMDBELUPJLt4c7uJFbi7TKqDHkS1Zz41oD4dyP
    fraction: 0.8
    dynamic: false
    notes: ENABLE_EMISSION_CONTROL=True; burn_weights() assigns EMISSION_CONTROL_PERC=0.8 of total score
      to the fixed EMISSION_CONTROL_HOTKEY and rescales the remaining 0.2 across other UIDs.
  notes: 'Per search type, per-UID (quality, volume) is folded via combine_superlinear_scores: score =
    (sum_t w_t*q_t)^1.5 * (sum_t w_t*v_t)^1.5 with SEARCH_TYPE_WEIGHTS {ai_search:0.60, x_search:0.20,
    web_search:0.20} and QUALITY_EXPONENT_ALPHA=VOLUME_EXPONENT_BETA=1.5. Combined scores feed the EMA,
    which is then L1-normalized (_l1_normalize) into raw weights.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: per_epoch
  method: Hourly (UTC) scoring epoch. After EMA update and 80% emission-control burn, weights are L1-normalized
    and passed through bittensor process_weights (min/max limits), then set on chain with retry (set_weights_with_retry).
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: 1 hour (UTC hour boundary scoring epoch)
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: 0.5
    window: null
    notes: 'update_moving_averaged_scores: self.moving_averaged_scores = alpha*scattered_rewards + (1-alpha)*self.moving_averaged_scores
      with alpha = 0.5.'
anti_gaming:
- kind: deduplication
  enforcement: penalty
  description: calculate_adjusted_score applies a duplicate_tweets penalty (0.05 per duplicate) and link-
    count bonus/penalty shaping (max_bonus 0.2, max_links_threshold 10).
- kind: liveness_check
  enforcement: rejection
  description: Responses with dendrite.status_code != 200 are zeroed; pattern_to_check regex rejects completions
    containing scoring-template/control tokens (returns None).
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: rejection
  description: Validator re-fetches the miner's claimed tweets/links from independent providers; results
    that cannot be verified score 0.
- kind: stake_weighting
  enforcement: other
  enforcement_other: superlinear consolidation incentive
  description: Superlinear score = quality^1.5 * volume^1.5 makes consolidating volume into one UID strictly
    more profitable than splitting across sybil UIDs (per code comment).
sub_competitions:
  structure: per_task_type
  stages:
  - name: ai_search
    role: main
    advancement_rule: ''
    multipliers:
      search_type_weight: 0.6
  - name: x_search
    role: main
    advancement_rule: ''
    multipliers:
      search_type_weight: 0.2
  - name: web_search
    role: main
    advancement_rule: ''
    multipliers:
      search_type_weight: 0.2
  count: 3
  notes: Three search types scored separately then combined with per-type weights into one superlinear
    per-UID score.
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  - performance_ledger
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: ''
  notes: moving_averaged_scores EMA persisted across epochs (save/load_moving_averaged_scores); capacity
    module tracks per-UID per-type quality / declared concurrency / allocation across scoring windows
    (capacity.update_after_scoring, miner_db allocation state).
documentation:
  status: code_authoritative
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - docs/running_a_validator.md
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  confidence_overall: high
  extracted_by: im-extract (Claude Opus 4.8)
  extractor_notes: README describes architecture/operations but not numeric scoring; all constants taken
    from code. Per-search-type reward models verify miner output against independent providers + LLM.
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '6'
    quote: '# Subnet 22 (SN22) on Bittensor'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /subnet/name
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '11'
    quote: SN22 is the Bittensor subnet behind Desearch's decentralized real-time intelligence layer.
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /task/summary
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '20'
    quote: Sends synthetic and organic queries to miners, verifies results with independent providers,
      stores scoring windows, and writes weights on-chain.
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /mechanism_status
    source_path: neurons/validators/scoring/weights.py
    line_ref: 30-32
    quote: ENABLE_EMISSION_CONTROL = True ... EMISSION_CONTROL_PERC = 0.8
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/fraction
    source_path: neurons/validators/scoring/weights.py
    line_ref: 143-144
    quote: new_target_score = EMISSION_CONTROL_PERC * total_score ... remaining_weight = (1 - EMISSION_CONTROL_PERC)
      * total_score
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/address_or_uid
    source_path: neurons/validators/scoring/weights.py
    line_ref: '31'
    quote: EMISSION_CONTROL_HOTKEY = "5CUu1QhvrfyMDBELUPJLt4c7uJFbi7TKqDHkS1Zz41oD4dyP"
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /aggregation/normalization
    source_path: neurons/validators/scoring/weights.py
    line_ref: 209-213
    quote: 'def _l1_normalize(x): norm = np.abs(x).sum() ... return x / norm'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /aggregation/notes
    source_path: neurons/validators/scoring/query_scheduler.py
    line_ref: 51-53
    quote: combined[uid] = (q_combined**QUALITY_EXPONENT_ALPHA * v_combined**VOLUME_EXPONENT_BETA)
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/3/notes

    line_ref: 27-28
    quote: QUALITY_EXPONENT_ALPHA = 1.5 ... VOLUME_EXPONENT_BETA = 1.5
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /sub_competitions/stages/0/multipliers

    line_ref: 15-19
    quote: 'SEARCH_TYPE_WEIGHTS = {"ai_search": 0.60, "x_search": 0.20, "web_search": 0.20}'

docs.title: de_val
docs.text:
Subnet deval-core__De-Val netuid 15 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status active Task Miners fine-tune their own LLM evaluator models offline and upload them (plus pipeline code) to HuggingFace, committing the model id/hash on chain. Validators download each model, run it inside a Docker container, and send predefined RAG-evaluation prompts across four task families (relevancy, hallu DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: LlmJudgment"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: Deduplication, DeterministicCheck, ChallengePeriod"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: regression_error"]
  M1["Metric: similarity"]
  M2["Metric: similarity"]
  M3["Metric: similarity"]
  M4["Metric: regression_error"]
  M5["Metric: regression_error"]
  M6["Metric: similarity"]
  M7["Metric: similarity"]
  M8["Metric: similarity"]
  AGG["aggregate: WinnerTakeAll"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note

  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2

  G --> M3
  GT --> M3

  G --> M7
  GT --> M7
  G --> M8

  M1 --> AGG

  M6 --> AGG
  M7 --> AGG
  M8 --> AGG

  SM --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: deVal

    netuid: 15
    lang: python
    status: active
    submission: [model_weights, source_code]

    @guards {
        Deduplication {
            enforcement: elimination
        }
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        ChallengePeriod {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        CodeInspection {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score, registration_age }

    Multiplex<tiered> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: regression_error
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: similarity
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: similarity
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: similarity
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: regression_error
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: regression_error
                direction: lower_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: similarity
                direction: lower_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: similarity
                direction: lower_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: similarity
                direction: lower_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: LlmJudgment {
            trust_model: trusted
        }
        aggregate: WinnerTakeAll {
            composition: multiplicative
            normalization: other
        }
        smooth: Ema {
            alpha: 0.8
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: per_epoch
            tempo: "neuron.epoch_length default 100 (12-second blocks); forward_max_time 64800s"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: tiered
            count: 5
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: active
mechanism_status_notes: Contest-based subnet. Validators evaluate miner-submitted LLM models across four
  RAG-evaluation tasks, compute EMA scores, then rank miners into reward tiers and set weights via a winner-take-most
  tiered distribution. No burn/null-UID allocation is present in the code path; all distributed weight
  goes to ranked miners.
subnet:
  name: de_val
  owner_repo: deval-core__De-Val
  netuid: 15
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners fine-tune their own LLM evaluator models offline and upload them (plus pipeline code)
    to HuggingFace, committing the model id/hash on chain. Validators download each model, run it inside
    a Docker container, and send predefined RAG-evaluation prompts across four task families (relevancy,
    hallucination, summary completeness, misattribution). Each model returns a numeric score (0-1) and
    a list of extracted mistakes, which are compared against reference values.
  submission_format:
  - model_weights
  - source_code
scoring_signals:
- name: float_diff (score accuracy)
  metric_kind: regression_error
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.6
  normalization: none
  notes: Used by hallucination, completeness, and attribution reward_definition with weight 0.6. Score
    = 1 - clipped abs(reference - prediction); returns 0 if pred outside [0,1].
- name: exact_match (mistakes)
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.4
  normalization: none
  notes: Used by hallucination and attribution reward_definition with weight 0.4. ROUGE-L f-score match
    of extracted mistakes against reference with exact_match_threshold = 0.85.
- name: rouge (mistakes)
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.2
  normalization: none
  notes: Used by completeness reward_definition with weight 0.2. ROUGE-L f-score.
- name: relevance (mistakes embedding)
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.2
  normalization: none
  notes: Used by completeness reward_definition with weight 0.2. Cosine similarity of UAE-Large-V1 embeddings,
    baseline-subtracted and clipped to [0,1].
- name: ordinal (score)
  metric_kind: regression_error
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: none
  notes: Sole reward model for the relevancy task (weight 1.0). Binary ordinal score over classes [1.0,
    0.0].
- name: dist_penalty (score)
  metric_kind: regression_error
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: 0.35
  normalization: none
  notes: Penalty model applied multiplicatively (penalty_definition weight 0.35) for hallucination, completeness,
    attribution. Bucketed distance reward over categories [(0,.1),(.1,.2),(.2,.4),(.4,1.0001)].
- name: exact_match (penalty)
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: 0.5
  normalization: none
  notes: penalty_definition weight 0.5 for hallucination and attribution (multiplicative).
- name: rouge (penalty)
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: 0.125
  normalization: none
  notes: penalty_definition weight 0.125 for completeness (multiplicative).
- name: relevance (penalty)
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: 0.125
  normalization: none
  notes: penalty_definition weight 0.125 for completeness (multiplicative).
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: llm_judgment
  description: Reference scores and reference mistakes are generated synthetically by the validator's
    own LLM pipeline (OpenAI / AWS Bedrock supported models) when constructing each task. Miner outputs
    are scored against these generated references.
  source_identifier: SUPPORTED_MODELS (OpenAI, AWS Bedrock); validator-generated tasks
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: Each task generates a context plus reference score / reference_mistakes / reference_true_values.
    Tasks draw context from WikiDataset, GenericDataset, AttributionDataset.
aggregation:
  method: winner_take_all
  composition: multiplicative
  normalization: other
  normalization_other: Within-tier exponential decay weights normalized to sum to 1, scaled by each tier's
    incentive pool; tiers themselves are a fixed schedule (not summed-to-one in code unless _adjust_tiers
    re-normalizes when fewer tiers than the schedule are populated).
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: false
    address_or_uid: null
    fraction: null
    dynamic: false
    notes: No burn / null-UID routing in the weight-setting path. rank_and_select_winners distributes
      all weight across ranked miners via tier incentive pools.
  notes: Per response, total_reward = sum(weight * reward) over reward models, then multiplied by (1 -
    weight*penalty) over penalty models. Per-uid task scores are averaged over total task count (denom),
    EMA-smoothed (alpha=0.8) with a constant decay (alpha_decay=0.02, clamped >=0), then ranked. Ranked
    miners are grouped into tiers when a higher score exceeds the next by a factor > tier_improvement_threshold
    (1.08). Tier incentive pools are {0:0.5, 1:0.3, 2:0.125, 3:0.05, 4:0.025}; within each tier, np.exp(-arange)
    decay (by earliest submit block) is normalized and scaled by the pool. This is a winner-take-most
    / contest structure.
weight_setting:
  cadence: per_epoch
  method: Once per forward/epoch (after evaluating candidate uids), update_scores computes EMA scores
    and rank_and_select_winners produces (uid, weight) pairs; set_weights then calls process_weights_for_netuid
    and subtensor.set_weights (up to 3 attempts).
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: neuron.epoch_length default 100 (12-second blocks); forward_max_time 64800s
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: 0.8
    window: null
    notes: 'EMA via constants.alpha (0.8): scores = alpha*new + (1-alpha)*old, followed by a constant
      subtractive decay constants.alpha_decay (0.02) clamped at min 0. Note: config.py also defines unused
      argparse defaults neuron.moving_average_alpha=0.1 and neuron.decay_alpha=0.001, but the live code
      path uses the constants module values.'
anti_gaming:
- kind: deduplication
  enforcement: elimination
  description: validate_model computes a safetensors model hash; duplicate models are detected and the
    later-submitted (higher block) duplicate is treated as INVALID, while the earlier submitter's rewards
    are kept (the other's are popped/zeroed).
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: rejection
  description: validate_model rejects a model if the on-chain committed model hash does not match the
    HuggingFace model hash, or if the model coldkey does not match the miner's coldkey, or if the chain
    commit metadata is missing.
- kind: challenge_period
  enforcement: rejection
  description: A model whose last commit date is after the validator's epoch start time is rejected (start_time_datetime
    < last_commit_date returns False), preventing mid-contest submissions.
- kind: code_inspection
  enforcement: rejection
  description: 'Container size limit: models whose Docker container exceeds max_model_size_gbs (18, +2
    slack) are rejected; run_step also breaks out if container size grows beyond the limit mid-evaluation.'
sub_competitions:
  structure: tiered
  stages: []
  count: 5
  notes: Five reward tiers with a fixed incentive-pool schedule {0:0.5, 1:0.3, 2:0.125, 3:0.05, 4:0.025}.
    Miners are partitioned into tiers by relative score gaps (tier_improvement_threshold=1.08); _adjust_tiers
    re-normalizes the schedule when fewer than five tiers are populated. Also four parallel task families
    (relevancy, hallucination, completeness, attribution) each with their own reward/penalty definitions,
    summed into one per-miner score.
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  - registration_age
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: EMA scores (self.scores) persist across epochs and are loaded from weights.pt when within
    72h; queried_uids and task_repo are reset each epoch (start_over). Submit block (registration/commit
    age) breaks ties within a tier via exponential decay favoring earlier submitters.
  notes: self.scores is the persisted EMA moving average; self.weights persisted up to 72h. Replaced hotkeys
    are zeroed in resync_metagraph.
documentation:

  source_version: null
  primary_docs:

docs.title: Vericore
docs.text:
Subnet dfusionai__Vericore netuid 70 Archetype pipeline Language python Mechanism status partial_burn Task Miners perform semantic fact-checking: given a natural-language statement, a miner returns up to 5 evidence snippets (excerpt + source URL) that either support (entail) or contradict the statement. Validators verify each snippet exists in the cited page, score its semantic relevance with a RoBERTa-l DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: ReferenceModel, OrganicTraffic"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: Deduplication, PlagiarismDetection, DeterministicCheck"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: similarity"]
  M1["Metric: composite"]
  M2["Metric: latency"]
  M3["Metric: composite"]
  M4["Metric: composite"]
  AGG["aggregate: RankBased"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2
  GT --> M2
  G --> M3
  GT --> M3
  G --> M4
  GT --> M4
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  M3 --> AGG
  M4 --> AGG
  AGG --> SM
  SM --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: vericore

    netuid: 70
    lang: python
    status: partial_burn
    submission: signals

    @burn {
        uid: "5FWMeS6ED6NG6t5ovKQNZvGWEWVtZPve5BhYWM9wics5FgJ9"
        fraction: 0.8
    }
    @guards {
        Deduplication {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        PlagiarismDetection {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        StakeWeighting {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score, registration_age }

    Pipeline {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: similarity
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: softmax
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: latency
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: [
            ReferenceModel {
                trust_model: trusted
            },
            OrganicTraffic {
                trust_model: adversarial
            }
        ]
        aggregate: RankBased {
            composition: hybrid
            normalization: other
            decay_rate: 0.5
        }
        smooth: Ema {
            alpha: 0.3
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: per_epoch
            tempo: "tempo+1 blocks"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: none
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: partial_burn
mechanism_status_notes: 'ENABLE_EMISSION_CONTROL is True and EMISSION_CONTROL_PERC = 0.80, so the validator
  allocates 80% of total weight to a fixed emission-control (burn) hotkey first, gives a 1% base pool
  split equally among miners, and distributes the remainder by ranking. The documented full scoring pipeline
  (NLI quality, penalties, speed, ranking) is computed and drives the miner remainder, but the dominant
  emission share is burned. Note: docs claim 50% emission control / 50% to miners, but the live code constant
  is 0.80 burn.'
subnet:
  name: Vericore
  owner_repo: dfusionai__Vericore
  netuid: 70
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: 'Miners perform semantic fact-checking: given a natural-language statement, a miner returns
    up to 5 evidence snippets (excerpt + source URL) that either support (entail) or contradict the statement.
    Validators verify each snippet exists in the cited page, score its semantic relevance with a RoBERTa-large-MNLI
    model (local_score = P(contradiction) + P(entailment)), apply penalties/bonuses, a domain-deduplication
    factor, a speed factor, and desearch/social bonuses, producing a per-request final_score that feeds
    a moving average used to rank miners.'
  submission_format:
  - signals
scoring_signals:
- name: nli_local_score
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: softmax
  notes: local_score = prob_contradiction + prob_entailment from RoBERTa-large-MNLI softmax over [contradiction,
    neutral, entailment]; neutral intentionally excluded. Multiplied (not added) by domain_factor and
    approved_url_multiplier to form snippet_score.
- name: snippet_score
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: snippet_score = local_score * domain_factor * approved_url_multiplier. domain_factor = 1/(2^times_used)
    (first use 1.0, then 0.5, 0.25...). approved_url_multiplier = 3 for approved/social domains else 1.
    Snippets summed into sum_of_snippets.
- name: speed_factor
  metric_kind: latency
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: speed_factor = max(1, 2.0 - (elapse_time / 30.0)); multiplies sum_of_snippets. Faster-than-30s
    responses get up to 2.0x; >=30s clamped to 1.0.
- name: validation_penalties
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: 'Fixed penalty scores assigned per failure: unreachable -10, invalid response -10, snippet==statement
    -10, no snippet/excerpt-too-similar/blacklisted/search/fake/invalid excerpt -5, SSL required -2, snippet-not-in-url
    -1, domain-registered-recently -1. LOWEST_FINAL_SCORE floor = -10.'
- name: desearch_and_social_bonus
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: Miner-level desearch_adjustment = +2 if all desearch proofs valid, -5 if any invalid, 0 otherwise.
    social_bonus_total = +1 per desearch x.com/twitter.com snippet, +0.5 per reddit.com snippet (only
    when proofs valid). final_score = (sum_of_snippets * speed_factor) + desearch_adjustment + social_bonus_total.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: reference_model
  description: RoBERTa-large-MNLI sequence-classification model used to score entailment/contradiction
    between the statement (hypothesis) and miner snippet (premise).
  source_identifier: roberta-large-mnli
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: Softmax over [contradiction, neutral, entailment]; local_score = contra + entail.
- kind: organic_traffic
  description: Live web pages fetched at the miner-supplied URL; the snippet must be verified present
    in the rendered page (exact normalized match or fuzzy partial_ratio >= 0.94).
  source_identifier: miner-supplied evidence URLs (https only)
  trust_model: adversarial
  notes: Domain blacklist, approved-site allowlist, recently-registered-domain and search-page checks.
aggregation:
  method: rank_based
  composition: hybrid
  normalization: other
  normalization_other: weights distributed to sum to DEFAULT_TOTAL_WEIGHT = 65535
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: 0.5
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: 5FWMeS6ED6NG6t5ovKQNZvGWEWVtZPve5BhYWM9wics5FgJ9
    fraction: 0.8
    dynamic: false
    notes: EMISSION_CONTROL_PERC = 0.80 allocated to EMISSION_CONTROL_HOTKEY first. Then 1% base pool
      (BASE_WEIGHT_FRACTION) split equally among miners, remainder distributed by ranking.
  notes: 'distribute_weights_burn_base_remainder: burn 80% to control hotkey, 1% base pool equally to
    miners, remainder ranked geometrically (top gets RANKING_EMISSION_TOP_PERC=0.5 of remainder, each
    next rank half: 0.25, 0.125...). Ranking on the moving-average calculated_score; ties broken by request
    count. Validators and banned hotkeys get 0.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: per_epoch
  method: 'Daemon loop: when blocks_since_last_update > tempo+1, aggregate per-request final_scores into
    moving scores, compute weights via move_miner_weights, then subtensor.set_weights.'
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: tempo+1 blocks
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: 0.3
    window: null
    notes: 'Established miners (count > IMMUNITY_PERIOD=100): calculated_score = prev*INITIAL_WEIGHT(0.7)
      + new*(1-0.7), i.e. new-score weight 0.3. During immunity period (count <= 100): first score sets
      baseline, else prev*(1-IMMUNITY_WEIGHT) + new*IMMUNITY_WEIGHT with IMMUNITY_WEIGHT=0.5.'
anti_gaming:
- kind: deduplication
  enforcement: penalty
  description: 'domain_factor = 1/(2^times_used): repeated use of the same domain within a response halves
    its snippet contribution each time (first 1.0, then 0.5, 0.25...). Social desearch domains exempt.'
- kind: plagiarism_detection
  enforcement: rejection
  description: Snippet must be verified present in the fetched page (exact normalized match or fuzzy partial_ratio
    >= 0.94, min length 25); otherwise SNIPPET_NOT_VERIFIED_IN_URL = -1. FAKE/ UNRELATED snippet classification
    via AI assessment.
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: penalty
  description: Excerpt-too-similar-to-statement (-5), snippet==statement (-10), search-as-evidence (-5),
    blacklisted domain (-5), non-HTTPS URL (-2), recently-registered domain (-1), search web page (-5).
- kind: stake_weighting
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Validators (validator_permit) excluded from weight distribution; banned hotkeys (env BANNED_WALLET_HOTKEYS)
    get 0 weight.
sub_competitions:
  structure: none
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: ''
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  - registration_age
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: Per-UID WeightedMinerRecord holds calculated_score (moving average) and count (requests
    processed). Reset to a fresh record when the UID's hotkey changes. count drives immunity period (first
    100 requests) vs established weighting.
  notes: 'miner_score_cache: list of WeightedMinerRecord{calculated_score, count, wallet_hotkey} per UID.
    count<=IMMUNITY_PERIOD(100) uses immunity weighting, count>100 uses INITIAL_WEIGHT.'

docs.title: DogeLayer
docs.text:
Subnet dogelayer-ai__dogelayer netuid 80 Archetype pipeline Language python Mechanism status mixed Task Miners contribute Scrypt (LTC/DOGE) proof-of-work mining hashrate to the DogeLayer mining pool, registering their work under their Bittensor hotkey (or hotkey.suffix per rig). Validators query the pool proxy API for per-miner share metrics over a time window, convert each miner's accumulated share_v DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: OrganicTraffic, MarketData"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: ProofOfWork, StakeWeighting, Other"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: throughput"]
  AGG["aggregate: Proportional"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  M0 --> AGG
  AGG --> SM
  SM --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: dogeLayer

    netuid: 80
    lang: python
    status: mixed
    submission: compute_service

    @burn {
        uid: "burn_uid (subnet owner UID, resolved from SubnetOwnerHotkey)"
        fraction: dynamic
    }
    @guards {
        ProofOfWork {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        StakeWeighting {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        Other {
            enforcement: elimination
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score }

    Pipeline {
        score: Metric {
            kind: throughput
            direction: higher_is_better
            normalization: none
        }
        groundTruth: [
            OrganicTraffic {
                trust_model: trusted
            },
            MarketData {
                trust_model: oracle
            }
        ]
        aggregate: Proportional {
            composition: weighted_sum
            normalization: sum_to_one
        }
        smooth: Ema {
            alpha: 0.8
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: rate_limited
            tempo: "tempo blocks (weights_interval = self.tempo)"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: none
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: mixed
mechanism_status_notes: Proportional scoring by accumulated fiat share-value is implemented and active,
  but the weight distribution is capped by an economic "value_to_dist" budget and any residual weight
  is assigned to the subnet-owner burn UID. When no miner is mining (total_value == 0) the validator burns
  100% to the burn UID. So the live mechanism mixes active proportional scoring with dynamic residual
  burn and a full-burn fallback.
subnet:
  name: DogeLayer
  owner_repo: dogelayer-ai__dogelayer
  netuid: 80
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners contribute Scrypt (LTC/DOGE) proof-of-work mining hashrate to the DogeLayer mining pool,
    registering their work under their Bittensor hotkey (or hotkey.suffix per rig). Validators query the
    pool proxy API for per-miner share metrics over a time window, convert each miner's accumulated share_value
    into a fiat (USD) value, and accumulate it as a score. Weights are then distributed proportionally
    to accumulated share-value, bounded by an economic budget, with residual emission burned to the subnet
    owner UID.
  submission_format:
  - compute_service
scoring_signals:
- name: share_value_fiat
  metric_kind: throughput
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: none
  notes: Per-miner pool share_value (already computed by the pool from actual work) converted to USD via
    base_value = (share_value / coin_difficulty) * 6.25 * coin_price, then accumulated additively into
    self.scores[uid]. 6.25 is a hardcoded block-reward multiplier; coin_price and coin_difficulty come
    from external APIs. Higher accumulated fiat share-value -> higher weight.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: organic_traffic
  description: Real mining shares/hashrate produced by miners and recorded by the DogeLayer proxy pool;
    validators retrieve per-worker share_value, hashrate and shares via the proxy pool API (get_miner_contributions_timerange)
    keyed by hotkey/worker_id.
  source_identifier: dogelayer.core.pool.proxy (ProxyPool / ProxyPoolAPI)
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: Validators (non-owner) call a shared proxy API URL/token configured in .env; the pool is the
    single source of share metrics, so it is effectively a trusted centralized oracle for work done.
- kind: market_data
  description: External coin price (CoinGecko, with $75 LTC fallback) and current network difficulty used
    to convert raw share_value into a fiat economic value.
  source_identifier: CoinPriceAPI('coingecko'); get_current_difficulty('litecoin')
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: Price fallback hardcoded to 75.0 USD if the API fails or returns 0.
aggregation:
  method: proportional
  composition: weighted_sum
  normalization: sum_to_one
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: burn_uid (subnet owner UID, resolved from SubnetOwnerHotkey)
    fraction: null
    dynamic: true
    notes: 'Two burn paths. (1) Residual burn: remaining = max(0, 1 - sum(weights)) is added to weights[burn_uid].
      (2) Full burn fallback: if total_value (sum of scores) == 0, weights are all zero except weights[burn_uid]
      = 1.0. The distributable share itself is capped by an economic budget value_to_dist = blocks_to_set_for
      * (1 - OWNER_TAKE) * SPLIT_WITH_MINERS * (own_stake_weight / total_stake) * alpha_price, with OWNER_TAKE=0.18,
      SPLIT_WITH_MINERS=0.5, PAYOUT_FACTOR=1.0.'
  notes: 'calculate_weights_distribution: if scaled_total_value (= total_value * PAYOUT_FACTOR) > value_to_dist,
    weights = score / scaled_total_value (proportional, normalized by the larger pool value); else weights
    = (score / total_value) * (scaled_total_value / value_to_dist), scaling the whole distribution down
    by how much of the economic budget was earned. Residual goes to burn UID.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: rate_limited
  method: Direct set_weights over UIDs 0..len(hotkeys)-1 each time blocks_since_last_update >= weights_interval
    (= tempo). Commit-reveal code path exists but is commented out; direct submission is used. Scores
    are reset to zero after a successful weight set.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: tempo blocks (weights_interval = self.tempo)
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: 0.8
    window: null
    notes: self.alpha = 0.8 is set in the validator constructor; however no use of self.alpha was found
      in the read scoring/weighting code (scores accumulate additively and reset after each set_weights).
      Reported as the literal alpha constant but its application is unverified.
anti_gaming:
- kind: proof_of_work
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Rewards are derived from real Scrypt PoW mining share_value recorded by the pool, so a
    miner must contribute actual hashpower to earn score.
- kind: stake_weighting
  enforcement: barrier
  description: The distributable economic budget per validator scales with own_stake_weight / total_stake,
    so a validator's distribution is proportional to its own stake share.
- kind: other
  kind_other: coldkey blocklist (BAD_COLDKEYS) score zeroing
  enforcement: elimination
  description: 'Hardcoded BAD_COLDKEYS blocklist: on state restore, any miner whose coldkey is in BAD_COLDKEYS
    has its score forced to 0.0.'
sub_competitions:
  structure: none
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: ''
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: self.scores accumulates fiat share-value across evaluation windows and is reset to [0.0]*len(hotkeys)
    after each successful set_weights. Restored from saved state unless the validator was down longer
    than tempo*1.5 blocks.
  notes: block_at_registration is tracked and used to resolve duplicate worker IDs (older registration
    wins). last_evaluation_timestamp gates the metrics query window.
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: Subnet 80 (DogeLayer), bittensor 9.10.1
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - docs/running_validator.md
  - docs/running_miner.md
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract
  confidence_overall: high
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '392'
    quote: '- **Subnet ID (netuid)**: 80'
  - claim_field: /subnet/implementation_lang
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: '1'
    quote: '#! /usr/bin/env python3'
  - claim_field: /task/summary
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '12'
    quote: DogeLayer is a Bittensor subnet designed around production of proof-of-work (PoW) mining hashrate
      for Scrypt algorithm (LTC/DOGE).
  - claim_field: /task/submission_format
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '20'
    quote: Validators evaluate miners, ranking (weighting) them by the share-value they've produced over
      each period of time.
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/name
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 274-281
    quote: share_value = metric.get_share_value_fiat(ltc_price, ltc_difficulty) ... self.scores[uid] +=
      share_value
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/notes
    source_path: dogelayer/core/pool/metrics/dogelayer_proxy.py
    line_ref: '47'
    quote: base_value = (self.share_value / coin_difficulty) * 6.25 * coin_price
  - claim_field: /ground_truth_sources/0/kind
    source_path: dogelayer/core/pool/metrics/dogelayer_proxy.py
    line_ref: '86'
    quote: all_workers = pool.get_miner_contributions_timerange(start_time, end_time, coin)
  - claim_field: /ground_truth_sources/1/source_identifier
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: '69'
    quote: self.price_api = CoinPriceAPI("coingecko", None)
  - claim_field: /ground_truth_sources/1/notes
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 256-258
    quote: 'ltc_price = self.price_api.get_price(coin); if ltc_price is None or ltc_price == 0: ltc_price
      = 75.0'
  - claim_field: /aggregation/method
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: '401'
    quote: weights = [score / scaled_total_value for score in self.scores]
  - claim_field: /aggregation/notes
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 398-405
    quote: 'scaled_total_value = total_value * PAYOUT_FACTOR ... if scaled_total_value > value_to_dist:
      weights = [score / scaled_total_value ...] else: weights_to_dist = scaled_total_value / value_to_dist;
      weights = [(score / total_value) * weights_to_dist ...]'
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/enabled
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 407-409
    quote: 'remaining = max(0.0, 1.0 - sum(weights)); if remaining > 0: weights[self.burn_uid] += remaining'
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/notes
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 414-417
    quote: 'if total_value == 0: ... weights = [0.0] * len(self.hotkeys); weights[self.burn_uid] = 1.0'
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/address_or_uid
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 99-101
    quote: self.burn_uid = self.get_burn_uid() ... self.is_subnet_owner = self.burn_hotkey == self.wallet.hotkey.ss58_address
  - claim_field: /aggregation/notes#budget_constants
    source_path: dogelayer/core/constants.py
    line_ref: 10-13
    quote: OWNER_TAKE = 0.18; SPLIT_WITH_MINERS = 0.5; PAYOUT_FACTOR = 1.0
  - claim_field: /aggregation/notes#value_to_dist
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 391-397
    quote: alpha_to_dist = (blocks_to_set_for * (1 - OWNER_TAKE) * SPLIT_WITH_MINERS * (own_stake_weight
      / total_stake)); value_to_dist = alpha_to_dist * alpha_price
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/on_chain_call
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 437-444
    quote: success, err_msg = self.subtensor.set_weights(netuid=..., weights=weights, version_key=VERSION_KEY)
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/tempo_or_interval
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: '73'
    quote: self.weights_interval = self.tempo
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/cadence
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 516-517
    quote: 'if blocks_since_last_weights >= self.weights_interval: success, err_msg = self.set_weights()'
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/method#reset
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 449-450
    quote: self.last_update = self.current_block; self.scores = [0.0] * len(self.hotkeys)
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/smoothing/alpha
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: '70'
    quote: self.alpha = 0.8
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/0/kind
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '12'
    quote: production of proof-of-work (PoW) mining hashrate for Scrypt algorithm (LTC/DOGE)
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/1/description
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 394-395
    quote: '* SPLIT_WITH_MINERS * (own_stake_weight / total_stake)'
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/2/description
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 374-375
    quote: 'if self.metagraph.coldkeys[idx] in BAD_COLDKEYS: self.scores[idx] = 0.0'
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/state_kinds
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: '281'
    quote: self.scores[uid] += share_value
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/reset_policy
    source_path: dogelayer/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 360-363
    quote: 'if blocks_down >= (self.tempo * 1.5): logging.warning(...Starting fresh.); return'
  unresolved:

    code paths read.
