}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: active
mechanism_status_notes: Validator computes per-platform success-only scores from telemetry deltas, applies
  a kurtosis sigmoid curve, and sets them directly on-chain via fiber weights.set_node_weights. No burn
  UID or emission burn was found in the code.
subnet:
  name: Subnet 42 (Gopher / Masa)
  owner_repo: masa-finance__subnet-42
  netuid: 42
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners run a TEE (Intel SGX) job worker that scrapes/indexes data from social and web platforms
    (Twitter/X, TikTok, Reddit, LinkedIn, web, LLM). The validator periodically pulls signed telemetry
    counters from each miner's TEE worker, computes the per-platform delta of successful work units over
    a window, and rewards miners proportionally to their normalized success volume across platforms. Only
    successful work counts; errors do not penalize the score.
  submission_format:
  - compute_service
scoring_signals:
- name: twitter_returned_tweets
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.7
  normalization: min_max
  notes: success_metrics=["tweets"]; raw field twitter_returned_tweets. emission_weight 0.7 (70%). Raw
    success summed, then min-max normalized across nodes before weighting.
- name: twitter_apify_followers
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.05
  normalization: min_max
  notes: platform twitter-apify; success_metrics=["followers"]; emission_weight 0.05.
- name: tiktok_transcriptions
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.05
  normalization: min_max
  notes: platform tiktok-transcription; success_metrics=["transcriptions"]; emission_weight 0.05.
- name: tiktok_returned_videos
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.05
  normalization: min_max
  notes: platform tiktok-search; success_metrics=["videos"]; emission_weight 0.05.
- name: web_scraped_pages
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.05
  normalization: min_max
  notes: platform web; success_metrics=["pages","scraped_pages"]; emission_weight 0.05.
- name: reddit_returned_items
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.05
  normalization: min_max
  notes: platform reddit; success_metrics=["items"]; emission_weight 0.05.
- name: linkedin_returned_profiles
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.05
  normalization: min_max
  notes: platform linkedin; success_metrics=["profiles"]; emission_weight 0.05.
- name: llm_processed_items
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.0
  normalization: min_max
  notes: platform llm; emission_weight 0.0 ("Not scored currently, but tracked for metrics visibility").
    Contributes nothing to weighted score.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: hardware_probe
  description: Telemetry counters are fetched directly from each miner's Intel SGX TEE job worker (gopher-lab/tee-worker)
    via a TEETelemetryClient telemetry sequence; the TEE attestation is the trust anchor that the reported
    scrape counters are genuine.
  source_identifier: TEETelemetryClient / tee-worker (Intel SGX); MASA_TEE_API tee-api.masa.ai
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: Active stat-name (indexer worker_id) and active worker_version are fetched from tee-api.masa.ai
    (/worker-id, /tee-version) and used to gate which source counters are scored.
aggregation:
  method: weighted_average
  composition: weighted_sum
  normalization: min_max
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: false
    address_or_uid: null
    fraction: null
    dynamic: false
    notes: No burn UID or emission burn present in the weight-setting path.
  notes: 'Per platform: raw success-only score = sum of success_metrics; min-max normalized to [0,1] across
    nodes; multiplied by platform.emission_weight (summing to 1.0 across 8 platforms); summed into a combined
    per-node score. The combined scores are then passed through apply_kurtosis_custom (a sigmoid in z-scored
    space with a tanh boost, re-normalized to [0,1]) before being set as on-chain weights. Default kurtosis
    params: top_percentile=95, reward_factor=0.0 (top-percentile emphasis disabled), steepness=1.1, center_sensitivity=0.1,
    boost_factor=0.03.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: rate_limited
  method: set_weights_loop runs every WEIGHTS_LOOP_CADENCE_SECONDS (half a weight-setting period = BLOCKS_PER_WEIGHT_SETTING(100)
    * BLOCK_TIME_SECONDS(12) / 2 = 600s). set_weights checks blocks_since_last_update vs min_interval_to_set_weights
    and sleeps the remainder before pushing.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: 100 blocks per weight setting; loop cadence 600s
  smoothing:
    kind: none
    alpha: null
    window: null
    notes: No EMA/SMA on the final reward. Temporal aggregation is delta accumulation over the telemetry
      window (default 8h expiration), with worker-restart chunking via boot_time and max(0, end-start)
      clamping of each counter delta.
anti_gaming:
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: rejection
  description: '_validate_source_id fails closed: records whose stats_json worker_version does not match
    the active worker_version (from tee-api), or that lack the active indexer source worker, are skipped
    during delta calculation and not scored.'
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: barrier
  description: 'Multi-source amplification guard: when the active indexer source is unknown, telemetry
    is only aggregated if exactly one source is present; otherwise no counters are summed. Counter deltas
    are clamped to max(0, end-start) so resets/decreases cannot inflate scores.'
- kind: hardware_validation
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Counters originate only from an Intel SGX TEE worker via TEETelemetryClient attestation
    sequence; miners cannot self-report arbitrary numbers outside the attested worker.
- kind: stake_weighting
  enforcement: barrier
  description: 'Optional MINER_WHITELIST env var: when set, node_manager filters nodes to whitelisted
    hotkeys only (off by default / empty list).'
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_mechanism
  stages: []
  count: 8
  notes: Eight platform tracks (twitter, twitter-apify, tiktok-transcription, tiktok-search, web, reddit,
    linkedin, llm) are scored independently and combined by fixed emission_weight shares summing to 1.0;
    twitter dominates at 0.7 and llm is currently 0.0.
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: Telemetry entries expire after TELEMETRY_EXPIRATION_HOURS (default 8h); per-counter baseline
    resets on TEE worker restart (boot_time change) within the delta window.
  notes: No persistent per-miner reputation/debt ledger; scoring is a stateless function of the delta
    of telemetry counters accumulated over the current window.
documentation:

docs.title: NOVA
docs.text:
Subnet metanova-labs__nova netuid 68 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status partial_burn Task NOVA (SN68) is an ML-driven drug-discovery competition. Each epoch the validator derives a small-molecule protein target and a nanobody protein target from the start block hash. Miners submit (via GitHub commitments, timelock-encrypted) candidate small molecules (SMILES) and/or nanobody sequences. V DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: ReferenceModel, ReferenceModel"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: CommitReveal, RateLimit, Deduplication"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: regression_error"]
  M1["Metric: composite"]
  AGG["aggregate: WinnerTakeAll"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  AGG --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: nova

    netuid: 68
    lang: python
    status: partial_burn
    submission: [commitment_hash, source_code]

    @burn {
        uid: "0"
        fraction: 0.722
    }
    @guards {
        CommitReveal {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        RateLimit {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        Deduplication {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
    }

    Multiplex<multi_mechanism> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: regression_error
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: lower_is_better
                normalization: rank
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: [
            ReferenceModel {
                trust_model: trusted
            },
            ReferenceModel {
                trust_model: trusted
            }
        ]
        aggregate: WinnerTakeAll {
            composition: hybrid
            normalization: none
        }
        smooth: None {}
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: per_epoch
            tempo: "epoch_length blocks (config.epoch_length, default 361)"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: multi_mechanism
            count: 2
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: partial_burn
mechanism_status_notes: A fixed burn_rate of 0.722 is assigned to UID 0 every epoch; the remaining ~0.278
  of emission is split between the molecule winner and nanobody winner (nanobody_weight = 0.6). When no
  valid winner exists for a category, that category's incentive is also routed to the burn UID 0. An emission-override
  path can instead route the non-burn weight entirely to a configured UID (override_uid = 61) while paying
  winners off-chain via bounty payouts.
subnet:
  name: NOVA
  owner_repo: metanova-labs__nova
  netuid: 68
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: NOVA (SN68) is an ML-driven drug-discovery competition. Each epoch the validator derives a
    small-molecule protein target and a nanobody protein target from the start block hash. Miners submit
    (via GitHub commitments, timelock-encrypted) candidate small molecules (SMILES) and/or nanobody sequences.
    Validators validate submissions against physicochemical/structural requirements, then score molecules
    with the Boltz2 model (binding affinity metrics) and nanobodies with the BoltzGen model (confidence
    / physical interaction / developability metrics). For each of the two categories the rank-1 (best)
    UID is the winner and receives that category's share of the non-burned emission; everything else and
    any empty category goes to burn.
  submission_format:
  - commitment_hash
  - source_code
  extensions:
    notes: Submissions are GitHub repos referenced by encrypted on-chain commitments (gather_and_decrypt_commitments);
      content is SMILES strings (molecules) and amino-acid sequences (nanobodies).
scoring_signals:
- name: boltz_affinity
  metric_kind: regression_error
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: Small-molecule score. boltz_metric = ["affinity_probability_binary", "affinity_pred_value"],
    combination_strategy = "heavy_atom_normalization", boltz_mode = "max". Per-target scores are averaged
    then summed into final_molecule_score; ranking uses boltz_mode (max = higher is better).
- name: boltzgen_nanobody_score
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: rank
  notes: 'Nanobody score from BoltzGen, ranked with boltzgen_rank_mode = "min" and boltzgen_rank_by =
    "rank_sum". Built from category metrics: confidence (design_iiptm, design_ptm, design_to_target_iptm,
    min_design_to_target_pae, interaction_pae), physical_interaction (plip_hbonds_refolded, plip_saltbridge_refolded,
    delta_sasa_refolded) and developability (liability_score, liability_num_violations). Tie-breaks: confidence
    -> physical_interaction -> developability rank sums -> block_submitted -> push_time -> uid.'
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: reference_model
  description: Boltz2 structure/affinity prediction model used to score small-molecule binding to the
    epoch's protein target.
  source_identifier: boltz (external_tools/boltz)
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: boltz_metric affinity_probability_binary / affinity_pred_value.
- kind: reference_model
  description: BoltzGen model used to fold/analyze nanobody designs against the target and produce confidence
    / physical-interaction / developability metrics.
  source_identifier: boltzgen (external_tools/boltzgen)
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: per_nanobody_components rank sums per category.
aggregation:
  method: winner_take_all
  composition: hybrid
  normalization: none
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '0'
    fraction: 0.722
    dynamic: false
    notes: 'weights[0] = burn_rate = 0.722 set unconditionally each epoch. The remaining 1.0 - burn_rate
      is split: molecule_incentive = (1.0-burn_rate)*(1.0-nanobody_weight); nanobody_incentive = (1.0-burn_rate)*nanobody_weight,
      with nanobody_weight = 0.6. A category''s incentive is added back to weights[0] (burn) if that category
      has no winner.'
  notes: Two independent winner-take-all competitions (molecule, nanobody). Only the rank-1 UID per category
    receives weight; no gradient over runners-up. Ranking per category is by summed/averaged model scores
    with deterministic tie-breaks.
weight_setting:
  cadence: per_epoch
  method: At each epoch boundary (current_block % epoch_length == 0) the validator scores submissions,
    picks rank-1 winners for molecules and nanobodies, builds a weight vector with weights[0]=0.722 and
    the per-category incentives on the winning UIDs, and calls subtensor.set_weights with retry (max 10
    attempts, 12s apart).
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: epoch_length blocks (config.epoch_length, default 361)
  smoothing:
    kind: none
    alpha: null
    window: null
    notes: Weights recomputed fresh each epoch; no EMA/SMA over the final reward.
  extensions:
    emission_override: If emission_override_enabled (payout.enabled), the entire 1.0-burn_rate is assigned
      to emission_override_uid (override_uid = 61) and the actual winners are paid off-chain via dispatch_bounty_payouts
      instead of on-chain weight.
anti_gaming:
- kind: commit_reveal
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Submissions are timelock-encrypted GitHub commitments decrypted by the validator (QuicknetBittensorDrandTimelock
    / gather_and_decrypt_commitments), preventing copying before reveal.
- kind: rate_limit
  enforcement: rejection
  description: 'no_submission_blocks = 10: submissions within the last no_submission_blocks before epoch
    end are excluded (max_block = current_block - config.no_submission_blocks).'
- kind: deduplication
  enforcement: rejection
  description: Duplicate molecules within a submission and chemically identical molecules (same InChIKey)
    are rejected; nanobody submissions are checked for duplicate sequences and near-identical prior submissions
    (whole-sequence / CDR3 identity tiers via is_duplicate). max_similarity_score = 0.95 vs top sequences.
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: rejection
  description: Molecule requirements (min_heavy_atoms=10, rotatable bonds 1..10, banned_atom_types Se/Na/Fe/Zn,
    allowed reaction per epoch) and nanobody requirements (length 90..150, cysteine pairing, homopolymer/di-repeat
    limits, signal-peptide rejection, nativeness>=0.45, human framework>=0.75, VHH hallmark residues)
    gate validity before scoring.
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_mechanism
  stages:
  - name: small_molecule
    role: main
    advancement_rule: rank-1 by Boltz2 affinity (boltz_mode=max) wins molecule share
  - name: nanobody
    role: main
    advancement_rule: rank-1 by BoltzGen rank_sum (rank_mode=min) wins nanobody share
  count: 2
  notes: 'Two parallel categories run each epoch with split incentive: molecule share = 1 - nanobody_weight
    = 0.4 of the non-burn pool, nanobody share = nanobody_weight = 0.6.'
per_miner_state:
  tracked: false
  state_kinds: []
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: ''
  notes: Scoring is recomputed per epoch from current submissions; no persistent per-miner ledger/reputation
    observed in the weight path. block_submitted / push_time are used only as within-epoch tie-breakers.
documentation:
  status: code_authoritative
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - docs/VALIDATOR.md
  - docs/nanobody_stragegy_guide.md
  - config/config.yaml
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract / claude-opus-4-8
  extracted_at: '2026-06-06'
  confidence_overall: high
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '1'
    quote: '# NOVA - SN68'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /subnet/implementation_lang
    source_path: neurons/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 1-6
    quote: 'import bittensor as bt

      import torch'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /task/summary
    source_path: neurons/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 85-102
    quote: challenge_params = get_challenge_params_from_blockhash(block_hash=start_block_hash, small_molecule_target=config.small_molecule_target,
      nanobody_target=config.nanobody_target ...)
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /task/submission_format
    source_path: neurons/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 105-107
    quote: uid_to_data, current_commitments, decrypted_submissions, push_timestamps = await gather_and_decrypt_commitments(subtensor,
      metagraph, config.netuid, ...)
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/fraction
    source_path: neurons/validator/weights.py
    line_ref: '23'
    quote: burn_rate = 0.722
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/address_or_uid
    source_path: neurons/validator/weights.py
    line_ref: '56'
    quote: weights[0] = burn_rate
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/notes
    source_path: neurons/validator/weights.py
    line_ref: 41-44
    quote: molecule_proportion = 1.0 - config.nanobody_weight ... molecule_incentive = (1.0 - burn_rate)
      * molecule_proportion; nanobody_incentive = (1.0 - burn_rate) * nanobody_proportion
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /aggregation/method
    source_path: neurons/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 200-209
    quote: winner_molecules = next((uid for uid, r in molecule_ranks.items() if r == 1), None); winner_nanobodies
      = next((uid for uid, r in nanobody_ranks.items() if r == 1), None)
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /aggregation/notes
    source_path: neurons/validator/weights.py
    line_ref: 79-87
    quote: 'if winner_molecules is not None: weights[winner_molecules] += molecule_incentive else: weights[0]
      += molecule_incentive'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/notes
    source_path: config/config.yaml
    line_ref: boltz2_config
    quote: 'boltz_metric: ["affinity_probability_binary", "affinity_pred_value"]  combination_strategy:
      "heavy_atom_normalization"  boltz_mode: max'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/direction
    source_path: neurons/validator/ranking.py
    line_ref: 164,191
    quote: mode = _config_get(config, 'boltz_mode', 'max') ... primary = -score if mode == "max" else
      score
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/1/notes
    source_path: neurons/validator/ranking.py
    line_ref: 8,156-161
    quote: NANOBODY_TIEBREAK_CATEGORIES = ("confidence", "physical_interaction", "developability")
    confidence: high

docs.title: Minos
docs.text:
Subnet minos-protocol__minos_subnet netuid 107 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status partial_burn Task Miners perform hyperparameter search for state-of-the-art variant-calling tools (GATK HaplotypeCaller, Google DeepVariant, BCFtools; FreeBayes deprecated) and submit only the tool config they used. Every ~72-minute round the platform generates a fresh challenge genome (BAM) with hidden synthetic mut DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: DeterministicDataset"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: DeterministicCheck, LivenessCheck, RateLimit"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: accuracy"]
  M1["Metric: accuracy"]
  M2["Metric: accuracy"]
  M3["Metric: accuracy"]
  M4["Metric: accuracy"]
  M5["Metric: accuracy"]
  AGG["aggregate: WinnerTakeAll"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2
  GT --> M2
  G --> M3
  GT --> M3
  G --> M4
  GT --> M4
  G --> M5
  GT --> M5
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  M3 --> AGG
  M4 --> AGG
  M5 --> AGG
  AGG --> SM
  SM --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: minos

    netuid: 107
    lang: python
    status: partial_burn
    submission: source_code

    @burn {
        uid: "burn_uid (from platform network config)"
        fraction: dynamic
    }
    @guards {
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        LivenessCheck {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        RateLimit {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        Other {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score, performance_ledger }

    Multiplex<per_task_type> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: accuracy
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: accuracy
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: accuracy
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: accuracy
                direction: lower_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: accuracy
                direction: target_band
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: accuracy
                direction: lower_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: DeterministicDataset {
            trust_model: trusted
        }
        aggregate: WinnerTakeAll {
            composition: weighted_sum
            normalization: sum_to_one
            decay_rate: 0.8
        }
        smooth: Ema {
            alpha: 0.1
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: per_round
            tempo: "per ~72-minute round; chain-side weights_rate_limit enforced before submit"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: per_task_type
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: partial_burn
mechanism_status_notes: Documented scoring (hap.py + AdvancedScorer + EMA) actively drives weights, but
  in normal mode the validator burns the large majority of emission. Code defaults burn 87% of weight,
  give the top eligible miner 10%, and split the remaining 3% as ranked pruning dust (utils/weight_tracking.py
  DEFAULT_BURN_RATE/DEFAULT_WINNER_WEIGHT). At runtime the actual burn_rate/winner_weight/dust params
  are fetched from the platform network config (neurons/validator.py get_network_config) and are authoritative,
  so the literal split can differ from these defaults; weight submission fails closed if that config is
  missing.
subnet:
  name: Minos
  owner_repo: minos-protocol__minos_subnet
  netuid: 107
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners perform hyperparameter search for state-of-the-art variant-calling tools (GATK HaplotypeCaller,
    Google DeepVariant, BCFtools; FreeBayes deprecated) and submit only the tool config they used. Every
    ~72-minute round the platform generates a fresh challenge genome (BAM) with hidden synthetic mutations
    injected at read level via HelixForge. Validators download each miner's submitted config, re-run the
    variant caller trustlessly on the BAM, and score the resulting VCF against the platform's truth data
    with hap.py. Miners never upload outputs.
  submission_format:
  - source_code
  submission_format_other: ''
scoring_signals:
- name: f1_snp
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: SNP F1 from hap.py (synthetic-only filtered metrics). Feeds Core F1 component (truth-weighted
    with INDEL) and reported as snp_final. Core F1 has 60% of AdvancedScorer.
- name: f1_indel
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: INDEL F1 from hap.py. Combined with f1_snp into truth-weighted weighted_f1 for the Core F1 component;
    also reported as indel_final.
- name: completeness
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.15
  normalization: none
  notes: Mean of recall (gamma=3.0 emphasis) and coverage=1-frac_na (gamma=2.0 emphasis). Completeness
    component, 15% of AdvancedScorer.
- name: fp_rate
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: 0.15
  normalization: none
  notes: Penalizes false-positive rate above target and call-count deviating from truth count (size_ratio).
    Exponential penalties; 15% of AdvancedScorer.
- name: quality_ratios
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: target_band
  weight: 0.1
  normalization: none
  notes: Ti/Tv and Het/Hom ratio match penalties (exp(-|delta|/tolerance), tolerances 0.1 / 0.15). Quality
    component, 10% of AdvancedScorer.
- name: overcall_penalty
  metric_kind: accuracy
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: Guardrail subtracted from the final 0-100 score. Triggers when region FP-per-target > 10 and
    SNP FP-per-target > 6; penalty = min(45.0, (fp_per_target - 10.0) * 4.0).
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: deterministic_dataset
  kind_other: ''
  description: Per-round merged truth VCF (GIAB benchmark + synthetic mutations injected by HelixForge)
    plus a mutations-only VCF, downloaded from the platform via presigned URLs. hap.py scores the miner
    VCF against this using the RTG vcfeval engine and a GRCh38 reference + SDF.
  source_identifier: GIAB GRCh38 v4.2.1 benchmark + HelixForge synthetic mutations (platform truth VCF)
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: Synthetic variants carry a 'SYNTHETIC' INFO flag; scoring is restricted to the synthetic mutation
    regions (mutations VCF defines evaluation scope). SHA256-verified downloads.
aggregation:
  method: winner_take_all
  method_other: ''
  composition: weighted_sum
  composition_other: ''
  normalization: sum_to_one
  normalization_other: ''
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: 0.8
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: burn_uid (from platform network config)
    fraction: 0.87
    dynamic: true
    notes: Code default DEFAULT_BURN_RATE = 0.87. At runtime burn_rate/burn_uid come from the platform
      network config and are authoritative; the residual unallocated dust is also routed to burn (burn_weight
      = max(0, 1 - sum(weights)); burn_hotkey += burn_weight), so the effective burn is a computed residual
      on top of the configured floor.
  notes: 'Normal mode: rank #1 eligible miner gets winner_weight (default 0.10) of the full vector; ranks
    #2..dust_top_n (default 10) split the remaining miner budget (1 - burn_rate - winner) by geometric
    decay base dust_decay (default 0.80). Warmup mode (before any miner is eligible): non-burn miner budget
    split 50/30/20 among top 3 active miners by EMA. A platform-derived canonical ranking can override
    the local rank-1 winner within a 0.02 EMA tiebreak tolerance.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: per_round
  cadence_other: ''
  method: Per scoring round, after all assigned miners (primary + secondary) are scored and peer backfill
    scores are fetched, ScoreTracker.get_winner_heavy_pruning_dust_weights builds the absolute weight
    vector (burn + winner + pruning dust), and set_weights submits it on chain. Weight params (burn_rate,
    winner_weight, dust_top_n, dust_decay) are fetched from the platform network config; missing config
    fails closed (no weights set).
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: per ~72-minute round; chain-side weights_rate_limit enforced before submit
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    kind_other: ''
    alpha: 0.1
    window: null
    notes: ema = (1 - alpha) * ema + alpha * combined_final, alpha = GENOMICS_CONFIG['ema_alpha'] = 0.1
      (env EMA_ALPHA override). combined_final = advanced_score / 100. Absent miners' EMA decays by DEFAULT_DECAY_FACTOR
      = 0.95 each missed round (env EMA_DECAY_FACTOR override); EMA below 1e-6 is dropped.
anti_gaming:
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: rejection
  enforcement_other: ''
  description: Validators re-run each miner's submitted config trustlessly on the same BAM rather than
    accepting miner-uploaded outputs; scoring uses the RTG vcfeval engine (required, no xcmp fallback)
    for deterministic, reproducible comparison. hap.py and bcftools Docker images are pinned (hap.py by
    SHA256 digest) for reproducibility.
- kind: liveness_check
  enforcement: penalty
  enforcement_other: ''
  description: Eligibility requires scoring in at least 10 of the last 20 rounds (MIN_PARTICIPATION_ROUNDS
    / PARTICIPATION_WINDOW). Below-threshold miners get 0 weight in normal mode. Absent miners' EMA decays
    x0.95 each missed round, preventing stale high scores from holding weight.
- kind: rate_limit
  enforcement: barrier
  enforcement_other: ''
  description: Tool config keys are whitelisted (ALLOWED_CONFIG_KEYS) before execution to prevent param
    injection; region strings are validated; on-chain set_weights respects the chain weights_rate_limit
    with exponential-backoff retry.
- kind: other
  kind_other: overcall_guardrail
  enforcement: penalty
  enforcement_other: ''
  description: Overcall guardrail subtracts up to 45 points from the final score when a miner floods the
    challenge region with false positives (region FP-per-target > 10 and SNP FP-per-target > 6), discouraging
    gaming recall by over-calling variants.
sub_competitions:
  structure: per_task_type
  structure_other: ''
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: A single scoring pipeline, but miners choose among multiple variant-calling tool templates (gatk,
    deepvariant, bcftools; freebayes deprecated 2026-05-09). All tools are scored by the same AdvancedScorer;
    no separate per-tool weighting or multipliers. README also describes a future phase where miners submit
    custom algorithms once the hyperparameter space is saturated (not yet implemented in this code).
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  - performance_ledger
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: EMA persists across rounds (recoverable from platform state on restart). Absent miners
    decay x0.95/round and are dropped when EMA < 1e-6. Participation tracked over a sliding 20-round window.
  notes: Per-hotkey EMA score, last raw score, and round participation history (ScoreTracker). Miners
    keyed by ss58 hotkey for stability across metagraph resyncs.
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - docs/architecture.md
  - docs/tuning_guide.md
  completeness: high
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract / claude-opus-4-8
  extracted_at: '2026-06-06'
  confidence_overall: high
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '19'
    quote: '**Subnet 107** on Bittensor mainnet (finney).'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /subnet/implementation_lang
    source_path: neurons/validator.py

    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /task/summary

    quote: Every 72 minutes, the platform generates a fresh challenge genome (BAM file) containing hidden

    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /task/submission_format
    source_path: README.md

    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/name

  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/2/weight

  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/3/weight

  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/4/weight

  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/5/notes

    quote: 'if fp_per_target > 10.0 and snp_fp_per_target > 6.0: overcall_penalty = min(45.0, (fp_per_target

  - claim_field: /ground_truth_sources/0/description

    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /ground_truth_sources/0/notes
    source_path: utils/scoring.py
    line_ref: '176'
    quote: 'if ''SYNTHETIC'' in info:'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /aggregation/method

  - claim_field: /aggregation/decay_rate

  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/dynamic

    confidence: high

    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /mechanism_status

    confidence: high

docs.title: HODL - The Alpha Exchange and ETF Subnet
docs.text:
Subnet mobiusfund__etf netuid 118 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status mixed Task Zero-code mining. Under V1 (ETF) a miner stakes TAO (via its coldkey) into one of five supported TrustedStake alpha indexes; reward grows with stake amount and stake duration, incentivizing long-term conviction. Under V2 (IMM) a miner fills buy/sell orders on the HODL Exchange and is rewarded by fil DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: MarketData, OrganicTraffic"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: Deduplication, Other, Other"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: other"]
  M1["Metric: volume"]
  AGG["aggregate: Proportional"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  AGG --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: hodlTheAlphaExchangeAndEtfSubnet

    netuid: 118
    lang: python
    status: mixed
    submission: other

    @burn {
        uid: "0"
        fraction: dynamic
    }
    @guards {
        Deduplication {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        Other {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        Other {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        RiskLimit {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        Other {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
    }

    Multiplex<multi_mechanism> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: other
                raw: "stake_amount_with_duration_bonus"
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: other
            },
            Metric {
                kind: volume
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: other
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: [
            MarketData {
                trust_model: oracle
            },
            OrganicTraffic {
                trust_model: trusted
            }
        ]
        aggregate: Proportional {
            composition: hybrid
            normalization: l1
        }
        smooth: None {}
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: rate_limited
            tempo: "twice per hour (minute==20 or 50)"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: multi_mechanism
            count: 2
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: mixed
mechanism_status_notes: 'Two live scoring mechanisms split by a dynamic API-driven ratio [burn, etf, imm]:
  V1 ETF (stake-amount x duration bonus) and V2 IMM (order-fill volume). A burn UID (BRN_UID=0) receives
  an emission share sized by ratio[0]. The repo README states the current split as ETF=0.75, IMM=0.25,
  but the literal burn fraction is fetched at runtime from an API (IMM_RATIO), so the live burn fraction
  is not a source constant. The template reward.py (query*2) is unused boilerplate; the real scoring lives
  in ETF/core/functions.py and is wired in via Validator.score overriding self.scores.'
subnet:
  name: HODL - The Alpha Exchange and ETF Subnet
  owner_repo: mobiusfund__etf
  netuid: 118
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Zero-code mining. Under V1 (ETF) a miner stakes TAO (via its coldkey) into one of five supported
    TrustedStake alpha indexes; reward grows with stake amount and stake duration, incentivizing long-term
    conviction. Under V2 (IMM) a miner fills buy/sell orders on the HODL Exchange and is rewarded by fill
    volume in a rolling time window. Total emissions are split between ETF and IMM by a runtime ratio,
    with a residual share burned to a burn UID.
  submission_format:
  - other
  submission_format_other: On-chain stake delegation into supported indexes (V1) and order-fill activity
    on an off-chain escrow order book (V2); no axon responses are scored.
scoring_signals:
- name: etf_stake_conviction
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: stake_amount_with_duration_bonus
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: other
  normalization_other: Per-coldkey score divided by hotkey count, then per-index rescaled so each index's
    total equals INDEX_RATIO (equal 1/5 split) of the overall ETF score sum.
  notes: scoring(bal, blk) = bal**GAMMA * (1 + KAPPA*log(1 + min((mg.block-blk)/7200, DMAX)/DNORM)). GAMMA=1.00,
    KAPPA=0.25, DNORM=30, DMAX=36500. bal is coldkey stake value in TAO across subnets; (mg.block-blk)/7200
    is stake duration in days. Matches README formula score = S*(1 + 0.25*ln(1 + D/30)).
- name: imm_fill_volume
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: other
  normalization_other: Per-coldkey total fill volume in a rolling window (sell volume capped by coldkey
    stake held), then rescaled so the IMM score sum equals ratio[2]/ratio[1] times the ETF score sum;
    divided by hotkey count.
  notes: Volume is summed fill 'tao' over IMM_DATA in a rolling window (IMM_WINDOW days, README says currently
    5). For buy orders (type 2) the counted volume is min(filled, stake still held in coldkey). Only coldkeys
    NOT staked in an ETF index are counted.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: market_data
  description: On-chain stake amounts and durations read from the Bittensor metagraph / subtensor ('finney'),
    priced via subnet alpha prices (nn[s.netuid].price).
  source_identifier: bt.Subtensor('finney'); st.get_stake_info_for_coldkey; st.all_subnets()
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: Stake value = sum(stake * subnet alpha price) per coldkey.
- kind: organic_traffic
  description: Order-fill volume and rolling-window data from the HODL Exchange escrow order book, fetched
    from subnet118.com APIs; index membership and blacklist from TrustedStake admin APIs.
  source_identifier: https://api.subnet118.com/imm/{data,window,ratio}; https://api.app.trustedstake.ai/admin/{blacklist,indexes}
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: INDEX_IDS lists the five supported TrustedStake index delegate ss58 addresses; COLDKEY_BL is
    an admin blacklist of coldkeys.
aggregation:
  method: proportional
  composition: hybrid
  normalization: l1
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '0'
    fraction: null
    dynamic: true
    notes: BRN_UID=0 score set to sc['score'].sum()/sum(ratio[1:])*ratio[0] (else 1.0 when sum(ratio[1:])==0).
      ratio=[burn, etf, imm] is fetched from IMM_RATIO at runtime (default [1.0,0.0,0.0] on failure ->
      all miner scores zeroed, full burn). If ratio[1]==0 ETF scores are zeroed; if ratio[2]==0 IMM scores
      are zeroed. README states current ETF=0.75, IMM=0.25 but the literal burn fraction is API-driven,
      not a source constant.
  notes: Final per-UID score = ETF score, overridden by IMM score where a coldkey has IMM activity (sc.loc[~sc['score2'].isna(),
    'score'] = sc['score2']), plus the BRN_UID burn share. Weights are then L1-normalized in BaseValidatorNeuron.set_weights
    (raw_weights = scores/norm).
weight_setting:
  cadence: rate_limited
  method: Validator.score() runs only when the wall-clock minute is 20 or 50 (twice hourly) plus a random
    20-50s jitter, then sets self.scores = fn.score() directly (no moving-average in this override path).
    BaseValidatorNeuron.set_weights L1-normalizes scores and emits.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: twice per hour (minute==20 or 50)
  smoothing:
    kind: none
    alpha: null
    window: null
    notes: 'The base template''s update_scores EMA (moving_average_alpha) is bypassed: Validator.score
      assigns self.scores = fn.score() directly each cycle. fn.score recomputes from current on-chain/API
      state with no temporal smoothing of the final reward.'
anti_gaming:
- kind: deduplication
  enforcement: penalty
  description: Per-coldkey score is divided by the number of registered hotkeys (sc['count']), so splitting
    one coldkey across many hotkeys does not increase total reward.
- kind: other
  kind_other: blacklist_exclusion
  enforcement: rejection
  description: Coldkeys on the TrustedStake admin blacklist (COLDKEY_BL) are excluded from ETF index delegator
    sets before scoring.
- kind: other
  kind_other: cross_mechanism_exclusivity
  enforcement: barrier
  description: A coldkey staked in an ETF index is not counted for IMM (IMM uses only coldkeys with index
    isna()), preventing double counting across V1 and V2.
- kind: risk_limit
  enforcement: penalty
  description: For IMM buy orders the counted volume is capped at the stake the coldkey still holds (d2['volume']
    = min(volume, stake)); assets bought must remain in the coldkey during the window to count.
- kind: other
  kind_other: stake_duration_requirement
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Stake start block is floored at FIRST_BLOCK; duration = (mg.block - blk)//7200 days, rewarding
    long-held stake. Scores are NaN/zero when mg.block <= blk.
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_mechanism
  stages:
  - name: ETF
    role: main
  - name: IMM
    role: main
  count: 2
  notes: 'Two coexisting mechanisms (V1 ETF, V2 IMM) sharing emissions by the runtime ratio, with a burn
    share to BRN_UID. README roadmap: V1 ETF live, V2 HODL Exchange Q1 2026, V3 futures/options Q3 2026.'
per_miner_state:
  tracked: false
  state_kinds: []
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: ''
  notes: No persistent per-miner ledger in the scoring code; every cycle fn.score() recomputes from current
    chain/API state. Stake duration is derived from on-chain stake start block, not a locally maintained
    ledger.
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: V1 live; V2 HODL Exchange transition (per README roadmap and FAQ)
  primary_docs:
  - README.md

docs.title: Investing - Decentralized AUM
docs.text:
Subnet mobiusfund__investing netuid 88 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status active Task Miners submit investment/portfolio allocation strategies (asset weight dictionaries) filed under Investing/strat/, which are submitted to the subnet API. The subnet simulates daily PnL of each strategy over a rolling window (50 days) across asset classes (Tao/Alpha staking and US stocks) and rewards DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: MarketData"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: Deduplication, LivenessCheck, StakeWeighting"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: composite"]
  M1["Metric: risk_adjusted_ratio"]
  M2["Metric: risk_adjusted_ratio"]
  M3["Metric: win_rate"]
  M4["Metric: pnl"]
  AGG["aggregate: Proportional"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2
  GT --> M2
  G --> M3
  GT --> M3
  G --> M4
  GT --> M4
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  M3 --> AGG
  M4 --> AGG
  AGG --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: investingDecentralizedAum

    netuid: 88
    lang: python
    status: active
    submission: signals

    @burn {
        uid: "0"
        fraction: dynamic
    }
    @guards {
        Deduplication {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        LivenessCheck {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        StakeWeighting {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        RiskLimit {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
    }
    @state { performance_ledger, registration_age }

    Multiplex<multi_asset> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: risk_adjusted_ratio
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: risk_adjusted_ratio
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: win_rate
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: pnl
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: MarketData {
            trust_model: trusted
        }
        aggregate: Proportional {
            composition: multiplicative
            normalization: l1
        }
        smooth: None {
            window: 50
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: rate_limited
            tempo: "every 30 min (minutes 25 and 55)"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: multi_asset
            count: 2
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: active
mechanism_status_notes: Live validator (neurons/validator.py::Validator.score) overrides the template
  loop and computes scores every 30 minutes from the subnet API (pnl/dist/days/ratio), via Investing/core/etc.score.
  A Dynamic Emission Control (DEC) routes a dynamic fraction of emission to UID 0 when the network is
  inactive, and assigns UID 0 the entire weight when no miner has a positive score — a conditional burn-like
  behavior, not a fixed full burn.
subnet:
  name: Investing - Decentralized AUM
  owner_repo: mobiusfund__investing
  netuid: 88
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners submit investment/portfolio allocation strategies (asset weight dictionaries) filed
    under Investing/strat/, which are submitted to the subnet API. The subnet simulates daily PnL of each
    strategy over a rolling window (50 days) across asset classes (Tao/Alpha staking and US stocks) and
    rewards risk-adjusted performance. The composite score combines MAR (return/drawdown), an lsr term
    (~Sharpe), Kelly-normalized winning odds, and daily compounded return, with further multiplicative
    adjustments for direction, deduplication/similarity, inactivity, and cash allocation, then partitions
    emissions across asset classes by an asset ratio.
  submission_format:
  - signals
scoring_signals:
- name: composite_strategy_score
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: none
  notes: simst.score() returns score = mar * lsr * odds * daily; clamped to 0 when <= 0. See Investing/core/simst.py
    score().
- name: mar
  metric_kind: risk_adjusted_ratio
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: mar = gain / max(risk, risk_init / days**0.5); risk = drawdown of pnl%. Multiplicative factor
    of the composite. risk_init constant RISK_INIT_DTAO/STK = 5 (const.py).
- name: lsr
  metric_kind: risk_adjusted_ratio
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: lsr = sum(pnl) / sum(|pnl|); documented as >0.99 correlated to Sharpe ratio (README Scoring).
- name: odds
  metric_kind: win_rate
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: odds = 50 + kelly(prob, pavg/lavg)/2*100; Kelly-normalized winning odds. Clamped to 0 if <=0.
- name: daily_return
  metric_kind: pnl
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: daily = ((1 + gain/100)**(1/days) - 1)*100; daily compounded return percentage.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: market_data
  description: Daily price / PnL data for Tao/Alpha (dtao) and US stocks pulled from the subnet API and
    an auto-updated local market database (SimSt.fetchda / fetchdb). Score calculation runs daily at 00:00
    UTC (Tao/Alpha) and 06:00 UTC (US stocks) per README.
  source_identifier: http://api.investing88.ai (API_ROOT)
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: Validator fetches pnl/dist/days/ratio from the API endpoints (Investing/core/api.py). The API
    server is operated by the subnet owner (Mobius Fund).
aggregation:
  method: proportional
  composition: multiplicative
  normalization: l1
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '0'
    fraction: null
    dynamic: true
    notes: 'DEC (Dynamic Emission Control): dec = (sc[''last''].sum()/(sc[''days'']+1).sum())**DEC_DECAY
      with DEC_DECAY=3; if dec > DEC_CUTOFF (0.03), score[DEC_UID]=sum(score)*dec/(1-dec) routed to DEC_UID=0.
      If no miner has a positive score, score[DEC_UID]=1 (UID 0 gets all weight). Constants in const.py;
      logic in etc.score().'
  notes: 'Final per-asset-class scaling: for each asset a, score *= ra[a] * total_score / asset_total,
    partitioning emissions by the asset ratio ra fetched from the API. Raw scores are L1-normalized into
    weights by the template set_weights (raw_weights = self.scores / ||scores||_1). Multiple multiplicative
    gates applied in etc.score(): close-direction flag c, dedupe factor, DEC1 inactivity decay, cash-allocation
    factor.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: rate_limited
  method: Validator.score() (neurons/validator.py) runs every 30 min (waits for minute in [25,55] plus
    a random delay), fetches API data, and assigns self.scores = etc.score(pl, ab, da, ra, n). The template
    BaseValidatorNeuron.set_weights L1-normalizes self.scores and calls subtensor.set_weights.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: every 30 min (minutes 25 and 55)
  smoothing:
    kind: none
    alpha: null
    window: 50
    notes: 'The live validator overrides the loop and overwrites self.scores wholesale from etc.score()
      each cycle, so the template EMA (moving_average_alpha default 0.1 in update_scores) is NOT applied
      to the final score. Instead, temporal smoothing is built into the metric: pl2sc applies a rolling
      window of WIN_SIZE_DTAO/STK = 50 days over daily PnL before scoring.'
anti_gaming:
- kind: deduplication
  enforcement: penalty
  description: dedupe() penalizes strategies overly similar to pre-existing ones using allocation distance
    and block timing. A new/revised strategy too similar to an existing one receives a reduced score.
    dd = min((du.min()/bb[i]/DAYS_FINAL)**DD_POWER, 1) with DD_POWER=1, DAYS_FINAL=30, DD_TRIGGER=0.01
    (const.py); score *= dedupe (etc.score).
- kind: liveness_check
  enforcement: penalty
  description: 'DEC1 inactivity decay: dec1 = (sc[''last'']/DEC1_CLIFF)**DEC1_DECAY with DEC1_CLIFF=20,
    DEC1_DECAY=2; for miners with days > DEC1_START (5), score *= 1 - clip(dec1, 0, 1). Encourages active
    rebalancing. README: dec = (last_active/20)**2.'
- kind: stake_weighting
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Each miner requires a certain amount of alpha token stake to curb UID spam (README Mining).
- kind: risk_limit
  enforcement: penalty
  description: 'Daily profit outliers are clipped (CLIP_OUTLIERS=2 days) in pl2sc to reduce short-term
    random effects, and a new miner''s score is limited: score *= (days/DAYS_FINAL)**DAYS_DELAY for days
    < DAYS_FINAL (30), DAYS_DELAY=1 (const.py / simst.pl2sc).'
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: penalty
  description: 'Cash-allocation factor: score *= ((1 - cash)**CASH_DECAY).clip(CASH_RESIDUE, 1), CASH_DECAY=1,
    CASH_RESIDUE=0.01, to discourage holding cash (etc.score / const.py).'
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_asset
  stages: []
  count: 2
  notes: 'UID space and subnet emissions are partitioned by asset class (asset ratio ra). Two asset classes
    are implemented: Tao/Alpha staking (a=0) and US stocks (a=1), with separate risk_init and window constants
    (RISK_INIT_DTAO/STK, WIN_SIZE_DTAO/STK) and separate daily score timing. README Roadmap describes
    phased expansion to more asset classes.'
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - performance_ledger
  - registration_age
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: Template resets scores for replaced hotkeys (resync_metagraph zeroes scores when a hotkey
    changes). A newly registered miner goes live after day 1 with a 3-day immunity period (README Mining).
  notes: Daily PnL history is accumulated per miner (pl/sc tables) and a rolling 50-day window is scored.
    'days' (registration/active age) gates DEC1, the new-miner score limit, and the immunity period.

docs.title: Investing - Decentralized AUM
docs.text:
Subnet mobiusfund__staking netuid 88 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status partial_burn Task Miners submit investment strategies (asset-allocation tables / portfolios) for an asset class of their choice — Tao/Alpha staking (asset 0) or US stocks (asset 1) — in a high-fidelity simulated trading environment. Each strategy is a dict mapping assets to allocation weights (negative for shorts), f DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: MarketData"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: Deduplication, StakeWeighting, LivenessCheck"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: risk_adjusted_ratio"]
  M1["Metric: risk_adjusted_ratio"]
  M2["Metric: probabilistic_forecast"]
  M3["Metric: pnl"]
  M4["Metric: other"]
  M5["Metric: other"]
  AGG["aggregate: Proportional"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2
  GT --> M2
  G --> M3
  GT --> M3
  G --> M4
  GT --> M4
  G --> M5
  GT --> M5
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  M3 --> AGG
  M4 --> AGG
  M5 --> AGG
  AGG --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: investingDecentralizedAum

    netuid: 88
    lang: python
    status: partial_burn
    submission: signals

    @burn {
        uid: "0"
        fraction: dynamic
    }
    @guards {
        Deduplication {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        StakeWeighting {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        LivenessCheck {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
    }
    @state { performance_ledger, cumulative_score, registration_age }

    Multiplex<multi_asset> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: risk_adjusted_ratio
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: risk_adjusted_ratio
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: probabilistic_forecast
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: pnl
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: other
                family: market_outcome
                specific: directional_correctness
                raw: "binary_close_above_open"
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: other
                family: financial_pnl
                specific: cash_allocation_penalty
                raw: "cash_allocation_penalty"
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: MarketData {
            trust_model: trusted
        }
        aggregate: Proportional {
            composition: multiplicative
            normalization: l1
        }
        smooth: None {
            window: 50
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: daily
            tempo: "daily score calc 00:00 UTC (Tao/Alpha), 06:00 UTC (US stocks)"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: multi_asset
            count: 2
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: partial_burn
mechanism_status_notes: 'The documented scoring algorithm is live and drives weights (validator.score()
  overwrites self.scores with etc.score(...), which the base set_weights() L1-normalizes onto chain).
  A Dynamic Emission Control (DEC) burn routes a computed residual to DEC_UID=0: when dec > DEC_CUTOFF
  (0.03), score[0] = sum(score) * dec / (1 - dec), and if no miner scores anything, score[0] = 1 (full
  burn fallback). The template EMA update_scores() and the toy reward() (1.0 if response == query*2) are
  dead code: the live validator overrides the loop (validator.concurrent_forward = lambda: ...) and writes
  self.scores directly, bypassing the moving average.'
subnet:
  name: Investing - Decentralized AUM
  owner_repo: mobiusfund__staking
  netuid: 88
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners submit investment strategies (asset-allocation tables / portfolios) for an asset class
    of their choice — Tao/Alpha staking (asset 0) or US stocks (asset 1) — in a high-fidelity simulated
    trading environment. Each strategy is a dict mapping assets to allocation weights (negative for shorts),
    filed as a file under Investing/strat/ and resubmitted on file-timestamp change ("active rebalancing").
    Validators replay strategies against market data, compute daily PnL, and score on a composite of return,
    risk, volatility, drawdown, and timeframe.
  submission_format:
  - signals
scoring_signals:
- name: mar
  metric_kind: risk_adjusted_ratio
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: return% / max(risk%, risk_init/sqrt(days)); risk% is max drawdown. risk_init = 5 for both Tao/Alpha
    and US stocks (RISK_INIT_DTAO/RISK_INIT_STK). Multiplicative factor in score.
- name: lsr
  metric_kind: risk_adjusted_ratio
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: Loss/Sum Ratio = sum(pnl) / sum(|pnl|); README states >0.99 correlated to Sharpe (lsr ~= sharpe/11).
    Multiplicative factor in score.
- name: odds
  metric_kind: probabilistic_forecast
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: odds% = 50 + kelly(prob, pavg/lavg)/2*100, Kelly-normalized winning odds; clipped to 0 if <=0.
    Multiplicative factor in score.
- name: daily
  metric_kind: pnl
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: daily% = ((1 + gain/100)^(1/days) - 1) * 100, compounded daily return. Multiplicative factor
    in score. score = mar * lsr * odds * daily; clipped to 0 if <=0.
- name: close_binary
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: binary_close_above_open
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: '''c'' = int(swap_close[-1] >= swap_open[0]); score is multiplied by this 0/1 gate (a strategy
    ending below its starting value is zeroed). etc.score: sc[''score''] *= sc[''c''].'
- name: cash_alloc_factor
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: cash_allocation_penalty
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: score *= ((1 - cash)^CASH_DECAY).clip(CASH_RESIDUE, 1) with CASH_DECAY=1, CASH_RESIDUE=0.01;
    penalizes idle-cash allocations, floor 0.01.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: market_data
  description: 'Simulated trading against historical market data: hourly precision for dtao (Tao/Alpha
    staking dividends from validator delegation at default 18% take), 30-minute precision for US stocks
    (benchmark SPY). Daily OCHL/PnL DBs fetched from api.investing88.ai.'
  source_identifier: api.investing88.ai
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: VALI_TAKE = 0.18, TAO_WEIGHT = 0.18. Stock benchmark STK_BENCH='SPY', tz America/New_York. Validator
    computes daily score at 00:00 UTC (Tao/Alpha) and 06:00 UTC (US stocks).
aggregation:
  method: proportional
  composition: multiplicative
  normalization: l1
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '0'
    fraction: null
    dynamic: true
    notes: 'DEC (Dynamic Emission Control). DEC_UID=0. dec = (sum(last)/sum(days+1))^DEC_DECAY with DEC_DECAY=3;
      if dec > DEC_CUTOFF (0.03): score[0] = sum(score)*dec/(1-dec), routing a computed residual to UID
      0 to penalize stale (non-rebalanced) miners collectively. If no miner scores, score[0] = 1 (full
      burn fallback). Residual fraction is dynamic, not a fixed literal.'
  notes: 'Composite score = mar * lsr * odds% * daily%, then sequentially multiplied by gates: c (binary
    close>=open), dedupe (similarity/anti-dup factor in [0,1]), DEC1 stale-decay (1 - clip((last/ DEC1_CLIFF)^DEC1_DECAY,
    0,1) when days>DEC1_START), cash factor, and a new-miner ramp ((days/DAYS_FINAL)^DAYS_DELAY when days<DAYS_FINAL=30).
    Per-asset emission partition: within each asset a, scores rescaled so each asset''s share equals ra[a]
    (asset ratio), i.e. score *= ra[a]* scz/sca. Final weights = L1 norm of self.scores in base set_weights()
    (raw_weights = scores/norm).'
weight_setting:
  cadence: daily
  method: 'Validator overrides the template loop: score() waits until minute 25 or 55, calls etc.score(pl,
    ab, da, ra, n) to compute self.scores directly (NOT the template EMA), and the base set_weights()
    L1-normalizes self.scores into raw_weights = scores / ||scores||_1 then emits via subtensor.set_weights.
    Daily score calculation at 00:00 UTC (Tao/Alpha) / 06:00 UTC (stocks).'
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: daily score calc 00:00 UTC (Tao/Alpha), 06:00 UTC (US stocks)
  smoothing:
    kind: none
    alpha: null
    window: 50
    notes: 'No EMA in the live path: the template base update_scores() applies an EMA (alpha*reward +
      (1-alpha)*scores) but is bypassed — score() overwrites self.scores wholesale. A 50-day rolling window
      (WIN_SIZE_DTAO/WIN_SIZE_STK=50) is applied to PnL inside pl2sc() (dd[-win_size:]) before scoring;
      recorded here as window=50. Outlier clip CLIP_OUTLIERS=2 days.'
anti_gaming:
- kind: deduplication
  enforcement: penalty
  description: 'dedupe() in etc.py: strategies with allocation distance below DD_TRIGGER (0.01) to another
    miner''s strategy get a dedupe factor in [0,1] = min((block-gap / bb / DAYS_FINAL)^DD_POWER, 1), DD_POWER=1;
    score *= dedupe. README: "a new or revised strategy that is overly similar to a pre-existing one will
    receive a reduced score." Black/whitelist override dedupe to 0/1.'
- kind: stake_weighting
  enforcement: barrier
  description: 'README: "To curb UID spam, each miner requires a certain amount of alpha token stake.
    The total required stake is reflected on the coldkey." Required stake enforced off the scored path.'
- kind: liveness_check
  enforcement: penalty
  description: 'DEC / DEC1 stale-strategy decay: miners that stop rebalancing (large ''last active'' value)
    are penalized. DEC1: score *= 1 - clip((last/DEC1_CLIFF)^DEC1_DECAY, 0, 1) for days>DEC1_START=5 (DEC1_CLIFF=20,
    DEC1_DECAY=2). DEC routes collective residual emission to UID 0.'
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_asset
  stages: []
  count: 2
  notes: 'UID space and emissions partitioned by asset class via asset ratio ra (api.investing88.ai/ratio):
    asset 0 = Tao/Alpha staking, asset 1 = US stocks (an=2). Each asset''s emission share is forced to
    ra[a] by rescaling scores within the asset (score *= ra[a]*scz/sca). Per-asset constants: RISK_INIT,
    WIN_SIZE differ by class (both 5 / 50 here).'
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - performance_ledger
  - cumulative_score
  - registration_age
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: '50-day rolling PnL window per strategy. New miners: 3-day immunity, go live on dashboard
    after day 1; score ramped by (days/30)^DAYS_DELAY while days<DAYS_FINAL=30. Base validator zeroes
    self.scores for replaced hotkeys on metagraph resync.'
  notes: Persistent PnL/score history per uid maintained via daily DB (pnl.col, score.col). Registration
    age (days) gates the new-miner score ramp and DEC1 onset (days>5).
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: simst 1.4.0
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - Investing/doc/Subnet88.md
  - Investing/core/etc.py
  - Investing/core/simst.py
  - Investing/core/const.py
  completeness: high
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract / claude-opus-4-8
  extracted_at: '2026-06-06'
  confidence_overall: medium
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '69'
    quote: '--netuid 88 #339 --subtensor.network test'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /subnet/name
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '3'
    quote: '# Investing - Decentralized AUM'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /task/summary
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '87'
    quote: When a strategy is filed under the `Investing/strat/` directory, it will be automatically submitted
      by the miner.
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /task/submission_format

docs.title: Synth Subnet
docs.text:
Subnet mode-network__synth-subnet netuid None Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status unknown Task Miners produce probabilistic forecasts of an asset's future price movements: for each checking prompt they generate multiple simulated Monte-Carlo price paths (1000 paths) for an asset over a fixed time increment and horizon (e.g. BTC/ETH/XAU/SOL/... at 5-minute steps for 24 hours, or a 1-hour high- DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: MarketData"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: DeterministicCheck, Other"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: other"]
  AGG["aggregate: Softmax"]
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  M0 --> AGG
  AGG --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: synthSubnet

    netuid: -
    lang: python
    status: unknown
    submission: signals

    @guards {
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        Other {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
    }
    @state { performance_ledger, cumulative_score }

    Multiplex<multi_mechanism> {
        score: Metric {
            kind: other
            family: probabilistic_forecast
            specific: crps
            raw: "probabilistic_forecast_crps"
            direction: lower_is_better
            normalization: other
        }
        groundTruth: MarketData {
            trust_model: oracle
        }
        aggregate: Softmax {
            normalization: softmax
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: per_round
            tempo: "total_cycle_minutes=60 (low-frequency) / 10 (high-frequency); scoring loop runs every hour"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: multi_mechanism
            count: 2
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
subnet:
  name: Synth Subnet
  owner_repo: mode-network__synth-subnet
  netuid: null
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: 'Miners produce probabilistic forecasts of an asset''s future price movements: for each checking
    prompt they generate multiple simulated Monte-Carlo price paths (1000 paths) for an asset over a fixed
    time increment and horizon (e.g. BTC/ETH/XAU/SOL/... at 5-minute steps for 24 hours, or a 1-hour high-frequency
    variant at 1-minute steps). After the horizon elapses, validators score each miner''s ensemble against
    the realized price path using the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS) computed on price changes
    (in basis points) over several time intervals; lower CRPS is better. Per-request scores are capped/shifted,
    rolled into a per-miner moving average over a multi-day window with per-asset weights, and converted
    to emission weights via softmax.'
  submission_format:
  - signals
scoring_signals:
- name: crps_total
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: probabilistic_forecast_crps
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: other
  notes: 'Normalization (no single enum fits): per-request CRPS sum is percentile-capped (worst 10% to
    90th pct) and best-score-subtracted, then a rolling per-asset-weighted average is softmaxed into reward
    weights. CRPS itself is the Continuous Ranked Probability Score computed per scoring interval on price
    changes in basis points (and absolute-price intervals scaled by 1/last_price*10_000), summed over
    all intervals per prompt, via crps_ensemble from the `properscoring` package. Lower is better; a miner
    failing format/timeliness is assigned -1 internally and later mapped to the 90th-percentile score.'
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: market_data
  description: Realized close prices fetched after the forecast horizon. Most assets come from the Pyth
    benchmarks TradingView history API; WTIOIL comes from the Hyperliquid candle snapshot API. Prices
    are aligned to the prompt's timestamp grid (start_time, time_length, time_increment).
  source_identifier: https://benchmarks.pyth.network/v1/shims/tradingview/history ; https://api.hyperliquid.xyz/info
  trust_model: oracle
aggregation:
  method: softmax
  normalization: softmax
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: false
    address_or_uid: null
    fraction: null
    notes: ''
  notes: 'Per request: order miners by CRPS sum, cap the worst 10% to the 90th percentile, subtract the
    lowest (best) score so the best miner scores 0; invalid/missing miners get the 90th-percentile score.
    Then a per-miner rolling average over a window (10 days low-frequency / 3 days high- frequency) weighted
    by per-asset coefficients (BTC=1.0, others fixed constants). Final reward weight = softmax(beta *
    rolling_avg) with beta = -0.1 (low-freq) / -0.2 (high-freq), each scaled by smoothed_score_coefficient
    = 0.5; low- and high-frequency reward weights for the same miner are summed (50%/50% emissions split).
    README states beta = 0.1 in the emission formula e^{-beta L}. decay_rate is null: README describes
    recent performance "weighted more heavily through an exponential decay function", but the extracted
    code implements a flat (uniform) rolling average over the window with no explicit per-sample decay
    constant or numeric decay_rate literal.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: per_round
  method: update_scores() assigns the combined reward weights directly into self.scores (no on-neuron
    EMA despite the docstring); set_weights() L1-normalizes scores to raw_weights, runs process_weights_for_netuid
    and convert_weights_and_uids_for_emit, then calls subtensor.set_weights with version_key=self.spec_version.
    The validator loops "every hour" requesting predictions and scoring matured (>=24h-old) predictions.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: total_cycle_minutes=60 (low-frequency) / 10 (high-frequency); scoring loop runs every
    hour
anti_gaming:
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: rejection
  description: 'validate_responses_v2 checks the response is a tuple/list, that the start-time timestamp
    and time_increment match the prompt, that the number of paths equals num_simulations, and that each
    path has the expected number of time points and well-formed prices (<=8 digits). Failing responses
    are marked not "CORRECT" and scored -1 (later mapped to the 90th-percentile penalty score). README:
    "If they fail to return predictions by the start_time or the predictions are in the wrong format,
    they will be scored 0 for that prompt."'
- kind: other
  kind_other: worst-score penalty for missing/late/invalid responses
  enforcement: penalty
  description: Miners that are invalid, late, or in the worst 10% are assigned the 90th-percentile CRPS
    score; new miners are backfilled with the worst score (percentile90 - lowest_score) for window timestamps
    before they joined so they are not advantaged by having fewer data points; miners with no valid scores
    in the window get an infinite rolling average (worst possible).
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_mechanism
  stages:
  - name: low (24-hour horizon)
    role: main
    advancement_rule: ''
    multipliers:
      emissions_share: 0.5
      softmax_beta: -0.1
      window_days: 10
  - name: high (1-hour HFT horizon)
    role: main
    advancement_rule: ''
    multipliers:
      emissions_share: 0.5
      softmax_beta: -0.2
      window_days: 3
  count: 2
  notes: 'Two parallel competitions (LOW_FREQUENCY and HIGH_FREQUENCY prompt configs) run simultaneously
    and each cover several assets; reward weights from both are summed per miner. README: "24-Hour Predictions:
    50% of total emissions / 1-Hour HFT Predictions: 50% of total emissions".'
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - performance_ledger
  - cumulative_score
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: Per-request scores are persisted and retained for data_retention_days (12 low / 4 high);
    the rolling average only includes requests within window_days (10 low / 3 high) of scored_time. On
    deregistration / hotkey replacement self.scores[uid] is zeroed in resync_metagraph.
  notes: The validator stores historic per-request CRPS scores per miner in a database (MinerDataHandler
    / SQL); leaderboard (rolling-average) score is recomputed each cycle from the stored per-request scores.
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - docs/validator_guide.md
  - docs/miner_tutorial.md
  - docs/miner_reference.md
  - Synth Whitepaper v1.pdf
  completeness: high

  - 'aggregation.decay_rate: README mentions an exponential decay function, but extracted code uses a
    flat windowed rolling average with no decay-rate literal.'
  - 'aggregation.min_weight_floor: no minimum-weight floor literal found in extracted code.'
  - 'burn_allocation: no burn / owner-take found in extracted reward or weight-setting code.'
  - README emission formula states beta=0.1 while prompt_config sets softmax_beta=-0.1 (low) / -0.2 (high);

    confidence: high
