docs.title: Bittensor Subnet Taoillium
docs.text:
Subnet taoillium__bittensor-subnet-taoillium netuid None Archetype pipeline Language python Mechanism status mixed Task Miners serve an axon answering a ServiceProtocol synapse (health/ping message types). The validator selects miner UIDs (from an external service API list or random sampling), pings them, then submits the uids/responses to an external service API endpoint (/sapi/node/task/validate) which returns per- DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: Other, Other"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: StakeWeighting, LivenessCheck"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: other"]
  M1["Metric: other"]
  AGG["aggregate: WeightedAverage"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  AGG --> SM
  SM --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: bittensorSubnetTaoillium

    netuid: -
    lang: python
    status: mixed
    submission: api_response

    @guards {
        StakeWeighting {
            enforcement: other
        }
        LivenessCheck {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score }

    Pipeline {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: other
                raw: "per-uid numeric value returned by external service API /sapi/node/task/validate"
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: min_max
            },
            Metric {
                kind: other
                raw: "normalized on-chain stake share (metagraph.S[uids] / sum)"
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: min_max
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: [
            Other {
                trust_model: oracle
            },
            Other {
                trust_model: trusted
            }
        ]
        aggregate: WeightedAverage {
            composition: hybrid
            normalization: l1
        }
        smooth: Ema {
            alpha: 0.1
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: per_epoch
            tempo: "epoch_length default 100 blocks (clamped to chain tempo if smaller)"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: none
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: mixed
mechanism_status_notes: Documented scoring is delegated to an external service API (/sapi/node/task/validate)
  whose logic is not in this repo; the in-repo reward() in template/validator/reward.py is the unmodified
  Yuma-template dummy (response == query*2) and is not called. The live validator blends external API
  rewards with stake-based rewards (default 50/50) and falls back to pure stake-weighting when the external
  API returns no usable values, so on-chain emission can be stake-driven rather than performance-driven.
subnet:
  name: Bittensor Subnet Taoillium
  owner_repo: taoillium__bittensor-subnet-taoillium
  netuid: null
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners serve an axon answering a ServiceProtocol synapse (health/ping message types). The validator
    selects miner UIDs (from an external service API list or random sampling), pings them, then submits
    the uids/responses to an external service API endpoint (/sapi/node/task/validate) which returns per-uid
    numeric values. Those values are normalized to rewards. What is actually rewarded (the substance of
    the task) lives in the off-repo service backend, not in this template.
  submission_format:
  - api_response
scoring_signals:
- name: external_service_value
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: per-uid numeric value returned by external service API /sapi/node/task/validate
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.5
  normalization: min_max
  notes: Validator computes rewards = [x/total for x in values] (proportional normalization), then in
    update_scores weights this by external_reward_weight (default 0.5). The semantics of the value are
    defined by the off-repo service, not in this codebase.
- name: stake_share
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: normalized on-chain stake share (metagraph.S[uids] / sum)
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.5
  normalization: min_max
  notes: _calculate_stake_rewards normalizes metagraph stake to sum-to-one; weighted by (1 - external_reward_weight)
    = 0.5 by default, and used alone when external rewards sum to 0.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: other
  kind_other: external service API (off-repo backend)
  description: The validator POSTs uids/responses to /sapi/node/task/validate via ServiceApiClient and
    trusts the returned 'values' as the scoring ground truth. The scoring logic is not in this repository.
  source_identifier: /sapi/node/task/validate
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: Also fetches the candidate uid list from /sapi/node/neuron/list-valid.
- kind: other
  kind_other: on-chain stake (metagraph.S)
  description: Stake values read from the metagraph, used as the fallback/secondary scoring source.
  source_identifier: metagraph.S
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: ''
aggregation:
  method: weighted_average
  composition: hybrid
  normalization: l1
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: false
    address_or_uid: null
    fraction: null
    dynamic: false
    notes: No burn / no UID-zero allocation present in code.
  notes: combined_rewards = external_weight * rewards + (1 - external_weight) * stake_rewards, with external_weight
    = external_reward_weight (default 0.5). If sum(external rewards) <= 0, combined = stake_rewards only.
    The per-step combined rewards feed an EMA (see weight_setting.smoothing). In set_weights, the EMA
    scores are L1-normalized (norm = ||scores||_1) before being passed to process_weights_for_netuid.
weight_setting:
  cadence: per_epoch
  method: raw_weights = scores / L1-norm(scores); process_weights_for_netuid(); convert_weights_and_uids_for_emit();
    subtensor.set_weights(version_key=spec_version).
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: epoch_length default 100 blocks (clamped to chain tempo if smaller)
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: 0.1
    window: null
    notes: self.scores = alpha * scattered_rewards + (1 - alpha) * self.scores, alpha = neuron.moving_average_alpha
      (default 0.1).
anti_gaming:
- kind: stake_weighting
  enforcement: other
  enforcement_other: stake mixed into score (default 50%) and used as sole fallback
  description: Stake-based rewards are blended at (1 - external_reward_weight) = 0.5 of the score and
    become the entire score when external rewards are invalid/empty, biasing emission toward higher stake.
- kind: liveness_check
  enforcement: rejection
  description: _filter_valid_axons drops UIDs whose axon is 0.0.0.0 or port 0; validator's own UID is
    filtered out of the scored set; dendrite ping has a 15s timeout producing success=False responses.
sub_competitions:
  structure: none
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: ''
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: On metagraph resync, scores[uid] is zeroed when the hotkey at that uid changes; scores
    array is grown (zero-filled) when the metagraph grows. State (step, scores, hotkeys) persisted to
    state.npz.
  notes: EMA moving-average score per uid is the only tracked per-miner state.
documentation:
  status: code_authoritative
  source_version: template __version__ 0.0.1
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - template/base/validator.py
  - neurons/validator.py
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract
  confidence_overall: medium
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/implementation_lang
    source_path: neurons/validator.py
    line_ref: '27'
    quote: import bittensor as bt
  - claim_field: /mechanism_status
    source_path: neurons/validator.py
    line_ref: 186-189
    quote: 'When validation conditions are not met, use empty rewards (will trigger stake-only scoring)
      ... empty_rewards = [0.0] * len(uids)  # Empty rewards to trigger stake-only mode'
  - claim_field: /task/submission_format
    source_path: neurons/validator.py
    line_ref: 163-168
    quote: result = self.api_post("/sapi/node/task/validate", data) ... values = result.get('values',
      [])
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/normalization
    source_path: neurons/validator.py
    line_ref: 173-176
    quote: 'if len(values) == len(uids) and result.get(''uids'') == uids and total > 0: ... rewards =
      [x / total for x in values]'
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/weight
    source_path: template/utils/config.py
    line_ref: 218-223
    quote: --neuron.external_reward_weight ... Weight for external rewards in hybrid scoring (0.0 to 1.0).
      The remaining weight goes to stake-based rewards. default=0.5
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/1/notes
    source_path: template/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 486-487
    quote: "# Normalize stake values to [0, 1] range (sum to 1)\n        stake_rewards = stake_values\
      \ / total_stake"
  - claim_field: /ground_truth_sources/0/source_identifier
    source_path: neurons/validator.py
    line_ref: '106'
    quote: result = client.get("/sapi/node/neuron/list-valid")
  - claim_field: /aggregation/notes
    source_path: template/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 437-438
    quote: "stake_weight = 1.0 - external_weight\n            combined_rewards = external_weight * rewards\
      \ + stake_weight * stake_rewards"
  - claim_field: /aggregation/method
    source_path: template/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 444-447
    quote: "# Use only stake-based rewards when external rewards are invalid\n            combined_rewards\
      \ = stake_rewards"
  - claim_field: /aggregation/normalization
    source_path: template/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 294-301
    quote: norm = np.linalg.norm(self.scores, ord=1, axis=0, keepdims=True) ... raw_weights = self.scores
      / norm
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/on_chain_call
    source_path: template/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 328-336
    quote: result, msg = self.subtensor.set_weights(wallet=self.wallet, netuid=self.config.netuid, uids=uint_uids,
      weights=uint_weights, ... version_key=self.spec_version,)
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/smoothing/alpha
    source_path: template/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 457-463
    quote: 'alpha: float = self.config.neuron.moving_average_alpha ... self.scores = (alpha * scattered_rewards
      + (1 - alpha) * self.scores)'
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/smoothing/alpha#default
    source_path: template/utils/config.py
    line_ref: 211-216
    quote: --neuron.moving_average_alpha ... Moving average alpha parameter, how much to add of the new
      observation. default=0.1
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/tempo_or_interval
    source_path: template/utils/config.py
    line_ref: 84-89
    quote: --neuron.epoch_length ... The default epoch length (how often we set weights, measured in 12
      second blocks). default=100
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/cadence
    source_path: template/base/neuron.py
    line_ref: 289-290
    quote: 'if (self.block - self.metagraph.last_update[self.uid]) > self.get_epoch_length():'
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/1/description
    source_path: neurons/validator.py
    line_ref: 308-311
    quote: 'if axon.ip == "0.0.0.0" or axon.port == 0: ... else: valid_uids.append(uid_int)'
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/reset_policy
    source_path: template/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 371-373
    quote: 'for uid, hotkey in enumerate(self.hotkeys): if hotkey != self.metagraph.hotkeys[uid]: self.scores[uid]
      = 0  # hotkey has been replaced'
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/notes
    source_path: template/base/validator.py
    line_ref: 499-504
    quote: np.savez(self.config.neuron.full_path + "/state.npz", step=self.step, scores=self.scores, hotkeys=self.hotkeys,)
  - claim_field: /mechanism_status_notes
    source_path: template/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: 33-35
    quote: 'rewards val: {1.0 if response == query * 2 else 0} ... return 1.0 if response == query * 2
      else 0'
  unresolved:
  - 'subnet.netuid: not pinned in repo (config default --netuid 1 is the Yuma-template placeholder, not
    an asserted live netuid).'
  - 'Substance of the external service scoring (/sapi/node/task/validate): logic lives in an off-repo
    backend; cannot cite its scoring formula.'
  - 'min_weight_floor / decay_rate / temperature: no such constants present in code.'
composition:
  shape: pipeline
  overlays:
  - guards
  - state
  extern_count: 2

docs.title: Taonado Cash
docs.text:
Subnet taonado__taonado-cash netuid 113 Archetype pipeline Language typescript Mechanism status mixed Task Miners deposit/lock TAO (as WTAO and into the Taonado zk-mixer pools) and associate their depositing EVM (H160) address with their Bittensor ss58 hotkey via the DepositTracker contract. A miner's score is the total WTAO balance plus lifetime mixer deposits across all EVM addresses associated with th DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: Other"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: RateLimit, Other, Other"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: volume"]
  AGG["aggregate: Proportional"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  M0 --> AGG
  AGG --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: taonadoCash

    netuid: 113
    lang: typescript
    status: mixed
    submission: other

    @burn {
        uid: "burn_uid (uint16, commented as *should* be 0)"
        fraction: dynamic
    }
    @guards {
        RateLimit {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        Other {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        Other {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score, other }

    Pipeline {
        score: Metric {
            kind: volume
            direction: higher_is_better
            normalization: other
        }
        groundTruth: Other {
            trust_model: trusted
        }
        aggregate: Proportional {
            composition: weighted_sum
            normalization: other
        }
        smooth: None {}
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: rate_limited
            tempo: "113 blocks"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: none
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: mixed
mechanism_status_notes: 'Scoring is fully on-chain and active: weights are the sum of WTAO balance plus
  lifetime deposits of each hotkey''s associated depositor addresses, normalized to uint16. When total
  allocated deposits fall below the owner-set depositGoal, the shortfall (depositGoal - totalAllocated)
  is assigned to burn_uid, dynamically burning the excess emissions. So a proportional-to-deposit reward
  and a dynamic burn coexist.'
subnet:
  name: Taonado Cash
  owner_repo: taonado__taonado-cash
  netuid: 113
  implementation_lang: typescript
task:
  summary: Miners deposit/lock TAO (as WTAO and into the Taonado zk-mixer pools) and associate their depositing
    EVM (H160) address with their Bittensor ss58 hotkey via the DepositTracker contract. A miner's score
    is the total WTAO balance plus lifetime mixer deposits across all EVM addresses associated with their
    hotkey. Larger / more persistent deposits earn proportionally more emission. There is no off-chain
    model or content submission; "mining" is supplying liquidity to the privacy pools.
  submission_format:
  - other
  submission_format_other: on-chain TAO/WTAO deposit + EVM-to-hotkey association
scoring_signals:
- name: associated_deposit_balance
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: other
  normalization_other: L1 / sum-to-denominator scaling to uint16 at aggregation
  notes: Per-hotkey weight = sum over up to MAX_ASSOCIATIONS_PER_HOTKEY (100) associated depositor addresses
    of (wtao.balanceOf(depositer) + taonado.totalLifetimeDeposits(depositer)). Computed entirely on-chain
    in WeightsV3.getWeights().
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: other
  kind_other: on_chain_token_balance
  description: On-chain WTAO ERC20 balances and the totalLifetimeDeposits ledger of the Taonado mixer
    contract, joined to hotkeys through the DepositTracker associations and the metagraph hotkey table.
    No external oracle; the chain state is authoritative.
  source_identifier: WTAO / Taonado / DepositTracker / Metagraph precompile (0x0802)
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: ''
aggregation:
  method: proportional
  composition: weighted_sum
  normalization: other
  normalization_other: 'scaled to uint16: weight_i = unnormalizedWeight_i * type(uint16).max / denominator,
    where denominator = max(totalAllocated, depositGoal)'
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: burn_uid (uint16, commented as *should* be 0)
    fraction: null
    dynamic: true
    notes: When totalAllocated < depositGoal, weights[burn_uid] = depositGoal - totalAllocated, so the
      residual below the deposit goal is burned. burn_uid value is a contract state variable (no literal
      initializer in source); comment notes it *should* be 0.
  notes: Weights summed per uid then divided by denominator = max(totalAllocated, depositGoal) and multiplied
    by uint16 max. uid 0 is skipped in the per-uid loops (loops start at 1).
weight_setting:
  cadence: rate_limited
  method: On-chain. EvmValidator.setWeights()/operatorSetWeights() reads WeightsV3.getNormalizedWeights()
    and calls the Neuron precompile (0x0804) setWeights. Any EVM wallet may call setWeights() and is paid
    a TAO bounty (gas refund + setWeightsBounty); if the caller's hotkey is in the metagraph it receives
    metagraph_boost_value added to its weight. operatorSetWeights() is owner-only.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: 113 blocks
  smoothing:
    kind: none
    alpha: null
    window: null
    notes: No EMA. Off-chain scripts re-set weights every ~113 blocks; contract enforces a minimum setWeightsBlockInterval
      between calls (value is owner-set state, no literal in source).
anti_gaming:
- kind: rate_limit
  enforcement: barrier
  description: setWeightsIntervalPassed modifier requires block.number >= lastSetWeightsBlock + setWeightsBlockInterval;
    nonReentrant guard on setWeights.
- kind: other
  kind_other: per_hotkey_association_cap
  enforcement: barrier
  description: MAX_ASSOCIATIONS_PER_HOTKEY = 100 caps how many depositor addresses contribute to a single
    hotkey's weight, limiting unbounded association farming.
- kind: other
  kind_other: dynamic_burn_to_goal
  enforcement: penalty
  description: If total associated deposits are below the owner-set depositGoal, the shortfall is routed
    to burn_uid, reducing emissions until the network meets the liquidity goal.
sub_competitions:
  structure: none
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: ''
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  - other
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: totalLifetimeDeposits is monotonic (incremented by denomination on each deposit, never
    decremented). An EVM address, once associated to a hotkey, cannot be reassigned.
  notes: Per-depositor totalLifetimeDeposits ledger lives in the Taonado mixer contract; current WTAO
    balance is live ERC20 state; associations are stored in DepositTracker.
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - ARCHITECTURE.md
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract
  confidence_overall: medium
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: config-example.ts
    line_ref: '10'
    quote: 'const netuid: BigNumberish = "0x71"; //local = 0x2, testnet = 0x15B, mainnet = 0x71 (SN113)'
  - claim_field: /subnet/implementation_lang
    source_path: package.json
    line_ref: '1'
    quote: '(locate.py: implementation_lang typescript; contracts in Solidity, scripts/tests in TypeScript)'
  - claim_field: /task/summary
    source_path: ARCHITECTURE.md
    line_ref: 105-108
    quote: Earn emissions based on deposited TAO; Scoring logic is completely isolated from funds; Weights
      are calculated on-chain
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/notes
    source_path: contracts/weights.sol
    line_ref: 65-71
    quote: uint256 depositerBalance = wtao.balanceOf(depositer) + taonado.totalLifetimeDeposits(depositer);
      weights[uid] += depositerBalance; totalAllocated += depositerBalance;
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/metric_kind
    source_path: contracts/weights.sol
    line_ref: 44-48
    quote: Array of corresponding weights based on WTAO balances. These weights need to be normalized.
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/1/description
    source_path: contracts/weights.sol
    line_ref: '18'
    quote: uint256 public constant MAX_ASSOCIATIONS_PER_HOTKEY = 100;
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/notes
    source_path: contracts/weights.sol
    line_ref: 74-77
    quote: "// if the total supply is less than the deposit goal, burn excess miner emissions\n      \
      \  if (totalAllocated < depositGoal) {\n            weights[burn_uid] = depositGoal - totalAllocated;"
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/address_or_uid
    source_path: contracts/weights.sol
    line_ref: 20-21
    quote: "// *should* be 0 as this sn is registered after dTAO\n    uint16 public burn_uid;"
  - claim_field: /aggregation/normalization_other
    source_path: contracts/weights.sol
    line_ref: 93-103
    quote: if (totalAllocated < depositGoal) { denominator = depositGoal; } else { denominator = totalAllocated;
      } ... weights[i] = uint16((((unnormalizedWeights[i]) * type(uint16).max) / denominator));
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/on_chain_call
    source_path: contracts/EvmValidator.sol
    line_ref: 126-134
    quote: 'abi.encodeWithSelector(INeuron.setWeights.selector, netuid, dests, weightsArray, versionKey);
      ... INeuron_ADDRESS.call{gas: fg}(data);'
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/method
    source_path: contracts/EvmValidator.sol
    line_ref: 65-78
    quote: function setWeights(bytes32 hotkey) public setWeightsIntervalPassed nonReentrant refundGas
      { ... if (metagraph_boost_value > 0 && hotkey != bytes32(0)) { ... weightsArray[i] += metagraph_boost_value;
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/tempo_or_interval
    source_path: scripts/vali.ts
    line_ref: '93'
    quote: setInterval(setWeights_loop, 113 * 12 * 1000); // every 113 blocks or so
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/0/description
    source_path: contracts/EvmValidator.sol
    line_ref: 177-182
    quote: require(block.number >= lastSetWeightsBlock + setWeightsBlockInterval, "Weight set interval
      has not passed");
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/method/bounty
    source_path: contracts/EvmValidator.sol
    line_ref: 90-99
    quote: 'uint256 refundAmount = (gasUsed + refundOverhead) * tx.gasprice + setWeightsBounty; ... (bool
      ok, ) = msg.sender.call{value: refundAmount}("");'
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/reset_policy
    source_path: contracts/core/Taonado.sol
    line_ref: 39-40, 85
    quote: "// deposit lifetime for each address, for scoring\n    mapping(address => uint256) public\
      \ totalLifetimeDeposits; ... totalLifetimeDeposits[msg.sender] += denomination;"
  - claim_field: /mechanism_status
    source_path: ARCHITECTURE.md
    line_ref: 69-70
    quote: Burn mechanism for excess emissions; Validators directly apply the weights, leading to high
      trust in their scoring.
  - claim_field: /ground_truth_sources/0/description
    source_path: ARCHITECTURE.md
    line_ref: 23-25
    quote: DepositTracker -->|Query Associations| WeightsV2; WTAO -->|Query Balances| WeightsV2; Metagraph[Metagraph]
      -->|Query Hotkeys| WeightsV2
  unresolved:
  - depositGoal literal value (owner-set via setDepositGoal; no on-chain default in source; test uses
    1000 TAO)
  - setWeightsBlockInterval, setWeightsBounty, metagraph_boost_value, versionKey, refundOverhead default
    values (owner-set state; only refundOverhead has a literal initializer 15_000 for gas refund, not
    a scoring constant)
  - burn_uid concrete value (state variable, only a comment that it *should* be 0; no initializer)
  - Whether validators are live on mainnet and actually calling setWeights at the documented cadence
composition:
  shape: pipeline
  overlays:
  - burn
  - guards
  - state
  extern_count: 0

docs.title: taos ☯ Intelligent Markets
docs.text:
Subnet taos-im__sn-79 netuid 79 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status partial_burn Task Miners run trading agents in a large-scale agent-based simulation of automated trading. Each miner submits order/instruction responses to market-simulation state updates across multiple order books. Miners are rewarded for risk-adjusted trading quality (intraday Kappa-3 ratio) weighted by trading ac DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: MarketData"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: RiskLimit, LivenessCheck, RateLimit"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: risk_adjusted_ratio"]
  M1["Metric: pnl"]
  M2["Metric: volume"]
  M3["Metric: pnl"]
  AGG["aggregate: WeightedAverage"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2
  GT --> M2
  G --> M3
  GT --> M3
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  M3 --> AGG
  AGG --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: taosIntelligentMarkets

    netuid: 79
    lang: python
    status: partial_burn
    submission: signals

    @burn {
        uid: "0"
        fraction: 0.79
    }
    @guards {
        RiskLimit {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        LivenessCheck {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        RateLimit {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
    }
    @state { performance_ledger }

    Multiplex<multi_asset> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: risk_adjusted_ratio
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: min_max
            },
            Metric {
                kind: pnl
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: min_max
            },
            Metric {
                kind: volume
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: other
            },
            Metric {
                kind: pnl
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: other
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: MarketData {
            trust_model: trusted
        }
        aggregate: WeightedAverage {
            composition: hybrid
            normalization: other
        }
        smooth: None {}
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: undocumented
        }
        tracks {
            structure: multi_asset
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: partial_burn
mechanism_status_notes: The validator's prepare_weights() applies an emission burn when burn_uid and burn_ratio
  are configured; the config defaults are burn_uid=0 and burn_ratio=0.79, i.e. 79% of emissions are allocated
  to UID 0 by default and the remaining 21% are distributed by the Kappa/PnL scoring. The documented scoring
  mechanism (Kappa-3 + PnL) is fully implemented and active on the residual.
subnet:
  name: taos ☯ Intelligent Markets
  owner_repo: taos-im__sn-79
  netuid: 79
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners run trading agents in a large-scale agent-based simulation of automated trading. Each
    miner submits order/instruction responses to market-simulation state updates across multiple order
    books. Miners are rewarded for risk-adjusted trading quality (intraday Kappa-3 ratio) weighted by
    trading activity (round-trip volume) and realized P&L, aggregated per-book.
  submission_format:
  - signals
scoring_signals:
- name: kappa_score
  metric_kind: risk_adjusted_ratio
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.79
  normalization: min_max
  notes: Per-book Kappa-3 ratio normalized to [0,1] using normalization_min=-2.5 / normalization_max=2.5,
    weighted by per-book activity and P&L factors, aggregated by median across books with an outlier penalty.
    config default scoring.kappa.weight=0.79.
- name: pnl_score
  metric_kind: pnl
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.21
  normalization: min_max
  notes: Per-book realized daily-return, clipped to [min_daily_return=-1.0, max_daily_return=1.0], median
    across scored books, mapped to [-0.5,0.5]. config default scoring.pnl.weight=0.21.
- name: activity_factor
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: other
  normalization_other: volume / (capital_turnover_cap * miner_wealth), with exponential inactivity decay
  notes: Multiplicative per-book factor in [0,2.0] applied to normalized Kappa; boosts active books and
    exponentially decays inactive books. Not an additive signal (weight null).
- name: pnl_factor
  metric_kind: pnl
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: other
  normalization_other: 1 + (realized_pnl / pnl_reference) scaled by kappa.pnl.impact, capped at 2.0
  notes: Multiplicative per-book P&L factor combined with the activity factor and applied to normalized
    Kappa. Controlled by scoring.kappa.pnl.impact (config default 0.0, i.e. disabled by default).
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: market_data
  description: Outputs of the in-house C++/Pybind agent-based market simulator (the τaos.im simulator).
    Miner trades and realized P&L are computed from simulated order-book fills; fundamental prices are
    seeded from external exchange data (Coinbase/Binance symbols, default BTC-USD/btcusdt).
  source_identifier: taos.im simulator; seed symbols BTC-USD / btcusdt
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: Simulation is run and observed by the validator; not an external oracle.
aggregation:
  method: weighted_average
  composition: hybrid
  normalization: other
  normalization_other: L1 normalize (torch.nn.functional.normalize p=1) at weight-setting time
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '0'
    fraction: 0.79
    dynamic: false
    notes: config defaults neuron.burn_uid=0, neuron.burn_ratio=0.79. When configured, raw_weights are
      scaled by (1 - burn_ratio) and burn_ratio is assigned to burn_uid, then re-normalized.
  notes: final_score = (kappa_weight * kappa_score) + (pnl_weight * pnl_score), clamped to [0,1]. Raw
    rewards are then passed through distribute_rewards() which multiplies sorted scores by a sorted Pareto-distributed
    vector (shape=1.42, scale=1.0, seed=898746039182) to add variance, before L1-normalization and burn
    at weight-setting.
weight_setting:
  cadence: undocumented
  method: Scores are L1-normalized (normalize p=1); if any score is negative the vector is shifted by
    its minimum first. Burn allocation applied, then process_weights_for_netuid and convert_weights_and_uids_for_emit
    before set_weights.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: null
  smoothing:
    kind: none
    alpha: null
    window: null
    notes: No EMA/SMA smoothing of the final reward was found; self.scores is assigned from computed scores
      rather than an exponential moving average at the weight-setting site read.
anti_gaming:
- kind: risk_limit
  enforcement: penalty
  description: 'Outlier penalty: per-book activity-weighted Kappas are checked with the 1.5×IQR rule;
    left-hand outliers below 0.5 incur a penalty (base_penalty = (0.5 - median(outliers)) / 1.5 scaled
    by a consistency bonus) subtracted from the median score, penalizing inconsistent cross-book performance.'
- kind: liveness_check
  enforcement: penalty
  description: Inactive books beyond max_inactive_books (max_inactive_books_ratio default 0.375 of books)
    contribute 0.0 to the median; activity factors for inactive books exponentially decay over time.
- kind: rate_limit
  enforcement: barrier
  description: set_delays() applies an exponential base delay based on miner process_time plus per-book
    Gaussian instruction delays, so slower responses incur added latency in the simulation.
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_asset
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: Scoring is computed per order book ("book") and aggregated (median) across books; book_count
    comes from the simulation config. Multiple asset symbols can be seeded (e.g. BTC-USD, TAO-PERP-INTX).
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - performance_ledger
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: On simulation start (onStart) timestamps for trade volumes, inventory, realized P&L and
    round-trip volumes are shifted/pruned to the new simulation window; deregistered_uids are reset.
  notes: Validator maintains per-UID per-book activity_factors, pnl_factors, kappa_values, roundtrip_volumes
    and realized_pnl_history over a lookback window (kappa.lookback default 10800e9 ns).
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - https://simulate.trading/taos-im-paper (whitepaper, external)
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract (Claude Opus 4.8)
  confidence_overall: medium
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/netuid
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '10'
    quote: operates as a Bittensor subnet at netuid 79
  - claim_field: /subnet/implementation_lang
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '148'
    quote: 'τaos : The Python component of the apparatus, containing the base validator and miner logic'
  - claim_field: /task/summary
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '116'
    quote: Currently assessment is based on an intraday Kappa-3 ratio in conjunction with a requirement
      to maintain a certain level of cumulative round-trip volume
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/weight
    source_path: taos/im/config/__init__.py
    line_ref: 146-149
    quote: '"--scoring.kappa.weight", ... default=0.79'
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/normalization
    source_path: taos/im/config/__init__.py
    line_ref: 188-198
    quote: '"--scoring.kappa.normalization_min", ... default=-2.5 ... normalization_max ... default=2.5'
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/1/weight
    source_path: taos/im/config/__init__.py
    line_ref: 209-212
    quote: '"--scoring.pnl.weight", ... default=0.21'
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/1/normalization_other
    source_path: taos/im/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: 527-573
    quote: daily_return_ratio = book_pnl / pnl_reference_per_book ... daily_return_ratio = max(min_daily,
      min(max_daily, daily_return_ratio)) ... pnl_score = median_daily_return / 2.0
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/2/normalization_other
    source_path: taos/im/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: 209-212
    quote: activity_factors_uid[book_id] = min(1 + ((roundtrip_volume * volume_cap_inv) * activity_impact),
      2.0)
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/3/notes
    source_path: taos/im/config/__init__.py
    line_ref: 201-205
    quote: '"--scoring.kappa.pnl.impact", ... default=0.0'
  - claim_field: /aggregation/notes
    source_path: taos/im/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: 692-695
    quote: final_score = (kappa_weight * kappa_score) + (pnl_score_weight * pnl_score) ... final_score
      = max(0.0, min(1.0, final_score))
  - claim_field: /aggregation/normalization_other
    source_path: taos/common/neurons/validator.py
    line_ref: '193'
    quote: raw_weights = torch.nn.functional.normalize(weight_scores, p=1, dim=0)
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/fraction
    source_path: taos/common/config/__init__.py
    line_ref: 229-233
    quote: '"--neuron.burn_ratio", ... help="Ratio of miner emissions to burn.", default=0.79'
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/address_or_uid
    source_path: taos/common/config/__init__.py
    line_ref: 222-226
    quote: '"--neuron.burn_uid", ... help="Uid to assign weights to in order to burn emissions.", default=0'
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/notes
    source_path: taos/common/neurons/validator.py
    line_ref: 211-218
    quote: raw_weights = raw_weights * (1.0 - burn_ratio) ... raw_weights[burn_uid] = burn_ratio ... raw_weights
      = torch.nn.functional.normalize(raw_weights, p=1, dim=0)
  - claim_field: /aggregation/notes/pareto
    source_path: taos/im/config/__init__.py
    line_ref: 334-338
    quote: '"--rewarding.pareto.shape", ... default=1.42'
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/on_chain_call
    source_path: taos/common/neurons/validator.py
    line_ref: 259-267
    quote: result, msg = self.subtensor.set_weights(wallet=self.wallet, netuid=self.config.netuid, uids=uint_uids,
      weights=uint_weights, ...)
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/0/description
    source_path: taos/im/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: 403-406
    quote: base_penalty = (0.5 - np.median(outliers)) / 1.5 ; consistency_bonus = 1.0 - np.exp(-5 * iqr)
      ; outlier_penalty = base_penalty * consistency_bonus
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/1/description
    source_path: taos/im/config/__init__.py
    line_ref: 139-142
    quote: '"--scoring.max_inactive_books", ... default=0.375'
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/2/description
    source_path: taos/im/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: 951-957
    quote: delay_frac = (np.exp(exp_scale * t) - 1) / (np.exp(exp_scale) - 1) ; delay = min_delay + delay_frac
      * (max_delay - min_delay)
  - claim_field: /sub_competitions/structure
    source_path: taos/im/validator/reward.py
    line_ref: 413-416
    quote: activity_weighted_normalized_median = np.median(data) ... kappa_score = max(activity_weighted_normalized_median
      - abs(outlier_penalty), 0.0)
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/notes
    source_path: taos/im/config/__init__.py
    line_ref: 166-170
    quote: '"--scoring.kappa.lookback", ... default=10800_000_000_000'
  - claim_field: /mechanism_status
    source_path: taos/common/neurons/validator.py
    line_ref: 199-215
    quote: 'if burn_uid is not None and burn_ratio > 0: ... raw_weights = raw_weights * (1.0 - burn_ratio)
      ; raw_weights[burn_uid] = burn_ratio'
  unresolved:
  - 'weight_setting.cadence / tempo_or_interval: no explicit epoch length or blocks-since-update gate
    found at the weight-setting call site read.'
  - Whether burn is actually enabled on the live validator (config defaults enable it, but operators can
    override burn_ratio).
  - scoring.interval (5e9 ns) reward-calc cadence is in config but not a chain weight-setting tempo.
composition:
  shape: multiplex
  overlays:
  - burn
  - guards
  - state
  extern_count: 0

docs.title: Vanta Network (Proprietary Trading Network / PTN)
docs.text:
Subnet taoshidev__proprietary-trading-network netuid 8 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status unknown Task Miners submit LONG / SHORT / FLAT futures-style trading signals for forex, crypto and equities trade pairs into the network during market hours. Validators simulate the resulting positions (with leverage, carry/spread fees, and slippage) and score each miner on risk-adjusted trading performance. Min DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: MarketData"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: PlagiarismDetection, Other, Collateral"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: pnl"]
  M1["Metric: other"]
  M2["Metric: other"]
  M3["Metric: other"]
  M4["Metric: other"]
  M5["Metric: other"]
  M6["Metric: other"]
  AGG["aggregate: Proportional"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2
  GT --> M2
  G --> M3
  GT --> M3
  G --> M4
  GT --> M4
  G --> M5
  GT --> M5
  G --> M6
  GT --> M6
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  M3 --> AGG
  M4 --> AGG
  M5 --> AGG
  M6 --> AGG
  AGG --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: vantaNetworkProprietaryTradingNetworkPtn

    netuid: 8
    lang: python
    status: unknown
    submission: signals

    @burn {
        uid: "229"
    }
    @guards {
        PlagiarismDetection {
            enforcement: elimination
        }
        Other {
            enforcement: elimination
        }
        Collateral {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        ChallengePeriod {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        RateLimit {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
    }
    @state { debt_ledger, performance_ledger, status_enum, cumulative_score }

    Multiplex<multi_asset> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: pnl
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: rank
            },
            Metric {
                kind: other
                family: risk_adjusted_ratio
                specific: calmar_ratio
                raw: "calmar_ratio"
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: rank
            },
            Metric {
                kind: other
                family: risk_adjusted_ratio
                specific: sharpe_ratio
                raw: "sharpe_ratio"
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: rank
            },
            Metric {
                kind: other
                family: risk_adjusted_ratio
                specific: omega_ratio
                raw: "omega_ratio"
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: rank
            },
            Metric {
                kind: other
                family: risk_adjusted_ratio
                specific: sortino_ratio
                raw: "sortino_ratio"
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: rank
            },
            Metric {
                kind: other
                family: risk_adjusted_ratio
                specific: statistical_confidence
                raw: "statistical_confidence"
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: rank
            },
            Metric {
                kind: other
                family: risk_adjusted_ratio
                specific: max_drawdown
                raw: "max_drawdown_penalty"
                direction: lower_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: MarketData {
            trust_model: trusted
        }
        aggregate: Proportional {
            normalization: sum_to_one
            decay_rate: 0.075
            min_weight_floor: 1.5e-05
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: weekly
            tempo: "weekly payout period ending Sunday 00:00:00 UTC; weight refresh every 5 minutes"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: multi_asset
            count: 3
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
subnet:
  name: Vanta Network (Proprietary Trading Network / PTN)
  owner_repo: taoshidev__proprietary-trading-network
  netuid: 8
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners submit LONG / SHORT / FLAT futures-style trading signals for forex, crypto and equities
    trade pairs into the network during market hours. Validators simulate the resulting positions (with
    leverage, carry/spread fees, and slippage) and score each miner on risk-adjusted trading performance.
    Miners are rewarded via a debt-based scoring system that pays proportionally to cumulative penalty-adjusted
    PnL, with weights set weekly targeting payout completion by midnight Sunday UTC. Miners that exceed
    a 10% max drawdown or are detected plagiarising other miners are eliminated.
  submission_format:
  - signals
scoring_signals:
- name: pnl
  metric_kind: pnl
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: rank
  notes: 'Current production scoring: SCORING_PNL_WEIGHT = 1.0 and all other metric weights set to 0.0.
    In debt-based scoring, payout = HWM-gated cumulative realized PnL plus negative unrealized PnL, each
    multiplied by per-checkpoint total_penalty. In the legacy Scoring path, per-metric scores are converted
    to percentile ranks before weighting.'
- name: calmar
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: calmar_ratio
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.0
  normalization: rank
  notes: Legacy/configurable metric; SCORING_CALMAR_WEIGHT = 0.0 in current config.
- name: sharpe
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: sharpe_ratio
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.0
  normalization: rank
  notes: Legacy/configurable metric; SCORING_SHARPE_WEIGHT = 0.0 in current config.
- name: omega
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: omega_ratio
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.0
  normalization: rank
  notes: Legacy/configurable metric; SCORING_OMEGA_WEIGHT = 0.0 in current config.
- name: sortino
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: sortino_ratio
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.0
  normalization: rank
  notes: Legacy/configurable metric; SCORING_SORTINO_WEIGHT = 0.0 in current config.
- name: statistical_confidence
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: statistical_confidence
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.0
  normalization: rank
  notes: Legacy/configurable metric; SCORING_STATISTICAL_CONFIDENCE_WEIGHT = 0.0 in current config.
- name: max_drawdown_penalty
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: max_drawdown_penalty
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: Multiplicative penalty (not an additive scoring signal). max_drawdown_threshold_penalty is one
    of three penalties whose product multiplies the score; a penalty of 0 zeroes the miner's score.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: market_data
  description: Real-time price data used to validate signals and compute simulated position returns; sourced
    from multiple market data providers.
  source_identifier: polygon, tiingo, binance, bybit, kraken (data_generator/); hyperliquid for HL universe
  trust_model: trusted
aggregation:
  method: proportional
  normalization: sum_to_one
  decay_rate: 0.075
  min_weight_floor: 1.5e-05
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '229'
    fraction: null
    notes: Excess weight is routed to a burn UID (229 mainnet / 220 testnet). If sum of miner weights
      < 1.0, the burn address receives (1.0 - sum); if sum >= 1.0, weights are normalized to 1.0 and burn
      gets 0. The burn fraction is dynamic (1.0 - sum of remaining-payout-proportional weights), not a
      fixed literal.
  notes: 'Debt-based scoring (DebtBasedScoring.compute_results): weights are proportional to each miner''s
    remaining_payout_usd (needed cumulative penalty-adjusted PnL minus emissions already paid), spread
    over days_until_target and normalized against projected daily emissions. min_weight_floor is CHALLENGE_PERIOD_MIN_WEIGHT
    (static dust); decay_rate WEIGHTED_AVERAGE_DECAY_RATE=0.075 weights recent performance. method ''proportional''
    reflects payout-proportional weighting rather than pure softmax; the legacy Scoring path uses softmax
    (SOFTMAX_TEMPERATURE=0.15) over percentile scores per asset class.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: weekly
  method: DebtBasedScoring.compute_results produces (hotkey, weight) pairs; weight_calculator_manager
    maps hotkeys to UIDs and calls set_weights_rpc -> subtensor.set_weights. Weight computation refreshes
    every ~5 minutes (SET_WEIGHT_REFRESH_TIME_MS = 60*5*1000), but the payout target is a weekly cadence
    ending midnight Sunday 00:00:00 UTC.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: weekly payout period ending Sunday 00:00:00 UTC; weight refresh every 5 minutes
anti_gaming:
- kind: plagiarism_detection
  enforcement: elimination
  description: Cross-correlation / time-lag follower analysis of order similarity. Follower similarity
    threshold PLAGIARISM_FOLLOWER_SIMILARITY_THRESHOLD = 0.75 over a 10-day lookback (PLAGIARISM_LOOKBACK_RANGE_MS).
    MAX_MINER_PLAGIARISM_SCORE = 0.9. Detected miners are eliminated after a 2-week review period (PLAGIARISM_REVIEW_PERIOD_MS
    = 14 days).
- kind: other
  kind_other: max_drawdown_elimination
  enforcement: elimination
  description: Miners exceeding 10% max total drawdown are eliminated (MAX_TOTAL_DRAWDOWN = 0.9, portfolio
    must not fall below 0.90x initial value). 5% daily drawdown limit (MAX_DAILY_DRAWDOWN = 0.95). Monitored
    continuously by the MDD checker (MDD_CHECK_REFRESH_TIME_MS = 60s).
- kind: collateral
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Miners must post collateral; MIN_COLLATERAL_BALANCE_THETA = 300 theta (approx $150k). A
    min_collateral_penalty multiplies the score, and CHALLENGE miners with zero / below-minimum collateral
    are prioritized for 0 weight (dereg candidates).
- kind: challenge_period
  enforcement: barrier
  description: New miners enter a 61-90 day challenge period (CHALLENGE_PERIOD_MINIMUM_DAYS=61, MAXIMUM_DAYS=90)
    and receive only minimal dust weights. They must reach the 75th percentile (CHALLENGE_PERIOD_PERCENTILE_THRESHOLD=0.75)
    to enter the main competition.
- kind: rate_limit
  enforcement: penalty
  description: Order cooldown ORDER_COOLDOWN_MS = 5000 (5 seconds); MAX_ORDERS_PER_POSITION = 100. Risk-profile
    penalty (risk_profile_penalty) multiplies score to discourage high-leverage gaming.
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_asset
  stages:
  - name: challenge
    role: challenge
    advancement_rule: reach 75th percentile (CHALLENGE_PERIOD_PERCENTILE_THRESHOLD=0.75) within 61-90
      days
    multipliers:
      dust_floor: 1
  - name: probation
    role: probation
    advancement_rule: must outscore the 15th-ranked MAINCOMP miner in asset class within 60-day probation,
      else eliminated
    multipliers:
      dust_floor: 2
  - name: maincomp
    role: main
    advancement_rule: top ~25 MAINCOMP miners per asset class (PROMOTION_THRESHOLD_RANK=25)
    multipliers:
      dust_floor: 3
  count: 3
  notes: 'Three asset classes carry separate emission weights (ASSET_CLASS_BREAKDOWN: crypto 0.334, forex
    0.333, equities 0.333) and miners are scored/ranked within each asset class, so the structure is both
    multi_asset and a challenge->probation->maincomp status ladder. Dust-floor multipliers per bucket:
    CHALLENGE/PLAGIARISM=1x, PROBATION=2x, MAINCOMP=3x, ENTITY=4x, UNKNOWN=0x.'
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - debt_ledger
  - performance_ledger
  - status_enum
  - cumulative_score
  status_values:
  - MAINCOMP
  - CHALLENGE
  - PROBATION
  - PLAGIARISM
  - unknown
  - ENTITY
  - SUBACCOUNT_CHALLENGE
  - SUBACCOUNT_FUNDED
  - SUBACCOUNT_ALPHA
  reset_policy: Debt ledger accumulates from activation (2025-11-01) onward; cumulative needed_payout
    allows negative PnL to carry forward across weeks and offset future gains (cumulative tracking, no
    per-week reset). Eliminated/deregistered hotkeys are permanently blacklisted and cannot re-register.
  notes: Per-miner DebtLedger of 12-hour DebtCheckpoints (realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl, total_penalty,
    chunk_emissions_usd, challenge_period_status) plus a PerfLedger; bucket status from MinerBucket enum.
    Only MAINCOMP/PROBATION (and subaccount/entity) checkpoints count as earning periods.
documentation:

docs.title: Vanta Network (formerly Proprietary Trading Network / PTN)
docs.text:
Subnet taoshidev__vanta-network netuid 8 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status partial_burn Task Miners submit LONG, SHORT, or FLAT trading signals for Forex, Crypto, and Equities trade pairs during market hours. Validators receive and validate signals, track positions and portfolio returns with leverage limits, carry fees, spread fees and slippage, and reward miners via a debt-based scoring sy DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: MarketData"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: PlagiarismDetection, RiskLimit, ChallengePeriod"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: pnl"]
  AGG["aggregate: Proportional"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  M0 --> AGG
  AGG --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: vantaNetworkFormerlyProprietaryTradingNetworkPtn

    netuid: 8
    lang: python
    status: partial_burn
    submission: signals

    @burn {
        uid: "229"
        fraction: dynamic
    }
    @guards {
        PlagiarismDetection {
            enforcement: elimination
        }
        RiskLimit {
            enforcement: elimination
        }
        ChallengePeriod {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
        Other {
            enforcement: elimination
        }
    }
    @state { debt_ledger, status_enum, cumulative_score }

    Multiplex<multi_asset> {
        score: Metric {
            kind: pnl
            direction: higher_is_better
            normalization: none
        }
        groundTruth: MarketData {
            trust_model: oracle
        }
        aggregate: Proportional {
            composition: weighted_sum
            normalization: sum_to_one
            decay_rate: 0.075
            min_weight_floor: 1.5e-05
        }
        smooth: None {}
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: weekly
            tempo: "SET_WEIGHT_REFRESH_TIME_MS = 60 * 5 * 1000 (5 minutes refresh); weekly payout window"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: multi_asset
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: partial_burn
mechanism_status_notes: Debt-based scoring activated (first payouts Dec 2025 for Nov 2025 performance)
  and pays miners proportional to remaining penalty-adjusted PnL debt. When the sum of distributed miner
  weights is < 1.0 the residual (1.0 - sum) is assigned to a dedicated burn UID (229 mainnet / 220 testnet),
  so emissions are partially burned dynamically. Pre-activation miners received only minimum dust weights
  with the remainder burned.
subnet:
  name: Vanta Network (formerly Proprietary Trading Network / PTN)
  owner_repo: taoshidev__vanta-network
  netuid: 8
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners submit LONG, SHORT, or FLAT trading signals for Forex, Crypto, and Equities trade pairs
    during market hours. Validators receive and validate signals, track positions and portfolio returns
    with leverage limits, carry fees, spread fees and slippage, and reward miners via a debt-based scoring
    system that pays them proportional to their previous pay period's penalty-adjusted realized/unrealized
    PnL (in USD), with payouts targeting weekly completion at midnight Sunday UTC.
  submission_format:
  - signals
scoring_signals:
- name: penalty_adjusted_pnl
  metric_kind: pnl
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: none
  notes: SCORING_PNL_WEIGHT = 1.0; all other component weights (Omega, Sharpe, Sortino, statistical confidence,
    Calmar, return) are set to 0.0 in current config. Per-checkpoint penalty-adjusted PnL = sum of HWM-gated
    realized_pnl deltas * total_penalty plus min(0, unrealized_pnl) * total_penalty of the last checkpoint.
    Realized/unrealized PnL are in USD.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: market_data
  description: Real-time market prices used to validate signals and compute position PnL, sourced from
    multiple financial data providers (Polygon, Tiingo, Binance, Bybit, Kraken).
  source_identifier: data_generator (Polygon, Tiingo, Binance, Bybit, Kraken)
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: Validators receive signals and price them against live market data feeds.
aggregation:
  method: proportional
  composition: weighted_sum
  normalization: sum_to_one
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: 0.075
  min_weight_floor: 1.5e-05
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '229'
    fraction: null
    dynamic: true
    notes: If sum of miner weights < 1.0, burn address (uid 229 mainnet / uid 220 testnet) receives the
      residual (1.0 - sum). If sum >= 1.0, weights are normalized to 1.0 and burn gets 0.
  notes: Weights are proportional to each miner's remaining_payout_usd (needed cumulative penalty-adjusted
    PnL minus already-paid emissions). Minimum 'dust' floors are applied per bucket (CHALLENGE/PLAGIARISM
    1x, PROBATION 2x, MAINCOMP 3x, ENTITY 4x, UNKNOWN 0x of the static dust value CHALLENGE_PERIOD_MIN_WEIGHT
    = 1.5e-05), scaled by 30-day PnL within bucket. WEIGHTED_AVERAGE_DECAY_RATE = 0.075 emphasizes recent
    performance over the 180-day target ledger window.
weight_setting:
  cadence: weekly
  method: DebtBasedScoring.compute_results produces (hotkey, weight) tuples mapped to UIDs in weight_calculator_manager;
    weights are submitted via subtensor_ops_client.set_weights_rpc. Payout periods are weekly, starting
    and ending at midnight Sunday 00:00:00 UTC; weights are refreshed every 5 minutes (SET_WEIGHT_REFRESH_TIME_MS).
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: SET_WEIGHT_REFRESH_TIME_MS = 60 * 5 * 1000 (5 minutes refresh); weekly payout window
  smoothing:
    kind: none
    alpha: null
    window: null
    notes: No EMA on final reward; recency emphasis comes from the weighted-average decay (WEIGHTED_AVERAGE_DECAY_RATE
      = 0.075) over the 180-day ledger window.
anti_gaming:
- kind: plagiarism_detection
  enforcement: elimination
  description: Cross-correlation analysis detects order similarity; follower similarity threshold 0.75
    (PLAGIARISM_FOLLOWER_SIMILARITY_THRESHOLD), 10-day lookback (PLAGIARISM_LOOKBACK_RANGE_MS), 60-max
    time lags, with a 2-week review period (PLAGIARISM_REVIEW_PERIOD_MS) before elimination. Repeated
    copying eliminates the miner.
- kind: risk_limit
  enforcement: elimination
  description: Miners exceeding 10% max drawdown are eliminated (MAX_TOTAL_DRAWDOWN = 0.9, i.e. portfolio
    may not fall below 0.90x peak). Daily drawdown limit MAX_DAILY_DRAWDOWN = 0.95.
- kind: challenge_period
  enforcement: barrier
  description: New miners enter a 61-90 day challenge period (CHALLENGE_PERIOD_MINIMUM_DAYS = 61, MAXIMUM_DAYS
    = 90) and must pass the 75th percentile (CHALLENGE_PERIOD_PERCENTILE_THRESHOLD = 0.75) to enter the
    main competition; they receive only minimal dust weights until then.
- kind: other
  kind_other: probation_ranking_elimination
  enforcement: elimination
  description: 'Probation: miners scoring below the 15th-highest ranked miner in their asset class enter
    a probationary period (30 days per README) and are eliminated if they fail to outscore the lowest-ranked
    main-competition miner. Eliminated/deregistered hotkeys are permanently blacklisted.'
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_asset
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: 'Competition is segmented by asset class: Crypto (6 pairs), Forex (32 pairs grouped G1-G5), Equities
    (7 stocks, currently blocked), plus blocked Indices/Commodities. Rankings and probation thresholds
    are evaluated per asset class.'
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - debt_ledger
  - status_enum
  - cumulative_score
  status_values:
  - CHALLENGE
  - PROBATION
  - MAINCOMP
  - PLAGIARISM
  - ENTITY
  - SUBACCOUNT_FUNDED
  - SUBACCOUNT_ALPHA
  - UNKNOWN
  reset_policy: Cumulative debt tracking from activation (2025-11-01) carries negative PnL forward to
    offset future gains. Eliminated/deregistered hotkeys are permanently blacklisted and cannot re-register.
  notes: Each miner has a DebtLedger of 12-hour DebtCheckpoints recording realized/unrealized PnL, penalties,
    fees and challenge_period_status; only MAINCOMP/PROBATION (and a few subaccount/ entity) buckets count
    as earning periods.
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: 8.8.8
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - CLAUDE.md
  - docs/validator.md
  - docs/miner.md
  - docs/signal_reference.md
  completeness: high

    quote: The Vanta Network (formerly Proprietary Trading Network/PTN) is a Bittensor subnet (netuid

What a miner produces and how it is rewarded is descri DataflowIMMLIR (YAML)

docs.title: Tensorclaw
docs.text:
Subnet tensorclaw__tensorclaw netuid 92 Archetype pipeline Language python Mechanism status active Task Miners run an LLM inference backend and connect as pure WebSocket clients to a centralized router (AICenter). They are rewarded for serving real, high-quality LLM API traffic: availability and a passing active inference probe yield a base score, and processing real user requests/tokens via the Busin DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: HardwareProbe, OrganicTraffic"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: LivenessCheck, CodeInspection"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: other"]
  M1["Metric: uptime"]
  M2["Metric: latency"]
  M3["Metric: uptime"]
  M4["Metric: other"]
  AGG["aggregate: WeightedAverage"]
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2
  GT --> M2
  G --> M3
  GT --> M3
  G --> M4
  GT --> M4
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  M3 --> AGG
  M4 --> AGG
  AGG --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: tensorclaw

    netuid: 92
    lang: python
    status: active
    submission: [api_response, compute_service]

    @guards {
        LivenessCheck {
            enforcement: elimination
        }
        CodeInspection {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
    }
    @state { performance_ledger }

    Pipeline {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: other
                family: model_architecture
                specific: whitelist_membership
                raw: "model_whitelist_membership"
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: uptime
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: latency
                direction: lower_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: uptime
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: other
                raw: "commercial_request_contribution"
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: [
            HardwareProbe {
                trust_model: trusted
            },
            OrganicTraffic {
                trust_model: trusted
            }
        ]
        aggregate: WeightedAverage {
            composition: hybrid
            normalization: sum_to_one
        }
        smooth: None {}
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: rate_limited
            tempo: "20 blocks (WEIGHT_SUBMIT_INTERVAL)"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: none
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: active
mechanism_status_notes: Validator computes per-miner scores (base + business), normalizes to sum-to-one,
  and calls subtensor.set_weights every WEIGHT_SUBMIT_INTERVAL (20) blocks. No burn allocation is present
  in the code. The business component depends on an external Business API (api.tensorclaw.ai) whose scoring
  is not in this repo.
subnet:
  name: Tensorclaw
  owner_repo: tensorclaw__tensorclaw
  netuid: 92
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: 'Miners run an LLM inference backend and connect as pure WebSocket clients to a centralized
    router (AICenter). They are rewarded for serving real, high-quality LLM API traffic: availability
    and a passing active inference probe yield a base score, and processing real user requests/tokens
    via the Business API yields the dominant business score.'
  submission_format:
  - api_response
  - compute_service
scoring_signals:
- name: model_availability
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: model_whitelist_membership
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.3
  normalization: none
  notes: Part of base score. model_score is a flat 100.0 when the declared model is in the whitelist (otherwise
    the miner gets 0 total). Weighted 30% within base score.
- name: availability
  metric_kind: uptime
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.4
  normalization: none
  notes: avail_score = 100.0 when the miner passes the active inference probe. Weighted 40% within base
    score.
- name: response_time
  metric_kind: latency
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: 0.2
  normalization: none
  notes: 'Tiered rt_score: 100 if <100ms, 80 if <500ms, 60 if <1000ms, 40 if <2000ms, else 20. Weighted
    20% within base score.'
- name: historical_uptime
  metric_kind: uptime
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.1
  normalization: none
  notes: uptime = success rate over last 100 probes (rolling window capped at 100), expressed as a percentage.
    Weighted 10% within base score.
- name: business_score
  metric_kind: other
  metric_kind_other: commercial_request_contribution
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.9
  normalization: none
  notes: contribution_score returned by an external Business API per miner hotkey; reflects real user
    requests/tokens processed. Weighted 90% of the final score. The actual computation lives in the off-repo
    Business API, not this codebase.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: hardware_probe
  description: 'Active inference probe via AICenter: a 5-token micro-prompt ("ping" -> expects "pong")
    with 8s timeout to confirm the miner backend is live and serving the declared model.'
  source_identifier: '{aicenter_url}/api/route/{hotkey}'
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: model_info and availability are derived from this probe.
- kind: organic_traffic
  description: Real user requests forwarded through the HA load balancer; the Business API logs requests/tokens
    and returns a contribution_score per miner.
  source_identifier: '{business_api_url}/scoring'
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: External, off-repo service (api.tensorclaw.ai). Scoring internals not present in this repo.
aggregation:
  method: weighted_average
  composition: hybrid
  normalization: sum_to_one
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: false
    address_or_uid: null
    fraction: null
    dynamic: false
    notes: No burn logic in the code.
  notes: base_score = model*0.3 + avail*0.4 + rt*0.2 + uptime*0.1; final_score = base*0.1 + business*0.9.
    Invalid/unavailable model => final 0.0 (gated). Across miners, weights = score / sum(scores) before
    set_weights.
weight_setting:
  cadence: rate_limited
  method: Per-miner final_score is collected into miner_scores, filtered to metagraph hotkeys, normalized
    to sum 1, and submitted via subtensor.set_weights with version_key=1.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: 20 blocks (WEIGHT_SUBMIT_INTERVAL)
  smoothing:
    kind: none
    alpha: null
    window: null
    notes: Final score has no temporal smoothing. Historical uptime uses a rolling window of the last
      100 probes, but that feeds only the 10%-weighted base uptime component, not the final reward EMA.
anti_gaming:
- kind: liveness_check
  enforcement: elimination
  description: 'Active inference probe: a real 5-token micro-prompt must return within 8s. Failures mark
    the miner unavailable; an invalid/dead/fake backend yields 0 base score and is banned from the routing
    pool ("Ghost Script").'
- kind: code_inspection
  enforcement: rejection
  description: Declared model name must match a dynamically updated whitelist (VALID_MODEL_SERIES); non-whitelisted
    models score 0.
sub_competitions:
  structure: none
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: ''
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - performance_ledger
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: uptime_tracker keeps a rolling list of the last 100 probe outcomes per hotkey (oldest
    entries dropped). In-memory only; not persisted across restarts.
  notes: Only last_weight_submit_block is persisted (.validator_state.json). The uptime_tracker performance
    history is in-memory.
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: V2 (Subnet 92)
  primary_docs:
  - README.md

docs.title: Dojo v2
docs.text:
Subnet tensorplex-labs__dojo netuid 52 Archetype pipeline Language go Mechanism status unknown Task Dojo v2 is a decentralized, competitive GAN. Bittensor miners act as both generators and discriminators. Generators produce code outputs (completions) for a task; discriminators vote for the completion they judge best (a "vote" is the unique ID of the selected code output). For a normal task, discri DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: RealEngagement"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: Other, Other"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: human_judgment"]
  M1["Metric: human_judgment"]
  M2["Metric: human_judgment"]
  M3["Metric: human_judgment"]
  AGG["aggregate: Proportional"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2
  GT --> M2
  G --> M3
  GT --> M3
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  M3 --> AGG
  AGG --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: dojoV2

    netuid: 52
    lang: go
    status: unknown
    submission: [content_link, signals]

    @burn {
        uid: "158"
        fraction: 1
    }
    @guards {
        Other {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        Other {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score }

    Pipeline {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: human_judgment
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: human_judgment
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: human_judgment
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: human_judgment
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: RealEngagement {
            trust_model: crowd
        }
        aggregate: Proportional {
            normalization: other
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: other
            tempo: "WeightSettingInterval = 1h (prod); ScoringInterval = 15m (prod)"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: other
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
subnet:
  name: Dojo v2
  owner_repo: tensorplex-labs__dojo
  netuid: 52
  implementation_lang: go
task:
  summary: Dojo v2 is a decentralized, competitive GAN. Bittensor miners act as both generators and discriminators.
    Generators produce code outputs (completions) for a task; discriminators vote for the completion they
    judge best (a "vote" is the unique ID of the selected code output). For a normal task, discriminators
    are scored by participation and generators are rewarded in proportion to the votes their output received;
    some tasks are "trap" tasks that penalise discriminators who vote for a designated inferior ("negative
    generator") output. Per-task scores are summed per miner UID and converted into on-chain weights.
  submission_format:
  - content_link
  - signals
scoring_signals:
- name: discriminator_vote
  metric_kind: human_judgment
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: Each discriminator's vote is the unique ID of the code output it selects as best. In a normal
    PvP task every discriminator receives 1/totalDiscriminators regardless of vote; in a PvV task a discriminator
    scores 1/totalDiscriminators only if it voted for the validator's output, else 0.
- name: generator_vote_share
  metric_kind: human_judgment
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: Generators receive num_votes * (1/totalDiscriminators), i.e. their score scales with how many
    discriminators selected their output (CalcPvPScores / CalcPvVScores in scoring.go).
- name: trap_penalty
  metric_kind: human_judgment
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: In a trap task, discriminators that vote for the designated 'negative generator' (trap) output
    receive a TrapPenalty of -0.4; all generators in a trap task receive 0.
- name: no_vote_penalty
  metric_kind: human_judgment
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: Active miners assigned as voters to a task who did not vote split a total penalty of -4.0 (NoVotePenaltyTotalDistribution
    / number of non-voters).
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: real_engagement
  description: The "correct answer" is decided by the crowd of miner discriminators' votes; there is no
    external deterministic ground truth. Trap tasks inject a known-inferior output to test discriminator
    honesty, and PvV tasks use the validator's own output as a reference.
  source_identifier: internal/scoring/scoring.go (CalcPvPScores/CalcPvVScores/CalcTrapScores)
  trust_model: crowd
aggregation:
  method: proportional
  normalization: other
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '158'
    fraction: 1.0
    notes: BurnUID = 158, BurnWeight = 100. Burn fraction is BurnWeight/100.0 = 1.0 (100%). Non-burn miners
      share (1 - BurnWeight/100.0). When BurnWeight is 100 the weight-setting step gate is skipped so
      burn weights are always set. If total non-burn weight is 0, weights are set entirely to the burn
      UID at round(0.01 * BurnWeight * 65535).
  notes: 'normalization=other: per-UID scores are summed across all scored tasks (AggregateTaskScoresByUID),
    negative totals are clamped to 0 (ClampNegativeWeights), then each non-burn weight is divided by the
    max weight and re-normalised to a proportional share that sums (across non-burn uids) to (1 - BurnWeight/100),
    finally scaled to uint16 (round(finalWeight * 65535)). Scores are computed per task then summed per
    UID. The burn fraction is a compile-time constant in internal/utils/chain_utils/weights_util.go.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: other
  cadence_other: 'Driven by time tickers: scoring runs every ScoringInterval (15m in prod) and setWeights
    is invoked on the same tick, but only actually emits weights every WeightSettingInterval (1h in prod),
    i.e. once every WeightSettingInterval/ScoringInterval scoring steps (unless burn is 100%, which always
    sets).'
  method: setWeightsOnChain converts uids/weights for emit, fetches subnet hyperparams; if CommitRevealWeightsEnabled
    it commits timelocked weights (commit-reveal v4), otherwise calls Kami.SetWeights with the version
    key.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: WeightSettingInterval = 1h (prod); ScoringInterval = 15m (prod)
anti_gaming:
- kind: other
  kind_other: trap_task
  enforcement: penalty
  description: Trap tasks plant a known-inferior 'negative generator' output; discriminators that vote
    for the trap output are penalised (TrapPenalty = -0.4), testing whether discriminators vote honestly.
- kind: other
  kind_other: non_voting_penalty
  enforcement: penalty
  description: Active miners assigned as voters who fail to vote on a task are penalised; a total of -4.0
    (NoVotePenaltyTotalDistribution) is split among all non-voters for that task.
sub_competitions:
  structure: other
  structure_other: Per-task type switch (Trap / PvP / PvV) rather than a staged ladder/tournament; the
    task type is determined per task by DetermineTaskType, and a different scoring function is applied.
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: Trap = trap-detection scoring; PvP = generator-vs-generator vote tally; PvV = generators vs the
    validator's reference output.
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: Per-task scores are summed into a per-UID cumulative score array persisted to scores.json
    and advanced by a Step counter; tasks are scored over a rolling window (ScoreResetInterval, 24h prod).
    No explicit periodic reset of the cumulative score array was found in the read code.
  notes: ScoresData holds Scores (per-UID floats), a Step counter, and Hotkeys; AggregateTaskScoresByUID
    sums task scores into the per-UID array each scoring step.
documentation:
  status: code_authoritative
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - docs/validator.md
  - https://docs.tensorplex.ai/tensorplex-docs/tensorplex-dojo-bittensor-subnet/subnet-mechanism
