docs.title: Wahooτ (Wahoot)
docs.text:
Subnet wahoo-predict__wahoot netuid None Archetype gated Language python Mechanism status partial_burn Task Miners are human traders on the Wahoo prediction-market platform (no code run by miners). Validators fetch each registered hotkey's trading statistics from the Wahoo API and reward miners by their realized trading profit over a trailing window. A miner's score is an EMA of profit^0.7 (only positive DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: OrganicTraffic"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: DeterministicCheck, DeterministicCheck, DeterministicCheck"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: pnl"]
  M1["Metric: pnl"]
  AGG["aggregate: ExponentialDecayEma"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  AGG --> SM
  SM --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: wahooWahoot

    netuid: -
    lang: python
    status: partial_burn
    submission: api_response

    @burn {
        uid: "176"
        fraction: 0.75
    }
    @guards {
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score }

    Gated {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: pnl
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: ema
            },
            Metric {
                kind: pnl
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: OrganicTraffic {
            trust_model: trusted
        }
        aggregate: ExponentialDecayEma {
            composition: gated
            normalization: sum_to_one
        }
        smooth: Ema {}
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: per_epoch
            tempo: "tempo blocks (BLOCK_TIME_SECONDS=12.0; default interval 4800s)"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: none
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: partial_burn
mechanism_status_notes: Validator scores miners by EMA-smoothed trading profit (EMAVolumeScorer), then
  normalizes those scores to sum to 1, scales the miner portion by MINER_EMISSION_PERCENTAGE (0.25), and
  routes the remaining BURN_RATE (0.75) as a single weight to owner/validator UID 176. So ~25% of emissions
  are distributed to miners by the documented profit mechanism and ~75% is captured by the owner UID.
subnet:
  name: Wahooτ (Wahoot)
  owner_repo: wahoo-predict__wahoot
  netuid: null
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners are human traders on the Wahoo prediction-market platform (no code run by miners). Validators
    fetch each registered hotkey's trading statistics from the Wahoo API and reward miners by their realized
    trading profit over a trailing window. A miner's score is an EMA of profit^0.7 (only positive profit
    counts); scores are normalized into weights. A threshold gate requires positive profit.
  submission_format:
  - api_response
scoring_signals:
- name: trading_profit
  metric_kind: pnl
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 1.0
  normalization: ema
  notes: raw_score = max(0, profit) ** PROFIT_EXPONENT (0.7); losses clipped to 0. raw_score is EMA-smoothed
    per hotkey, then normalized to sum to 1 across miners.
- name: profit_threshold_gate
  metric_kind: pnl
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: _check_thresholds requires profit > 0 (and win_rate >= MIN_WIN_RATE=0.0), else the miner's weight
    is forced to 0.0 in reward().
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: organic_traffic
  description: Wahoo prediction-market trading statistics per hotkey (profit, win_rate, total_volume_usd)
    fetched from the Wahoo API v2 statistics endpoint.
  source_identifier: https://api.wahoopredict.com/api/v2/event/bittensor/statistics/v2
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: Validator trusts the centralized Wahoo API as the source of trading performance; data described
    as public.
aggregation:
  method: exponential_decay_ema
  composition: gated
  normalization: sum_to_one
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '176'
    fraction: 0.75
    dynamic: false
    notes: BURN_RATE = 1.0 - MINER_EMISSION_PERCENTAGE = 0.75. Miner rewards are scaled by MINER_EMISSION_PERCENTAGE
      (0.25); owner_weight = BURN_RATE is appended as the weight for OWNER_UID 176 in the final weight
      vector. If UID 176 is absent from the metagraph the burn fraction is truly burned.
  notes: 'Per-hotkey EMA: smoothed = (1-alpha)*prev + alpha*raw, EMA_ALPHA derived from a 12-hour half-life
    over 360*12s epochs. New miners (prev==0) take raw directly; a cliff reset sets smoothed=raw when
    raw < CLIFF_RESET_THRESHOLD*prev (0.5).'
weight_setting:
  cadence: per_epoch
  method: Loop interval computed from blocks until the next epoch boundary (tempo * BLOCK_TIME_SECONDS,
    default fallback 4800s). Each iteration recomputes EMA weights, scales miners by 0.25, appends 0.75
    to OWNER_UID 176, and calls subtensor.set_weights with retry/cooldown handling (commit_period=32 blocks).
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: tempo blocks (BLOCK_TIME_SECONDS=12.0; default interval 4800s)
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: null
    window: null
    notes: EMA_ALPHA = 1 - 0.5**(1/HALF_LIFE_EPOCHS) where HALF_LIFE_SECONDS=12*3600 and EPOCH_INTERVAL_SECONDS=360*12,
      so HALF_LIFE_EPOCHS=10. Alpha is computed, not a literal constant, so left null. EMA scores persisted
      in SQLite across restarts.
anti_gaming:
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: penalty
  description: _check_thresholds zeroes a miner's weight if profit is not strictly positive (profit >
    0 required; win_rate must be >= MIN_WIN_RATE=0.0).
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: rejection
  description: _validate_response rejects malformed responses (prob_yes/prob_no out of [0,1], prob_yes+prob_no
    != 1 within 1e-6, non-finite, invalid event_id/confidence), though in main loop miner responses are
    passed as None (miners run no code).
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: penalty
  description: 'EMA cliff reset: when raw_score < CLIFF_RESET_THRESHOLD (0.5) * stored EMA, the stored
    EMA is discarded and the miner''s score drops to the raw value, preventing a miner from coasting on
    a past-inflated EMA after profit collapses.'
sub_competitions:
  structure: none
  stages: []
  count: null
  notes: ''
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: Per-hotkey EMA score persisted in SQLite (scoring_runs). New miners (prev EMA == 0) seed
    from raw score; cliff reset replaces stored EMA with raw when raw < 0.5*prev. Unregistered miners
    removed from the database each iteration.
  notes: smoothed_scores returned in result.meta and saved as 'ema_update' scoring runs; used as previous_scores
    on the next iteration. Old cache entries auto-cleaned (7-day default).
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract (Claude Opus 4.8)
  confidence_overall: high
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/implementation_lang
    source_path: wahoo/validator/scoring/rewards.py
    line_ref: 1-4
    quote: 'import logging

      import math

      import os

      import torch'
  - claim_field: /task/summary
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: 44-49
    quote: '3. **We track** - Our validators peek at your performance through the Wahooτ API (don''t worry,
      it''s all public data)

      4. **You get scored** - Based on how much you trade, how much you profit, and how often you''re
      right'
  - claim_field: /task/submission_format
    source_path: wahoo/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 546-547
    quote: "# Miner responses are not used in this subnet (miners don't run code)\n            miner_responses\
      \ = [None] * len(active_uids)"
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/notes
    source_path: wahoo/validator/scoring/operators.py
    line_ref: 71-73
    quote: "# Only positive profit contributes to score; losses are clipped to 0\n        clamped_profit\
      \ = np.maximum(0.0, profit)\n        raw_scores = np.power(clamped_profit, self.profit_exp)"
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/metric_kind
    source_path: wahoo/validator/scoring/operators.py
    line_ref: '18'
    quote: PROFIT_EXPONENT = 0.7
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/1/notes
    source_path: wahoo/validator/scoring/rewards.py
    line_ref: 107-109
    quote: "profit = perf.profit\n    if profit is None or profit <= 0:\n        return False, f\"profit\
      \ not positive (profit={profit})\""
  - claim_field: /ground_truth_sources/0/source_identifier
    source_path: wahoo/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 26-28
    quote: "WAHOO_VALIDATION_ENDPOINT = (\n    \"https://api.wahoopredict.com/api/v2/event/bittensor/statistics/v2\"\
      \n)"
  - claim_field: /aggregation/method
    source_path: wahoo/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 259-267
    quote: "logger.debug(\"Computing weights using EMAVolumeScorer...\")\n    df = records_to_dataframe(validation_data)\n\
      \n    if df.empty:\n        logger.warning(\"No validation data to compute weights from\")\n   \
      \     return {}, {}\n\n    scorer = EMAVolumeScorer()\n    result = scorer.run(df, previous_scores=previous_scores)"
  - claim_field: /aggregation/normalization
    source_path: wahoo/validator/scoring/operators.py
    line_ref: 125-129
    quote: "total = smoothed_scores.sum()\n        if total > 0:\n            weights = smoothed_scores\
      \ / total\n        else:\n            weights = np.zeros_like(smoothed_scores)"
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/fraction
    source_path: wahoo/validator/scoring/rewards.py
    line_ref: 19-20
    quote: 'MINER_EMISSION_PERCENTAGE = 0.25

      BURN_RATE = 1.0 - MINER_EMISSION_PERCENTAGE  # 0.75 = 75% burn rate'
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/address_or_uid
    source_path: wahoo/validator/scoring/rewards.py
    line_ref: 23-24
    quote: '# Owner/Validator UID that receives the burned portion (25% of emissions)

      OWNER_UID = 176'
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/notes
    source_path: wahoo/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 570-579
    quote: "owner_weight = BURN_RATE  # 0.5 = 50% burn rate\n            final_uids = list(active_uids)\n\
      \            final_weights = rewards.clone()\n\n            # Check if owner UID exists in metagraph\n\
      \            if OWNER_UID < len(metagraph.uids):\n                # Add owner UID to the list (it's\
      \ a validator, not in active_uids)\n                final_uids.append(OWNER_UID)\n             \
      \   # Add owner weight (burn_rate) to the weights tensor\n                final_weights = torch.cat([final_weights,\
      \ torch.tensor([owner_weight], dtype=torch.float32)])"
  - claim_field: /aggregation/composition
    source_path: wahoo/validator/scoring/rewards.py
    line_ref: '248'
    quote: rewards = rewards / total * MINER_EMISSION_PERCENTAGE
  - claim_field: /aggregation/notes
    source_path: wahoo/validator/scoring/operators.py
    line_ref: 107-110
    quote: "else:\n                smoothed_scores[i] = (\n                    1 - self.alpha\n      \
      \          ) * prev_score + self.alpha * raw"
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/on_chain_call
    source_path: wahoo/validator/blockchain.py
    line_ref: 64-69
    quote: "result = subtensor.set_weights(\n                wallet=wallet,\n                netuid=netuid,\n\
      \                uids=uids,\n                weights=weights,\n            )"
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/cadence
    source_path: wahoo/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 217-223
    quote: "blocks_since_last_epoch = current_block % tempo\n            blocks_until_next_epoch = tempo\
      \ - blocks_since_last_epoch\n            \n            # Calculate time until next epoch\n     \
      \       interval = blocks_until_next_epoch * BLOCK_TIME_SECONDS"
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/smoothing/notes
    source_path: wahoo/validator/scoring/operators.py
    line_ref: 14-17
    quote: 'HALF_LIFE_SECONDS = 12 * 3600

      EPOCH_INTERVAL_SECONDS = 360 * 12

      HALF_LIFE_EPOCHS = int(HALF_LIFE_SECONDS / EPOCH_INTERVAL_SECONDS)

      EMA_ALPHA = 1 - (0.5 ** (1 / HALF_LIFE_EPOCHS))'
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/2/description
    source_path: wahoo/validator/scoring/operators.py
    line_ref: 98-106
    quote: "elif prev_score > 0 and raw < CLIFF_RESET_THRESHOLD * prev_score:\n                smoothed_scores[i]\
      \ = raw\n                cliff_reset_count += 1"
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/0/description
    source_path: wahoo/validator/scoring/rewards.py
    line_ref: 111-116
    quote: "win_rate = perf.win_rate\n    if win_rate is not None and win_rate < MIN_WIN_RATE:\n     \
      \   return (\n            False,\n            f\"win_rate below threshold (win_rate={win_rate},\
      \ min={MIN_WIN_RATE})\","
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/1/description
    source_path: wahoo/validator/scoring/rewards.py
    line_ref: 51-56
    quote: "if not (0.0 <= prob_yes <= 1.0):\n            logger.debug(f\"prob_yes out of range [0.0,\
      \ 1.0]: {prob_yes}\")\n            return False\n\n        epsilon = 1e-6\n        if abs((prob_yes\
      \ + prob_no) - 1.0) > epsilon:"
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/state_kinds
    source_path: wahoo/validator/validator.py
    line_ref: 529-533
    quote: "scores_to_save = updated_ema_scores if updated_ema_scores else wahoo_weights\n           \
      \         if scores_to_save:\n                        validator_db.add_scoring_run(\n          \
      \                  scores_to_save, reason=\"ema_update\"\n                        )"
  - claim_field: /mechanism_status
    source_path: wahoo/validator/scoring/rewards.py
    line_ref: 244-248
    quote: "if total > 0.0:\n        # Normalize to sum to 1.0 first, then scale by MINER_EMISSION_PERCENTAGE\n\
      \        # This implements the burn mechanism: only MINER_EMISSION_PERCENTAGE goes to miners\n \
      \       # The remaining BURN_RATE will be routed to owner UID 176\n        rewards = rewards / total\
      \ * MINER_EMISSION_PERCENTAGE"
  unresolved:
  - subnet.netuid not stated in source (NETUID read from env, default 0).
  - EMA alpha and tempo are computed at runtime from constants, not stored as literals; left null.
  - Exact API field semantics for win_rate / total_volume_usd not defined in repo (provided by external
    Wahoo API).
composition:
  shape: gated
  overlays:
  - burn
  - guards
  - state
  extern_count: 0

docs.title: WebGenieAI
docs.text:
Subnet web-genie-ai__web-genie-ai netuid None Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status active Task Miners receive an image (screenshot of a ground-truth webpage) and must generate HTML that visually and structurally reproduces it. Submissions are revealed via a hash commit-reveal scheme. Validators score each submission on three metrics (visual accuracy, Lighthouse SEO, and code quality) and pick DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: ReferenceModel"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: CommitReveal, DeterministicCheck, Other"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: vlm_judgment"]
  M1["Metric: composite"]
  M2["Metric: composite"]
  AGG["aggregate: WinnerTakeAll"]
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2
  GT --> M2
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  AGG --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: webGenieAi

    netuid: -
    lang: python
    status: active
    submission: [source_code, commitment_hash]

    @guards {
        CommitReveal {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        Other {
            enforcement: elimination
        }
        LivenessCheck {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
    }
    @state { cumulative_score, performance_ledger }

    Multiplex<multi_mechanism> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: vlm_judgment
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: ReferenceModel {
            trust_model: trusted
        }
        aggregate: WinnerTakeAll {
            composition: hybrid
            normalization: l1
        }
        smooth: None {}
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: per_round
            tempo: "SESSION_WINDOW_BLOCKS = 1805 blocks (EPOCH_BLOCKS 361 * 5)"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: multi_mechanism
            count: 2
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: active
mechanism_status_notes: Live validator scores miners each session and sets weights on-chain (L1-normalized
  winner-take-all). No burn UID is allocated in code. Only AccuracyChallenge and BalancedChallenge are
  in the rotation; SeoChallenge and QualityChallenge classes exist but are not used by query_miners.
subnet:
  name: WebGenieAI
  owner_repo: web-genie-ai__web-genie-ai
  netuid: null
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners receive an image (screenshot of a ground-truth webpage) and must generate HTML that
    visually and structurally reproduces it. Submissions are revealed via a hash commit-reveal scheme.
    Validators score each submission on three metrics (visual accuracy, Lighthouse SEO, and code quality)
    and pick a per-session winner.
  submission_format:
  - source_code
  - commitment_hash
scoring_signals:
- name: Accuracy
  metric_kind: vlm_judgment
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: 'VisualReward: visual similarity between rendered miner HTML screenshot and ground-truth image.
    Combines high-level matching (CLIP) and low-level element matching as high_level_scores*0.3 + low_level_scores*0.7.
    Low-level itself is button*0.25 + input*0.25 + text*0.25 + anchor*0.25. Weight is null because the
    additive weight depends on the active challenge type (0.9 in Accuracy, 0.8 in Balanced) and it also
    acts as a gate (>0.85) in the Seo/Quality challenge variants.'
- name: Seo
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  notes: 'LighthouseReward: Google Lighthouse score of the miner HTML, served via a local lighthouse server.
    Contributes 0.1 weight only in BalancedChallenge; in (unused) SeoChallenge it is gated by accuracy>0.85.'
  normalization: none
- name: Quality
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  notes: 'QualityReward: code-quality score of the generated HTML. Contributes 0.1 weight in both Accuracy
    and Balanced challenges; in (unused) QualityChallenge it is gated by accuracy>0.85.'
  normalization: none
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: reference_model
  description: Ground-truth HTML pages are drawn from CentralDataset (the WebGenieAI central dataset,
    authenticated by validator wallet signature). The ground-truth HTML is rendered to a screenshot which
    becomes the task prompt; the same HTML is the reference for scoring.
  source_identifier: CentralDataset
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: Other datasets (RandomWebsiteDataset, SyntheticDataset, HuggingfaceDataset SALT-NLP/Design2Code-hf)
    are present but commented out; only CentralDataset is active.
aggregation:
  method: winner_take_all
  composition: hybrid
  normalization: l1
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: false
    address_or_uid: null
    fraction: null
    dynamic: false
    notes: No burn UID or burn fraction allocated in the weight-setting code.
  notes: 'Per challenge, aggregated_scores combine the metrics linearly (AccuracyChallenge: accuracy*0.9
    + quality*0.1; BalancedChallenge: accuracy*0.8 + quality*0.1 + seo*0.1). Across a session these per-task
    scores accumulate; a single winner (argmax of average score, requiring solved_tasks >= number_of_tasks
    - MAX_UNANSWERED_TASKS) is chosen. get_scores then assigns the current session''s winner big_weight=1.0
    and earlier session winners (within CONSIDERING_SESSION_COUNTS=8) tiny_weight=1/128; the resulting
    score vector is L1-normalized (scores / norm with ord=1) into raw weights.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: per_round
  method: Set once per session boundary. set_weights() runs in sync_loop (every BLOCK_IN_SECONDS*10 seconds),
    but skips unless a new session has started (last_set_weights_session == current_session - 1 guard).
    A session = block // SESSION_WINDOW_BLOCKS where SESSION_WINDOW_BLOCKS = EPOCH_BLOCKS(361) * 5.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: SESSION_WINDOW_BLOCKS = 1805 blocks (EPOCH_BLOCKS 361 * 5)
  smoothing:
    kind: none
    alpha: null
    window: null
    notes: No EMA on the final reward. Scores are accumulated within a session and reset on each new session
      (update_scores zeroes total_scores when current_session != session). Past session winners only contribute
      the fixed tiny_weight 1/128.
anti_gaming:
- kind: commit_reveal
  enforcement: rejection
  description: 'Two-phase query: miners first return an html_hash, then after TASK_REVEAL_TIME the HTML
    is revealed. checked_synapse calls verify_answer_hash(synapse); mismatching hash => solution dropped.'
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: rejection
  description: checked_synapse rejects solutions with dendrite status_code != 200, with nonce != miner_uid,
    and HTML that fails preprocess_html / is_valid_resources validity checks.
- kind: other
  kind_other: hardcoded coldkey blacklist
  enforcement: elimination
  enforcement_other: hardcoded coldkey blacklist
  description: is_blacklisted() skips any UID whose coldkey is in a hardcoded blacklist (["5G9yTkkDd39chZiyvKwNsQvzqbbPgdiLtdb4sCR743f4MuRY"])
    when selecting the session winner.
- kind: liveness_check
  enforcement: penalty
  description: A miner is only eligible to win if it answered at least number_of_tasks - MAX_UNANSWERED_TASKS
    (MAX_UNANSWERED_TASKS=4) tasks in the session; otherwise its average score is forced to 0.
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_mechanism
  stages:
  - name: AccuracyChallenge
    role: main
    advancement_rule: aggregated = accuracy*0.9 + quality*0.1
    multipliers:
      accuracy: 0.9
      quality: 0.1
  - name: BalancedChallenge
    role: main
    advancement_rule: aggregated = accuracy*0.8 + quality*0.1 + seo*0.1
    multipliers:
      accuracy: 0.8
      quality: 0.1
      seo: 0.1
  count: 2
  notes: Challenge class for a session = available_challenges_classes[session % 4] where the list is [AccuracyChallenge,
    BalancedChallenge, AccuracyChallenge, BalancedChallenge]. SeoChallenge and QualityChallenge classes
    are defined (gated by accuracy>0.85) but not in the rotation. RESERVED_WEIGHTS dict (ACCURACY:70,
    BALANCED:10, SEO:10, QUALITY:10) exists but is only used in the commented-out get_scores branch.
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - cumulative_score
  - performance_ledger
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: total_scores and solved_tasks are accumulated per session and reset to zeros at each new
    session. session_results older than session - CONSIDERING_SESSION_COUNTS*2 are pruned. Scores for
    a UID are zeroed when its hotkey changes (set_new_hotkeys).
  notes: 'Persisted to state.npz: total_scores_{__STATE_VERSION__}, solved_tasks, number_of_tasks, session_results,
    last_set_weights_session, current_session.'
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: webgenie __VERSION__ = 1.3.4
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - docs/validator.md
  - docs/miner.md
  completeness: medium
provenance:
  extracted_by: im-extract
  confidence_overall: medium
  evidence:
  - claim_field: /subnet/implementation_lang
    source_path: webgenie/constants.py
    line_ref: 1-12
    quote: 'import bittensor as bt ... __VERSION__ = "1.3.4" # version'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /task/summary
    source_path: webgenie/tasks/image_task_generator.py
    line_ref: 52-87
    quote: base64_image = await html_to_screenshot(ground_truth_html ...) ... WebgenieImageSynapse(base64_image=base64_image,
      task_id=image_task.task_id)
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /task/submission_format
    source_path: neurons/validators/genie_validator.py
    line_ref: 133-143
    quote: reveal_synapse.html_hash = hash_synapse.html_hash ... Solution(html = checked_synapse.html,
      miner_uid = miner_uid,)
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0
    source_path: webgenie/rewards/visual_reward/visual_reward.py
    line_ref: '53'
    quote: scores = high_level_scores * 0.3 + low_level_scores * 0.7
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/0/notes
    source_path: webgenie/rewards/visual_reward/low_level_matching_score/low_level_matching_score.py
    line_ref: '35'
    quote: score = button_score * 0.25 + input_score * 0.25 + text_score * 0.25 + anchor_score * 0.25
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/1
    source_path: webgenie/tasks/image_task_generator.py
    line_ref: 46-50
    quote: 'self.metrics = { ACCURACY_METRIC_NAME: VisualReward(), SEO_METRIC_NAME: LighthouseReward(),
      QUALITY_METRIC_NAME: QualityReward(), }'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /ground_truth_sources/0
    source_path: webgenie/tasks/image_task_generator.py
    line_ref: 39-44
    quote: 'self.datasets = [ (CentralDataset(), 1), #(RandomWebsiteDataset(), 1), ... ]'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /aggregation/notes
    source_path: webgenie/challenges/challenge.py
    line_ref: 33-36
    quote: scores = await self.task.generator.calculate_scores(self.task, self.solutions) ; aggregated_scores
      = scores[ACCURACY_METRIC_NAME] * 0.9 + scores[QUALITY_METRIC_NAME] * 0.1
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /sub_competitions/stages/1
    source_path: webgenie/challenges/challenge.py
    line_ref: 64-69
    quote: aggregated_scores = accuracy_scores * 0.8 + quality_scores * 0.1 + seo_scores * 0.1
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /aggregation/method
    source_path: neurons/validators/score_manager.py
    line_ref: 199-214
    quote: 'tiny_weight = 1 / 128 ; big_weight = 1.0 ... if session_number == session_upto: scores[winner]
      += big_weight else: scores[winner] += tiny_weight'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /aggregation/normalization
    source_path: neurons/validators/validator.py
    line_ref: 141-148
    quote: norm = np.linalg.norm(scores, ord=1, axis=0, keepdims=True) ... raw_weights = scores / norm
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/method
    source_path: neurons/validators/validator.py
    line_ref: 128-134
    quote: 'current_session = self.session ; last_set_weights_session = self.score_manager.last_set_weights_session
      ; if last_set_weights_session == current_session - 1: return ; scores = self.score_manager.get_scores(current_session
      - 1)'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/on_chain_call
    source_path: neurons/validators/validator.py
    line_ref: 173-181
    quote: result, msg = self.subtensor.set_weights( wallet=self.wallet, netuid=self.config.netuid, uids=uint_uids,
      weights=uint_weights, ... version_key=self.spec_version,)
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/tempo_or_interval
    source_path: webgenie/constants.py
    line_ref: 60-62
    quote: 'EPOCH_BLOCKS = 361 # epoch blocks ; SESSION_WINDOW_BLOCKS = EPOCH_BLOCKS * 5 # session window
      blocks'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/cadence
    source_path: neurons/validators/validator.py
    line_ref: 55-57
    quote: '@property def session(self): return self.block // SESSION_WINDOW_BLOCKS'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/0
    source_path: neurons/validators/genie_validator.py
    line_ref: 396-398
    quote: 'if not verify_answer_hash(synapse): bt.logging.warning(f"Invalid answer hash: {synapse.html_hash}")
      return None'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/1
    source_path: neurons/validators/genie_validator.py
    line_ref: 389-404
    quote: 'if synapse.dendrite.status_code != 200: return None ... if synapse.nonce != miner_uid: ...
      if not html or not is_valid_resources(html): ... return None'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/2
    source_path: neurons/validators/score_manager.py
    line_ref: 166-168
    quote: blacklisted_coldkeys = ["5G9yTkkDd39chZiyvKwNsQvzqbbPgdiLtdb4sCR743f4MuRY"] ; return self.neuron.metagraph.axons[uid].coldkey
      in blacklisted_coldkeys
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/3
    source_path: neurons/validators/score_manager.py
    line_ref: 175-178
    quote: 'if solved_tasks[uid] >= max(1, number_of_tasks - MAX_UNANSWERED_TASKS): avg_scores[uid] =
      total_scores[uid] / solved_tasks[uid] else: avg_scores[uid] = 0'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /sub_competitions/notes
    source_path: neurons/validators/genie_validator.py
    line_ref: 94-104
    quote: available_challenges_classes = [ AccuracyChallenge, BalancedChallenge, AccuracyChallenge, BalancedChallenge,
      ] ... challenge_class = available_challenges_classes[session % len(available_challenges_classes)]
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/reset_policy
    source_path: neurons/validators/score_manager.py
    line_ref: 130-139
    quote: 'if self.current_session != session: ... self.total_scores = np.zeros(...) ; self.number_of_tasks
      += 1 ; self.total_scores[uids] += rewards ; self.solved_tasks[uids] += 1'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /mechanism_status
    source_path: neurons/validators/validator.py
    line_ref: 135-137
    quote: 'scores = self.score_manager.get_scores(current_session - 1) ; if np.all(scores == 0): ...
      skipping set_weights'
    confidence: medium
  unresolved:
  - subnet.netuid not stated in source (README mentions testnet 214; mainnet netuid not in code).
  - QualityReward and LighthouseReward internal scoring formulas not fully read; signal weights for Seo/Quality
    marked null.
  - CONSIDERING_SESSION_COUNTS=8 governs how many past sessions contribute tiny_weight; not mapped to
    a single schema decay field.
  extractor_notes: Winner-take-all per session with a small tail of recent-session winners (1/128 each)
    then L1-normalized; modeled as aggregation.method winner_take_all + composition hybrid + normalization
    l1. No burn allocation in code.
composition:
  shape: multiplex
  overlays:
  - guards
  - state
  extern_count: 0

docs.title: WOMBO EdgeMaxxing
docs.text:
Subnet womboai__edge-maxxing netuid 39 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status active Task Miners submit optimized AI image-generation model repositories (e.g. Flux Schnell, SDXL NewDream) targeting fixed consumer hardware (NVIDIA RTX 4090). A daily contest benchmarks each submission's inference performance (generation time, VRAM/RAM use, power, size, load time) and output similarity to a DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: ReferenceModel, HardwareProbe"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: Deduplication, DeterministicCheck, StakeWeighting"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: similarity"]
  M1["Metric: latency"]
  M2["Metric: hardware_spec"]
  M3["Metric: hardware_spec"]
  M4["Metric: hardware_spec"]
  M5["Metric: latency"]
  M6["Metric: hardware_spec"]
  AGG["aggregate: Proportional"]
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  G --> M2
  GT --> M2
  G --> M3
  GT --> M3
  G --> M4
  GT --> M4
  G --> M5
  GT --> M5
  G --> M6
  GT --> M6
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  M3 --> AGG
  M4 --> AGG
  M5 --> AGG
  M6 --> AGG
  AGG --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: womboEdgeMaxxing

    netuid: 39
    lang: python
    status: active
    submission: source_code

    @guards {
        Deduplication {
            enforcement: rejection
        }
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        StakeWeighting {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
    }

    Multiplex<multi_mechanism> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: similarity
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: other
            },
            Metric {
                kind: latency
                direction: lower_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: hardware_spec
                direction: lower_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: hardware_spec
                direction: lower_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: hardware_spec
                direction: lower_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: latency
                direction: lower_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: hardware_spec
                direction: lower_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: [
            ReferenceModel {
                trust_model: trusted
            },
            HardwareProbe {
                trust_model: trusted
            }
        ]
        aggregate: Proportional {
            composition: multiplicative
            normalization: none
        }
        smooth: None {}
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: daily
            tempo: "epoch_length blocks (sleep epoch_length*12 s after a successful set)"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: multi_mechanism
            count: 2
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: active
mechanism_status_notes: 'The documented scoring path is the one the validator invokes: set_weights() computes
  scores via contest_state.get_scores() and weights via calculate_score_weights(). No burn / null-UID
  routing is present in the source; when scoring cannot proceed (no contest state, no baseline, all-equal
  scores) the validator falls back to equal weights ([1.0]*N), not a burn.'
subnet:
  name: WOMBO EdgeMaxxing
  owner_repo: womboai__edge-maxxing
  netuid: 39
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners submit optimized AI image-generation model repositories (e.g. Flux Schnell, SDXL NewDream)
    targeting fixed consumer hardware (NVIDIA RTX 4090). A daily contest benchmarks each submission's
    inference performance (generation time, VRAM/RAM use, power, size, load time) and output similarity
    to a reference baseline. Miners are rewarded by how much their submission improves on the baseline
    relative to other miners.
  submission_format:
  - source_code
scoring_signals:
- name: average_similarity
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: other
  normalization_other: 'transformed: ((average_similarity - 0.75) / (1 - 0.75)) ** (1 - 0.75); enters
    the score product as a multiplicative factor.'
  notes: 'Image output similarity vs the baseline model output. Gated: if min_similarity < 0.75 the score
    is forced to -1.'
- name: generation_time_improvement
  metric_kind: latency
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: pow(baseline_generation_time / benchmark_generation_time, metric_weight/metric_gcd); enters the
    score as a multiplicative factor. metric_weight is fetched from the remote inputs API (not a code
    literal). README states generation time = 14% of final score for the Flux contest.
- name: vram_used_improvement
  metric_kind: hardware_spec
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: 'pow(baseline_vram / benchmark_vram, metric_weight/metric_gcd). README: VRAM = 43% of final score
    for the Flux contest.'
- name: size_improvement
  metric_kind: hardware_spec
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: pow(baseline_size / benchmark_size, metric_weight/metric_gcd).
- name: watts_used_improvement
  metric_kind: hardware_spec
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: pow(baseline_watts / benchmark_watts, metric_weight/metric_gcd).
- name: load_time_improvement
  metric_kind: latency
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: pow(baseline_load_time / benchmark_load_time, metric_weight/metric_gcd).
- name: ram_used_improvement
  metric_kind: hardware_spec
  direction: lower_is_better
  weight: null
  normalization: none
  notes: pow(baseline_ram / benchmark_ram, metric_weight/metric_gcd).
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: reference_model
  description: Each contest has a fixed baseline repository (e.g. flux-schnell-edge-inference at a pinned
    revision). Submissions are benchmarked against the baseline's metrics and its image output (for similarity).
  source_identifier: womboai/flux-schnell-edge-inference, womboai/sdxl-newdream-20-inference
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: Baseline RepositoryInfo with pinned url+revision is hardcoded per Contest in CONTESTS.
- kind: hardware_probe
  description: Benchmark metrics (generation_time, size, vram_used, watts_used, load_time, ram_used) are
    measured by running the submitted model on the target device (NVIDIA RTX 4090).
  source_identifier: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090
  trust_model: trusted
aggregation:
  method: proportional
  composition: multiplicative
  normalization: none
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: false
    address_or_uid: null
    fraction: null
    dynamic: false
    notes: No burn / null-UID routing in source. Fallback when scoring is impossible is equal weights
      ([1.0]*N), not a burn.
  notes: Per-miner score = product over the 7 metric-improvement factors and the transformed similarity,
    minus 1. Final weight per hotkey = score - min(score over all miners) (a min subtraction / floor-shift,
    NOT softmax or sum-to-one). Min-similarity gate forces score to -1. method=proportional captures that
    on-chain weight is proportional to the shifted score.
weight_setting:
  cadence: daily
  method: 'WeightSetter thread loops: get scores from benchmarks, calculate_score_weights (score - min
    score), map to node_ids, call set_node_weights. Sleeps epoch_length*12 seconds between successful
    sets. Contest runs daily at 12 PM PST per README; delayed_weight_setting flag (from inputs API) can
    defer to previous day''s benchmarks.'
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: epoch_length blocks (sleep epoch_length*12 s after a successful set)
  smoothing:
    kind: none
    alpha: null
    window: null
    notes: No EMA / moving-average smoothing of the reward in source. delayed_weight_setting reuses the
      previous day's benchmarks but is a substitution, not a temporal average.
anti_gaming:
- kind: deduplication
  enforcement: rejection
  description: Copy/duplicate submissions are identified server-side via the inputs API (get_duplicate_submissions
    returns safe_submissions vs duplicate_submissions with copy_of). calculate_score_weights notes 'Assumes
    that copies are removed from the scores'. on_safe_list checks a hotkey+revision against the safe list.
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: penalty
  description: 'Output similarity gate: if min_similarity < SIMILARITY_SCORE_THRESHOLD (0.75) the score
    is forced to -1, penalizing submissions that diverge too far from baseline image output.'
- kind: stake_weighting
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Blacklist (hotkeys/coldkeys) from the inputs API removes blacklisted miners' benchmarks
    and submissions before scoring.
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_mechanism
  stages:
  - name: FLUX_NVIDIA_4090
    role: main
    advancement_rule: score relative to baseline and other miners
  - name: SDXL_NEWDREAM_NVIDIA_4090
    role: main
    advancement_rule: score relative to baseline and other miners
  count: 2
  notes: Two contests defined in CONTESTS, each tied to a baseline model + RTX 4090 device. The set of
    active contests and per-metric weights are supplied by the remote inputs API at runtime.
per_miner_state:
  tracked: false
  state_kinds: []
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: ''
  notes: Scoring is recomputed each contest from current benchmarks; no persistent per-miner ledger or
    status enum carried across rounds in the validator source.
documentation:

docs.title: TaoLend
docs.text:
Subnet xpenlab__taolend netuid 116 Archetype multiplex Language none_docs_only Mechanism status mixed Task TaoLend is a decentralized peer-to-peer TAO lending protocol on Bittensor SN116. "Miners" are market participants (TAO depositors and active lenders) who interact with an EVM smart contract, not nodes running mining software. ALPHA rewards are distributed off-chain to participants based on their con DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: MarketData"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: Other"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: volume"]
  M1["Metric: volume"]
  AGG["aggregate: Proportional"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0
  G --> M1
  GT --> M1
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  AGG --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: taoLend

    netuid: 116
    lang: none_docs_only
    status: mixed
    submission: other

    @burn {
        fraction: dynamic
    }
    @guards {
        Other {
            enforcement: other
        }
    }
    @state { debt_ledger, other }

    Multiplex<multi_mechanism> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: volume
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: volume
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: MarketData {
            trust_model: oracle
        }
        aggregate: Proportional {
            composition: weighted_sum
            normalization: none
        }
        smooth: None {}
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: daily
            tempo: "epoch_length default 100 blocks; reward distribution daily at 08:00 UTC+8"
        }
        tracks {
            structure: multi_mechanism
            count: 2
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: mixed
mechanism_status_notes: Weights are fetched from a centralized HTTP API (https://api.taolend.io/v1/weights)
  and set on chain verbatim; no scoring logic exists in this repo. On API error or stale/empty data the
  validator falls back to uids=[0], weights=[1.0]. The documented allocation algorithm (deposit 20% /
  lending 80%, 1.5x lender fee multiplier, min-balance sampling, excess-ALPHA burn) is an off-chain backend
  process described in README.md, not implemented here. README also notes that excess ALPHA is "permanently
  burned" after deposit/lending/gas allocation.
subnet:
  name: TaoLend
  owner_repo: xpenlab__taolend
  netuid: 116
  implementation_lang: none_docs_only
task:
  summary: 'TaoLend is a decentralized peer-to-peer TAO lending protocol on Bittensor SN116. "Miners"
    are market participants (TAO depositors and active lenders) who interact with an EVM smart contract,
    not nodes running mining software. ALPHA rewards are distributed off-chain to participants based on
    their contribution to protocol trading activity: 20% to TAO depositors (by historical minimum balance)
    and 80% to active lenders (proportional to protocol fees earned, i.e. 30% of interest, scaled by a
    1.5x multiplier). The subnet owner registers placeholder miners on SN116; a backend computes a weight
    vector and the validator in this repo merely fetches and submits it.'
  submission_format:
  - other
  submission_format_other: On-chain DeFi activity (TAO deposits and P2P loans via the LendingPool EVM
    contract); rewards are credited to userAlphaBalance and withdrawn via withdrawAlpha(). No model/code/signal
    is submitted to validators.
scoring_signals:
- name: protocol_fees_earned
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.8
  normalization: none
  notes: Lending reward (80% share). Each lender receives lending_actual_alpha * (lender_protocol_fee
    / total_protocol_fees). Protocol fee is 30% of interest; lender rewards from fees are scaled by a
    1.5x LENDER_FEE_MULTIPLIER before the 80% cap is applied.
- name: tao_deposit_min_balance
  metric_kind: volume
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.2
  normalization: none
  notes: Deposit reward (20% share). user_deposit_reward = deposit_max_alpha * (user_min_balance / total_min_balances),
    where user_min_balance is the MINIMUM on-chain balance across blocks sampled every 360 blocks (~1
    hour) over the epoch, to resist gaming.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: market_data
  description: 'On-chain state of the TaoLend EVM LendingPool contract: protocol fees from repaid loans
    (in TAO) and historical TAO deposit balances sampled on chain.'
  source_identifier: TaoLend LendingPoolV2 contract (SN116) + on-chain balance sampling
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: ALPHA price (SN116_alpha_price) is also read for TAO<->ALPHA conversion. The weight vector itself
    is delivered to the validator by the centralized API https://api.taolend.io/v1/weights.
aggregation:
  method: proportional
  composition: weighted_sum
  normalization: none
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: null
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: null
    fraction: null
    dynamic: true
    notes: 'README: "Excess ALPHA (after deposit + lending + gas) is permanently burned." Burn is the
      computed residual: remaining = miner_allocatable_alpha - deposit_max_alpha - lending_actual_alpha;
      burn_alpha = remaining - gas_fee. This off-chain ALPHA burn is distinct from the validator''s on-chain
      fallback (uids=[0], weights=[1.0]) on API failure.'
  notes: Reward is split deposit (20%) + lending (80%) of miner_allocatable_alpha, where the latter is
    a dual-cap min(fixed pool cap, TAO emission cap). Lenders share the lending pool proportionally to
    protocol fees; depositors share the deposit pool proportionally to min sampled balance. The actual
    weight vector is computed off-chain and only fetched by this repo's validator.
weight_setting:
  cadence: daily
  method: Validator GETs a precomputed weight vector (uids, weights, block_number) from https://api.taolend.io/v1/weights
    and calls subtensor.set_weights with it verbatim. On API error, stale data (no block_number), or length
    mismatch it falls back to uids=[0], weights=[1.0]. Weights are set only when (block - metagraph.last_update[uid])
    > epoch_length (default 100 blocks).
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: epoch_length default 100 blocks; reward distribution daily at 08:00 UTC+8
  smoothing:
    kind: none
    alpha: null
    window: null
    notes: ''
anti_gaming:
- kind: other
  kind_other: historical_minimum_balance_sampling
  enforcement: other
  enforcement_other: effective_balance_reduction
  description: 'Deposit rewards use the MINIMUM on-chain balance across blocks sampled every 360 blocks
    (~1 hour) over the epoch as the effective balance, preventing users from temporarily inflating deposits
    during allocation. README example: 10 TAO for 23h + 1000 TAO for 1h => effective 10 TAO.'
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_mechanism
  stages:
  - name: tao_depositors
    role: other
  - name: active_lenders
    role: other
  count: 2
  notes: 'Two reward tracks share one allocatable pool: 20% to TAO depositors, 80% to active lenders.
    Not a competitive tournament; a fixed-fraction split of the reward pool.'
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - debt_ledger
  - other
  status_values: []
  reset_policy: Per-day epochs (rewards for 00:00-23:59 UTC distributed next day 08:00 UTC+8). ALPHA allocations
    below the 10-ALPHA minimum transfer threshold accumulate in a database across days until total >=
    10 ALPHA, then are deposited in a single transaction.
  notes: 'Off-chain per-user state: userAlphaBalance[address][netuid] (credited rewards, withdrawn via
    withdrawAlpha()) and accumulated sub-threshold pending rewards. Loan/debt state lives in the EVM LendingPool
    contract. None of this is tracked in this repo''s validator.'
documentation:
  status: docs_only
  source_version: validator 1.0.3
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - CONTRACT.md
  - docs/CONTRACT.md

    source_path: README.md

    quote: '- **20% to TAO Depositors**: Users who deposit TAO into the protocol to provide offer liquidity'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /scoring_signals/1/notes
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: 228-234
    quote: Take MINIMUM balance across all samples as effective balance ... user_deposit_reward = deposit_max_alpha
      × (user_min_balance / total_min_balances)
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /aggregation/method
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '162'
    quote: '2. **Proportional Distribution**: Rewards proportional to deposits and protocol fees earned'
    confidence: medium
  - claim_field: /aggregation/burn_allocation/dynamic
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: '73'
    quote: Excess ALPHA (after deposit + lending + gas) is **permanently burned**
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /aggregation/notes
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: 169-187
    quote: miner_allocatable_alpha = min( EPOCH_DAILY_ALPHA × ALLOCATION_RATE × 0.41, total_emission_tao
      × 0.41 × ALLOCATION_RATE / alpha_price )
    confidence: medium
  - claim_field: /anti_gaming/0/description
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: 229-240
    quote: Sample blocks every 360 blocks (~1 hour) throughout the epoch ... Take MINIMUM balance across
      all samples as effective balance
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /sub_competitions/structure
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: 45-46
    quote: '- **20% to TAO Depositors** ... - **80% to Active Lenders**'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/reset_policy
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: 80-84
    quote: '**Threshold**: 10 ALPHA per address ... Allocations accumulate in the database until total
      ≥ 10 ALPHA'
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /per_miner_state/notes
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: 76-78
    quote: ALPHA is credited to users' contract balances (`userAlphaBalance[address][netuid]`) ... Users
      can withdraw anytime using the `withdrawAlpha()` function
    confidence: high
  - claim_field: /weight_setting/cadence
    source_path: README.md
    line_ref: 65-68
    quote: Distribution executes **8 hours after the end of each day** (UTC+8, 08:00 AM) ... Calculates
      rewards for the previous day's activity
    confidence: medium
  unresolved:
  - No scoring/reward code exists in this repo; the documented allocation algorithm runs on an off-chain
    backend (api.taolend.io). Constants in the README table (EPOCH_DAILY_ALPHA=7200, MINER_EMISSION_RATE=41%,
    LENDER_FEE_MULTIPLIER=1.5, etc.) are documented but not verifiable against source code here.
  - The on-chain fallback weight (uids=[0], weights=[1.0]) target UID 0 is presumably a burn/owner UID
    but is not labelled as such in source; aggregation.burn_allocation.address_or_uid left null.
  - ALLOCATION_RATE is documented as a configurable 20-50% range, not a single literal value.
  - Aggregation normalization to the on-chain weight vector format is opaque (computed by the off-chain
    API); not derivable from this repo.
  extractor_notes: 'Docs-only repo: only neurons/validator.py and start_validator.py are code, and the
    validator contains no scoring logic. It fetches a precomputed weight vector from a centralized API
    and sets it on chain, with a hard fallback to a single UID on failure. All scoring/reward detail comes
    from the README "Weight Allocation Algorithm" section describing an off-chain backend process. Enum
    ''other'' was needed for: task.submission_format (on-chain DeFi activity, no validator submission),
    anti_gaming.kind/enforcement (min-balance sampling), per_miner_state.state_kinds (off-chain ALPHA
    ledger), and sub_competition stage roles (reward-share tracks, not tournament stages). Numeric constants
    from the README table were intentionally NOT placed in structured numeric fields since they describe
    an off-chain process not present in this repo; only the 20/80 documented split was recorded as signal
    weights.'
composition:
  shape: multiplex
  overlays:
  - burn
  - guards
  - state
  extern_count: 0

docs.title: MIID Subnet 54 - Identity Testing Network
docs.text:
Subnet yanez-compliance__MIID-subnet netuid 54 Archetype multiplex Language python Mechanism status partial_burn Task Miners receive seed identities (name, date of birth, address) plus a threat-scenario spec and must generate name variations (and DOB/address variations) that simulate identity-evasion techniques used to bypass KYC/sanctions screening. Validators grade variations on phonetic and orthographic similari DataflowIMMLIR (YAML) 
flowchart TD
  SUB(["submission"]):::in
  GT(["groundTruth: DeterministicDataset, HardwareProbe, ReferenceModel"]):::in
  G{{"@guards: DeterministicCheck, Deduplication, PlagiarismDetection"}}:::ov
  M0["Metric: similarity"]
  M1["Metric: composite"]
  M2["Metric: composite"]
  M3["Metric: composite"]
  M4["Metric: composite"]
  M5["Metric: composite"]
  M6["Metric: composite"]
  M7["Metric: composite"]
  AGG["aggregate: RankBased"]
  SM["smooth: Ema"]
  BURN{{"@burn: redirect a fraction"}}:::ov
  PUB["publish: SetWeights"]
  OUT(["weights on-chain = final score"]):::out
  ST(["@state: carried across rounds"]):::note
  SUB --> G
  G --> M0
  GT --> M0

  G --> M6

  G --> M7
  GT --> M7
  M0 --> AGG
  M1 --> AGG
  M2 --> AGG
  M3 --> AGG
  M4 --> AGG
  M5 --> AGG
  M6 --> AGG
  M7 --> AGG
  AGG --> SM
  SM --> BURN
  BURN --> PUB
  PUB --> OUT
  ST --> AGG
  classDef in fill:#e6f0ff,stroke:#5b8;
  classDef out fill:#e6ffe6,stroke:#3a3;
  classDef ov fill:#fff3d6,stroke:#caa;
  classDef note fill:#f3f3f3,stroke:#bbb;
Mechanism {
    id: miidSubnet54IdentityTestingNetwork

    netuid: 54
    lang: python
    status: partial_burn
    submission: signals

    @burn {
        uid: "59"
        fraction: dynamic
    }
    @guards {
        DeterministicCheck {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        Deduplication {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        PlagiarismDetection {
            enforcement: penalty
        }
        RateLimit {
            enforcement: barrier
        }
    }
    @state { reputation, cumulative_score }

    Multiplex<multi_mechanism> {
        score: [
            Metric {
                kind: similarity
                direction: target_band
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: target_band
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: target_band
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            },
            Metric {
                kind: composite
                direction: higher_is_better
                normalization: none
            }
        ]
        groundTruth: [
            DeterministicDataset {
                trust_model: trusted
            },
            HardwareProbe {
                trust_model: oracle
            },
            ReferenceModel {
                trust_model: unknown
            }
        ]
        aggregate: RankBased {
            composition: hybrid
            normalization: l1
            decay_rate: 0.05
        }
        smooth: Ema {
            alpha: 0.15
        }
        publish: SetWeights {
            cadence: per_epoch
        }
        tracks {
            structure: multi_mechanism
            count: 2
        }
    }
}

schema_version: 1.2.0
instance_kind: extracted
mechanism_status: partial_burn
mechanism_status_notes: Live scoring is active but heavily burn-weighted. A configurable burn_fraction
  (default 0.65) is sent to hardcoded burn UID 59 whenever miners qualify; if no miner clears the quality
  threshold, 100% of emissions burn to UID 59. With UAV_grading enabled (default True), kept emissions
  are split 10% KAV / 90% UAV reputation, so most reward flows through an off-chain reputation snapshot
  rather than the documented online name-variation quality scoring.
subnet:
  name: MIID Subnet 54 - Identity Testing Network
  owner_repo: yanez-compliance__MIID-subnet
  netuid: 54
  implementation_lang: python
task:
  summary: Miners receive seed identities (name, date of birth, address) plus a threat-scenario spec and
    must generate name variations (and DOB/address variations) that simulate identity-evasion techniques
    used to bypass KYC/sanctions screening. Validators grade variations on phonetic and orthographic similarity,
    count/uniqueness/length, rule-compliance, and address/DOB validity.
  submission_format:
  - signals
scoring_signals:
- name: phonetic_orthographic_similarity
  metric_kind: similarity
  direction: target_band
  weight: 0.6
  normalization: none
  notes: Combined phonetic (Soundex/Metaphone/NYSIIS) and orthographic (Levenshtein) similarity scored
    against target distribution bands (Light/Medium/Far). similarity_weight=0.60 in MIID_REWARD_WEIGHTS,
    applied per-part in calculate_part_score.
- name: count_match
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: target_band
  weight: 0.15
  normalization: none
  notes: Score for producing the expected number of variations within an adaptive tolerance; exponential-decay
    penalty for deviation. count_weight=0.15.
- name: uniqueness
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.1
  normalization: none
  notes: uniqueness_weight=0.10; ratio of sufficiently-distinct variations after clustering.
- name: length_reasonableness
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: target_band
  weight: 0.15
  normalization: none
  notes: length_weight=0.15; adaptive length-ratio score vs original name.
- name: rule_compliance
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.2
  normalization: none
  notes: rule_compliance_weight=0.20 in MIID_REWARD_WEIGHTS; final per-name score is base_weight*base_score
    + rule_compliance_weight*rule_compliance_score with base_weight = 1.0 - rule_compliance_weight.
- name: address_validity
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.7
  normalization: none
  notes: In final per-miner reward, components are weighted quality_weight=0.2, dob_weight=0.1, address_weight=0.7.
    Address scored via Nominatim bounding-box area buckets (1.0/0.9/0.8/0.7/0.3).
- name: dob_validity
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.1
  normalization: none
  notes: dob_weight=0.1 in final reward composition (_grade_dob_variations).
- name: name_variation_quality
  metric_kind: composite
  direction: higher_is_better
  weight: 0.2
  normalization: none
  notes: quality_weight=0.2; the average per-name variation quality score (the similarity/count/ uniqueness/length/rule
    composite from calculate_variation_quality) folded into the final per-miner reward alongside DOB and
    address.
ground_truth_sources:
- kind: deterministic_dataset
  description: Seed names with phonetic algorithms (jellyfish Soundex/Metaphone/NYSIIS) and Levenshtein
    distance used as deterministic reference for similarity scoring.
  source_identifier: jellyfish, Levenshtein (MIID/validator/reward.py)
  trust_model: trusted
  notes: ''
- kind: hardware_probe
  description: 'External geocoding APIs used to validate generated addresses: Nominatim (OpenStreetMap)
    for bounding-box-area scoring and Photon (komoot) as an address-existence check; geonamescache for
    city-in-country validation.'
  source_identifier: nominatim.openstreetmap.org, photon.komoot.io, geonamescache
  trust_model: oracle
  notes: Used as external oracle for address realism; results LRU-cached.
- kind: reference_model
  description: 'Off-chain reputation snapshot (rep_data: rep_score + rep_tier) fetched from a Flask service,
    used to compute UAV rewards that dominate emissions when UAV_grading is enabled.'
  source_identifier: rep_data from Flask (apply_reputation_rewards)
  trust_model: unknown
  notes: Reputation source is off-chain and not in this repo; trust model not establishable.
aggregation:
  method: rank_based
  composition: hybrid
  normalization: l1
  temperature: null
  decay_rate: 0.05
  min_weight_floor: null
  burn_allocation:
    enabled: true
    address_or_uid: '59'
    fraction: 0.65
    dynamic: true
    notes: burn_fraction default 0.65 to hardcoded burn_uid 59 when miners qualify; kept rewards rescaled
      to keep_fraction (1 - burn_fraction). 100% burn (fraction 1.0) when no miner clears the quality
      threshold. With reputation pipeline, residual after KAV/UAV proportions also burns.
  notes: 'Per-name quality is a weighted_sum of similarity/count/uniqueness/length plus a separate rule-compliance
    term; per-miner reward is weighted_sum of quality(0.2)/dob(0.1)/address(0.7) times a completeness
    multiplier and minus similarity/collusion penalties. Final emission stage: top_miner_cap (50) ranks
    miners, quality_threshold (0.6) gates them, qualified miners get exp(-decay_rate*rank) blended with
    original reward via blend_factor (0.7), then burn split, then optional KAV(0.10)/UAV(0.90) reputation
    reweighting.'
weight_setting:
  cadence: per_epoch
  method: self.scores L1-normalized into raw_weights, passed through process_weights_for_netuid and convert_weights_and_uids_for_emit,
    then subtensor.set_weights.
  on_chain_call: set_weights
  tempo_or_interval: null
  smoothing:
    kind: ema
    alpha: 0.15
    window: null
    notes: 'update_scores: self.scores = alpha*scattered_rewards + (1-alpha)*self.scores, with moving_average_alpha
      default 0.15.'
anti_gaming:
- kind: deterministic_check
  enforcement: penalty
  description: Phonetic algorithm subset and weights are randomized (deterministically seeded per name)
    to reduce overfitting to a single encoding; variations with >2 consecutive identical letters are filtered
    with up-to-20% penalty; very-low-similarity scores (<0.2) reduced to 10%.
- kind: deduplication
  enforcement: penalty
  description: Address-duplication penalty (normalized, capped at 0.2) and DOB/address normalization-based
    duplicate counting in cheat_detection / get_name_variation_rewards.
- kind: plagiarism_detection
  enforcement: penalty
  description: detect_cheating_patterns computes pairwise overlap/Jaccard similarity between miners; large
    collusion groups (members with score < 0.95) get a direct penalty (penalty_value = 0.75); high cross-miner
    overlap penalized via overlap/Jaccard.
- kind: rate_limit
  enforcement: barrier
  description: Quality threshold (0.6) plus top_miner_cap (50) gate which miners receive any ranking reward;
    non-qualifying miners get 0 and emissions burn.
sub_competitions:
  structure: multi_mechanism
  stages:
  - name: KAV (Known Address Variation) online quality scoring
    role: main
    advancement_rule: quality_score >= quality_threshold (0.6) and global_rank < top_miner_cap (50)
    multipliers:
      kav_weight: 0.1
  - name: UAV (Unknown Attack Vectors) reputation-weighted rewards
    role: other
    advancement_rule: rep_score > 0 in off-chain rep_data snapshot
    multipliers:
      uav_weight: 0.9
  count: 2
  notes: UAV_grading config flag (default True) enables the two-track KAV+UAV pipeline; when disabled,
    KAV-only scoring with burn applied directly.
per_miner_state:
  tracked: true
  state_kinds:
  - reputation
  - cumulative_score
  status_values:
  - Platinum
  - Diamond
  - Gold
  - Silver
  - Bronze
  - Neutral
  - Watch
  reset_policy: rep_score decays over time toward 0; when it reaches 0 the miner gets zero UAV reward.
    New miners not in rep_data snapshot get zero UAV (KAV-only) until they build reputation.
  notes: 'TIER_MULTIPLIERS: Platinum 1.25, Diamond 1.15, Gold 1.10, Silver 1.05, Bronze 1.02, Neutral
    1.00, Watch 0.90. Validator also keeps an EMA of self.scores across epochs.'
documentation:
  status: docs_and_code
  source_version: null
  primary_docs:
  - README.md
  - docs/validator.md
  - docs/Yanez Identity Generation Bittensor Subnet.pdf

  completeness: medium
